items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
items.summary: For degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages to home exercise does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone.
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，单纯居家运动已经可以获得与物理治疗或激励性短信干预相似的疼痛改善效果。这意味着居家方案应作为首选推荐，物理治疗的价值可能更多体现在复杂病例或具体功能障碍上。
items.titleZh: 关键评估论文：对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，单纯居家运动的疼痛改善效果不亚于附加物理治疗或激励性短信。
items.summaryZh: 针对退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，研究发现附加物理治疗或激励性短信未能比单纯居家运动带来额外的疼痛改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain, home exercise alone provides comparable pain improvement to adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages. This suggests home exercise should be a primary recommendation, with physiotherapy potentially reserved for complex cases or specific functional deficits.
items.limitation: 本综述的原始研究可能存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: The original studies included in this synopsis may have heterogeneity.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估指出，移动端肺康复在运动能力改善方面与中心内肺康复相当，在健康状况改善方面甚至更优。这进一步支持了移动端方案在提高COPD患者依从性和可及性方面的潜力，是时候把它作为常规康复的有力补充了。
items.titleZh: 关键评估论文：对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病，移动端肺康复在运动能力改善上与中心内康复效果相当，健康状况改善则更优。
items.summaryZh: 研究评估显示，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者，移动端肺康复在提升运动能力方面与传统中心内康复效果相当，但在改善健康状况方面表现更佳。
items.curatedReasonEn: This appraisal highlights that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is comparable to center-based rehab in improving exercise capacity, and even superior in health status. This further supports the potential of mobile solutions to enhance adherence and accessibility for COPD patients, making it a strong contender as a regular rehabilitation adjunct.
items.limitation: 本评论未提供原始研究的具体数据和样本量，可能影响证据强度判断。
items.limitationEn: This commentary does not provide specific data or sample sizes from the original study, which may affect the judgment of evidence strength.

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: In 92 patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy, an 8-week visuo-vestibular physical therapy program improved anti-compensatory saccades, which reflect vestibulo-saccadic interaction.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究提示，对于急性单侧前庭病患者，视-前庭物理治疗可以改善抗代偿性眼跳。将 SHIMP 评估的抗代偿性眼跳作为中枢代偿的标志物，能帮你更客观地追踪和优化神经康复方案。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病患者视-前庭物理治疗后抗代偿性眼跳的变化：一项前瞻性观察研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察研究显示，92名急性单侧前庭病患者在接受为期8周的视-前庭物理治疗后，其抗代偿性眼跳（反映前庭-眼跳相互作用）有所改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that visuo-vestibular physical therapy can improve anti-compensatory saccades in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy. Utilizing anti-compensatory saccades, as assessed by SHIMP, as a marker of central compensation can help you objectively track and optimize neurorehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心观察性研究，且未设对照组，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center observational study without a control group, which may introduce confounding factors.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), comparing non-surgical management and hip arthroscopy, with feedback gathered through iterative semi-structured interviews.
items.curatedReason: 开发患者决策辅助工具是改善医患共享决策的重要一步，尤其对于 FAIS 这种保守治疗与手术选择并存的病症。但这项研究尚处于工具开发和用户测试阶段，离临床应用还有距离。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法学研究开发并用户测试了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAIS）的患者决策辅助工具，旨在比较非手术治疗与髋关节镜手术，并通过迭代半结构化访谈收集反馈。
items.curatedReasonEn: Developing patient decision aids is a crucial step towards improving shared decision-making, particularly for conditions like FAIS where both conservative and surgical options exist. However, this study is still in the tool development and user-testing phase, and not yet ready for clinical application.
items.limitation: 本研究为混合方法学设计，旨在开发和用户测试决策辅助工具，尚未评估其临床有效性和结局。
items.limitationEn: This mixed-methods study focused on developing and user-testing a decision aid, without evaluating its clinical effectiveness or outcomes.

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study involving 84 hospitalized patients across diagnostic groups found good inter-rater reliability for the Movement Quality Score (MQS) (ICC [2,1] = 0.81) and moderate construct validity with FIM scores (ρ = 0.52–0.70).
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分（MQS）是康复评估工具箱的一个补充。其在不同诊断组间的评分者间信度良好（ICC [2,1] = 0.81），并与 FIM 评分有中度相关性（ρ = 0.52–0.70），提示其在多学科康复中的潜在应用价值。
items.titleZh: 康复评估中跨诊断运动质量评分的评分者间信度与结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院患者进行的横断面研究发现，运动质量评分（MQS）在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科诊断组中显示出良好的评分者间信度（ICC [2,1] = 0.81）和与功能独立性评定量表（FIM）的中度结构效度（ρ = 0.52–0.70）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Movement Quality Score (MQS) is a useful addition to your rehabilitation assessment toolkit. Its good inter-rater reliability (ICC [2,1] = 0.81) and moderate correlation with FIM scores (ρ = 0.52–0.70) across different diagnostic groups suggest its potential utility in multidisciplinary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，且样本量为 84 名住院患者，评估了评分者间信度和结构效度，但未评估 MQS 预测临床结局或指导治疗的长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study, with 84 hospitalized patients, assessed inter-rater reliability and construct validity, but did not evaluate the long-term effectiveness of MQS in predicting clinical outcomes or guiding treatment.

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: A multi-method study integrating a structured narrative review, Delphi process, and Best-Worst Method quantitatively prioritized fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究结合了专家共识和多标准决策分析，为帕金森病患者的跌倒预防策略提供了量化优先顺序。在制定或修订临床路径时，这是筛选干预方案的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先顺序：一项多方法评估。
items.summaryZh: 一项结合了结构性综述、Delphi专家共识和最佳-最差方法的多方法研究，量化了帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先顺序。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, integrating expert consensus and multi-criteria decision-making, offers a quantified prioritization of fall prevention strategies for Parkinson's disease. This is a critical reference when developing or revising clinical pathways to select interventions.
items.limitation: 专家共识和决策分析的性质决定了其结论可能受专家组成和初始信息的影响。
items.limitationEn: The nature of expert consensus and decision-making analysis means conclusions may be influenced by expert panel composition and initial information.

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A small retrospective cohort study found that an intensive community-based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy (NG-NAT) was effective in reducing upper extremity impairment after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 社区环境下的高剂量、高强度虚拟现实（VR）神经动画疗法，提示对卒中后上肢功能障碍有改善作用。对于传统康复资源有限的社区患者，这可能是个值得关注的替代方案。
items.titleZh: 一项社区高强度下一代神经动画疗法在减少卒中后上肢功能障碍方面的疗效：小型回顾性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项小型回顾性队列研究发现，社区密集型下一代神经动画疗法（NG-NAT）能有效减轻卒中后的上肢功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-dose, high-intensity virtual reality (VR) neuroanimation therapy in a community setting suggests improvements in post-stroke upper extremity impairment. For community patients with limited traditional rehabilitation resources, this could be a promising alternative worth monitoring.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且样本量较小，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study with a small sample size, which may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: Contralateral resistance handgrip exercises performed with the non-paretic hand demonstrated immediate and sustainable reductions in hand edema in patients with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后手部水肿是个棘手问题。健侧手握力练习作为一种简单易行的干预手段，提示有即时和持续性减水肿效果。可考虑将其纳入常规辅助康复方案。
items.titleZh: 对侧手握力练习对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效果。
items.summaryZh: 对卒中患者进行健侧手握力练习，可立即并持续减少手部水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: Post-stroke hand edema is challenging. Contralateral handgrip exercise, as a simple and feasible intervention, shows immediate and sustained edema reduction. Consider integrating it as an adjunctive therapy in routine rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例B-A-B设计，样本量有限，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-case B-A-B design with a limited sample size, so generalizability of results should be approached with caution.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review described the intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation, identifying 4,663 abstracts and reviewing full text of articles.
items.curatedReason: 本范围综述系统梳理了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成和结局指标。这为优化不同护理阶段间的衔接提供了循证参考，尤其是在制定跨机构康复方案时。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预及结局指标：一项范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描述了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预的组成部分和结局指标，共筛选了4,663篇摘要并审查了全文。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically outlines the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions in stroke rehabilitation. This provides an evidence-based reference for optimizing care transitions, especially when developing cross-institutional rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重于描述性总结而非效应量评估，不能直接提供干预的疗效等级。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, this study focuses on descriptive summaries rather than effect size evaluation, and cannot directly provide intervention efficacy grades.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: A benefit-harm trade-off study quantified the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management, as perceived by 92 recreational or competitive athletes, for improving knee function and return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 关于 ACL 重建与非手术管理之间的权衡，这项研究量化了患者认为值得进行手术的最小效果量。这能为你与患者共同决策时提供一个基于患者视角的关键指标，尤其是在运动功能和重返运动方面。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗的最小价值效应：一项益害权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 一项益害权衡研究调查了 92 名参与休闲或竞技体育的个体，估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建相较于非手术管理，在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面，患者认为值得达到的最小效果量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Regarding the trade-off between ACL reconstruction and non-surgical management, this study quantifies the smallest worthwhile effect for surgery as perceived by patients. This provides a crucial patient-centered metric for shared decision-making, especially concerning knee function and return to sport.
items.limitation: 研究通过在线调查进行，结果可能存在选择偏倚，且未能反映真实临床场景下的复杂决策因素。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted via an online survey, which may introduce selection bias, and does not reflect the complex decision-making factors in real clinical scenarios.

items.title: American Hospital Association taps Steve Walsh as next CEO
items.curatedReason: 美国医院协会新任 CEO 的任命，预示着美国医疗系统未来可能在政策倡导和行业发展方向上有所调整。关注其上任后的动向，可以预判医院系统对康复服务模式和报销的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 美国医院协会任命 Steve Walsh 为下一任 CEO
items.summaryZh: 美国医院协会 (American Hospital Association) 已任命 Steve Walsh 为其下一任首席执行官，此举可能预示着美国医疗行业领导层的变动。
items.curatedReasonEn: The appointment of the new CEO for the American Hospital Association signals potential shifts in policy advocacy and industry direction within the US healthcare system. Monitoring their actions post-appointment can help anticipate potential impacts on rehabilitation service models and reimbursement for hospitals.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing are common after stroke and are associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes, impacting functional status and quality of life after a 4-week rehabilitation program.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后神经病理性疼痛和灾难化思维对康复结局的负面关联值得你高度关注。早期筛查并干预这些因素，有助于优化卒中患者的康复路径和长期功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化思维与卒中患者康复结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，卒中后神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化思维很常见，并与较差的康复结局相关，影响了为期 4 周康复计划后的功能状态和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: The negative association of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with stroke rehabilitation outcomes warrants your close attention. Early screening and intervention for these factors can optimize rehabilitation pathways and long-term functional recovery for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 研究样本为接受住院康复的卒中偏瘫患者，结果外推至其他卒中人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample consists of inpatient rehabilitation patients with post-stroke hemiplegia, so results should be cautiously generalized to other stroke populations.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: An observational cohort study in Norway found that only 10% of severely injured trauma patients received assessment by a physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist within 72 hours, with early assessment occurring in 43% of patients with spinal cord injuries.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心的数据提示，重伤患者早期获得物理和康复医学专科医生咨询的比例较低。这提醒你思考所在机构早期康复评估和干预流程的优化空间，确保高风险患者的康复需求不被延误。
items.titleZh: 挪威两家创伤中心对创伤患者早期康复的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在挪威进行的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的重伤创伤患者在 72 小时内接受了物理和康复医学专家的评估，其中 43% 的脊髓损伤患者获得了早期评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: Data from Norwegian trauma centers indicate a low proportion of severely injured patients receiving early consultation from physical and rehabilitation medicine specialists. This prompts you to consider optimizing early rehabilitation assessment and intervention processes in your own institution to ensure high-risk patients' rehabilitation needs are not delayed.
items.limitation: 本研究为挪威两个创伤中心的观察性队列研究，结果在不同医疗系统和患者群体中可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study from two Norwegian trauma centers, and results may vary across different healthcare systems and patient populations.

items.title: Half of states sue over Medicaid work requirements
items.summary: Half of US states are suing over Medicaid work requirements, indicating significant legal and policy challenges to their implementation.
items.curatedReason: 美国多州起诉 Medicaid 工作要求，这预示着该政策在全国范围内的推广将面临挑战。作为 PT，你应密切关注各地 Medicaid 政策的动态，这会直接影响低收入患者的康复服务可及性和报销。
items.titleZh: 美国半数州起诉 Medicaid 工作要求
items.summaryZh: 美国半数州正在起诉 Medicaid 工作要求，这预示着该政策的实施将面临重大的法律和政策挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Multiple US states suing over Medicaid work requirements indicates challenges for national policy rollout. As a PT, you should closely monitor Medicaid policy changes across jurisdictions, as these directly impact rehabilitation service access and reimbursement for low-income patients.

items.title: Recent highlights in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke.
items.summary: A systematic review identified 118 RCTs, protocols, and systematic reviews with meta-analyses since 2020, highlighting recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke and providing recommendations for future trials.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统性综述总结了卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新进展，将帮助你快速了解和评估当前最有前景的干预策略，并为未来研究方向提供依据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新亮点。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述自2020年起共识别出118项随机对照试验、试验方案及系统综述和荟萃分析，总结了卒中后运动功能恢复和康复研究的最新进展，并为未来试验提出了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review summarizes recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research post-stroke, helping you quickly grasp and evaluate the most promising intervention strategies and inform future research directions.
items.limitation: 本综述仅纳入样本量≥100的RCTs、RCTs方案和系统综述，可能遗漏了有价值的小样本研究。
items.limitationEn: This review only included RCTs with n≥100 participants, RCT protocols, and systematic reviews, potentially omitting valuable smaller-scale studies.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes
items.summary: Exergaming offers multi-domain benefits for sarcopenia management in institutionalized older adults, encompassing physical, psychological, and social outcomes, aligning with a biopsychosocial understanding of the condition.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了老年人肌少症管理中体感游戏的多元益处，不仅限于身体层面，还包括心理和社会结局。这意味着你在为机构养老的老年患者设计肌少症干预方案时，可以考虑整合体感游戏，以期获得更全面的效果。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏在机构养老老年人肌少症管理中的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局
items.summaryZh: 体感游戏在机构养老老年人的肌少症管理中展现出多领域益处，包括身体、心理和社会结局，这与肌少症的生物心理社会模型相符。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights the multi-domain benefits of exergaming for sarcopenia management in institutionalized older adults, extending beyond physical to psychological and social outcomes. This means you can consider integrating exergaming when designing sarcopenia interventions for older adults in long-term care, aiming for more comprehensive effects.
items.limitation: 该研究关注机构养老的老年人群，其结果对外推至社区居住老年人时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on institutionalized older adults, so its findings require caution when extrapolating to community-dwelling seniors.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

related.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.

items.title: Congress looks to drag healthcare private equity into the light
items.summary: The U.S. Congress is seeking to increase transparency and scrutiny on private equity involvement in the healthcare sector.
items.curatedReason: 美国国会正推动提高医疗领域私募基金的透明度。你需要密切关注相关政策走向，这可能直接影响到未来医疗服务的资金来源、运营模式和合规要求，对大型康复集团和诊所收购案的影响尤为显著。
items.titleZh: 美国国会寻求将医疗领域私募基金置于公众监督之下
items.summaryZh: 美国国会正寻求提高医疗领域私募基金的透明度，将其纳入公众监督范围。
items.curatedReasonEn: The US Congress is pushing for greater transparency in healthcare private equity. You need to closely monitor these policy developments, as they could directly impact future healthcare funding, operating models, and compliance requirements, especially for large rehabilitation groups and clinic acquisitions.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study found that physiotherapists perceive the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention as acceptable, but successful implementation depends on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目（预防复发性腰痛的步行和教育干预）在澳洲 PT 临床的可接受性较高，但其全面实施依赖于充足的培训、临床灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）项目预防腰痛对物理治疗师而言可接受，但其最佳实施有赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究发现，物理治疗师普遍认为用于预防腰痛的 WalkBack 步行和教育项目是可接受的，但其成功实施需要充分的培训、临床操作灵活性以及系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program (walking and education intervention for recurrent low back pain prevention) is highly acceptable to Australian PTs in clinical practice, but its full implementation hinges on adequate training, clinical flexibility, and system-level support.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量有限（20名），结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a limited sample size (20 physiotherapists), which restricts the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Health systems shift toward outpatient deals as M&A evolves
items.summary: Health systems are increasingly focusing on outpatient acquisitions as the healthcare merger and acquisition landscape evolves.
items.curatedReason: 医疗系统正转向门诊收购，这代表了行业 M&A 的新趋势。对于诊所 owner 来说，要留意区域内的收购兼并机会与挑战，可能影响你的独立执业生态。
items.titleZh: 医疗系统M&A趋势转向门诊收购
items.summaryZh: 随着医疗并购格局演变，医疗系统正日益侧重于门诊设施的收购。
items.curatedReasonEn: Health systems are shifting towards outpatient deals, signifying an evolving M&A trend. For clinic owners, be aware of regional acquisition and merger opportunities and challenges, which could impact your independent practice landscape.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded pragmatic RCT found that an 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation program was safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy session for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 远程运动癌症康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面，并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。这提示远程模式可能更适合作为常规门诊的补充，而非完全替代，尤其是在生活质量这一核心结局上。
items.titleZh: 远程运动癌症康复是安全的，但对改善生活质量并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的实用性随机对照试验显示，为期8周的团体运动型远程癌症康复项目是安全的，但在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面，并不优于单次现场物理治疗评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life. This suggests telerehabilitation might be better as a supplement to, rather than a full replacement for, in-person outpatient care, especially concerning quality of life outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明单次物理治疗的具体干预内容，可能影响对照组的干预强度。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail the specific intervention content of the single physiotherapy session, which might affect the intensity of the control group's intervention.

items.title: Effects of Aerobic Exercise on Inflammatory Biomarkers, Pain Intensity, and Quality of Life in Patients with Non-Specific Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 41 participants found that 12 weeks of supervised aerobic cycling three times weekly reduced inflammatory biomarkers and pain intensity, and improved quality of life in patients with non-specific chronic low back pain compared to health education alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT提示，有氧运动可能通过改善炎症生物标志物来减轻非特异性慢性腰痛。尽管研究规模不大，但为运动干预的生理机制提供了进一步的线索。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动对非特异性慢性腰痛患者炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入41名参与者的随机对照试验显示，每周三次、持续12周的有氧骑行运动，相较于单纯健康教育，能降低非特异性慢性腰痛患者的炎症生物标志物和疼痛强度，并改善生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that aerobic exercise may alleviate non-specific chronic low back pain by improving inflammatory biomarkers. Although the study size is small, it provides further clues into the physiological mechanisms of exercise intervention.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（41名参与者），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The small sample size (41 participants) may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study with 1350 NSMSP patients visiting Dutch primary care physiotherapy found that socio-cultural factors were predictors of short- and long-term outcomes in nonspecific musculoskeletal pain (NSMSP).
items.curatedReason: 这份前瞻性队列研究提示，社会文化因素确实影响非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的短期和长期预后。在初评时，你不能只关注生物医学因素，社会文化评估是不可或缺的。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对1350名荷兰初级保健物理治疗机构的非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者进行的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素可以预测非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的短期和长期预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study suggests that socio-cultural factors indeed influence short- and long-term outcomes in nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. When conducting initial assessments, you cannot solely focus on biomedical factors; socio-cultural evaluation is an indispensable part of a comprehensive assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究的局限性在于未报告基线时疼痛强度、残疾和HRQoL与社会文化因素的具体关联效应量。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of this study is that it did not report the specific effect sizes for the associations between socio-cultural factors and pain intensity, disability, and HRQoL at baseline.

items.title: Demographic disparities in health-related social needs among caregivers of stroke survivors: an exploratory cross-sectional study.
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study of 81 US stroke survivor caregivers found that racial and ethnic minority caregivers reported significantly higher total health-related social needs, with an average of 6.5 unmet needs (95% CI [5.69, 7.25]).
items.curatedReason: 这项针对美国卒中幸存者照护者的研究揭示，少数族裔照护者面临更高的健康相关社会需求。识别这些需求，并将其纳入康复支持体系，对改善照护者福祉至关重要。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者照护者健康相关社会需求的人口学差异：一项探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对81名美国卒中幸存者照护者的探索性横断面研究发现，少数族裔照护者报告的健康相关社会需求总量显著更高，平均有6.5项未满足需求（95% CI [5.69, 7.25]）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This US study on stroke survivor caregivers reveals that racial and ethnic minority caregivers experience higher health-related social needs. Identifying and integrating these needs into rehabilitation support systems is crucial for improving caregiver well-being.
items.limitation: 本研究的局限性是其横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量较小（81名照护者）。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of this study is its cross-sectional design, which prevents establishing causality, and its relatively small sample size (81 caregivers).

items.title: Carbon Health settles ‘corporate practice of medicine’ case
items.summary: Carbon Health has settled a 'corporate practice of medicine' case with the California Attorney General, highlighting regulatory scrutiny over healthcare ownership structures in the US.
items.curatedReason: Carbon Health与加州总检察长就“企业行医”案达成和解，这对于在美国执业的PT机构是一个重要信号，提示你需高度关注所在州的执业法规和所有权结构，避免触犯“企业行医”禁令。
items.titleZh: Carbon Health 就“企业行医”案达成和解
items.curatedReasonEn: Carbon Health's settlement with the California Attorney General in a 'corporate practice of medicine' case is a significant signal for PT practices in the US. It highlights the need to closely monitor state practice regulations and ownership structures to avoid violating corporate practice prohibitions.
items.summaryZh: Carbon Health 与加州总检察长就“企业行医”指控达成和解，凸显了美国对医疗机构所有权结构的监管审查趋严。

items.title: Dems sue to kill Medicaid work requirements regulation
items.summary: Democrats have filed a lawsuit to eliminate the Medicaid work requirements regulation, which could impact patient eligibility and access to care.
items.curatedReason: 民主党人起诉，试图废除联邦医疗补助计划（Medicaid）的工作要求规定。如果这些工作要求被废除，可能会影响部分患者的Medicaid资格及其获取康复服务的可及性，你需要持续关注政策进展。
items.titleZh: 民主党人起诉废除联邦医疗补助计划工作要求规定
items.curatedReasonEn: Democrats are suing to overturn Medicaid work requirement regulations. If these requirements are struck down, it could affect some patients' Medicaid eligibility and access to rehabilitation services. You need to continuously monitor policy developments.
items.summaryZh: 民主党人已提起诉讼，要求废除联邦医疗补助（Medicaid）的工作要求规定，这可能影响患者资格和医疗服务可及性。

items.title: Nearly 4M dropped ACA plans after enrolling, HHS reports
items.summary: Nearly 4 million individuals dropped their Affordable Care Act (ACA) plans after initial enrollment, according to a report from HHS.
items.curatedReason: HHS报告显示，近400万人在注册ACA计划后又退出。这表明尽管有联邦补贴，患者在保险覆盖的维持上仍面临挑战。当你与患者讨论支付方案时，注意其保险的稳定性。
items.titleZh: HHS报告：近400万人注册ACA计划后又退出
items.curatedReasonEn: HHS reports that nearly 4 million individuals dropped their ACA plans after enrolling. This indicates that patients still face challenges in maintaining insurance coverage, even with federal subsidies. When discussing payment options with patients, be mindful of their insurance stability.
items.summaryZh: 据美国卫生与公众服务部报告，近 400 万人在初步加入平价医疗法案（ACA）计划后选择退出。

items.title: Comparative Effects of Land-Based and Aquatic Physiotherapy on Functional and Neuromuscular Outcomes in the Rigid-Akinetic Subtype of Parkinson's Disease: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
items.summary: This randomized clinical trial involving 30 individuals with rigid-akinetic Parkinson's disease found that both 12 weeks of land-based and aquatic physiotherapy improved motor function, providing comparative effects on functional and neuromuscular outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项RCT对比了陆上和水下物理治疗对僵直-运动迟缓型帕金森病的影响。结果表明两者都能改善运动功能，为你选择干预方式提供了更多循证依据。
items.titleZh: 陆上和水下物理治疗对僵直-运动迟缓型帕金森病功能和神经肌肉结局的比较效果：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入30名僵直-运动迟缓型帕金森病患者的随机临床试验发现，为期12周的陆上和水下物理治疗均能改善运动功能，并提供了功能和神经肌肉结局的比较效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared land-based and aquatic physiotherapy for rigid-akinetic Parkinson's disease. The results indicate both can improve motor function, providing you with more evidence-based options for intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量较小（30名帕金森病患者），且随访期为12周，对长期效果的评估仍需更大规模的研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (30 Parkinson's disease patients) and a 12-week follow-up period, thus larger studies are needed to assess long-term effects.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: This prospective observational reliability study included 60 patients with end-stage KOA and found good relative reliability (ICC values > 0.8) for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment at local and remote sites.
items.curatedReason: 数字测压计在终末期膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）患者压力痛阈值测量中显示出良好的信度和可重复性，这支持了其作为KOA疼痛评估工具的潜力。
items.titleZh: 数字测压计测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈值的信度研究：一项单中心研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察性信度研究纳入了60名终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，发现数字测压计在局部和远程部位测量压力痛阈值具有良好的相对信度（ICC值>0.8）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometers demonstrate good reliability and reproducibility for pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients, supporting their potential as a KOA pain assessment tool.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心观察性研究，样本量有限，且仅关注终末期KOA患者，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center observational study with a limited sample size, focusing only on end-stage KOA patients, which limits the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: This pilot randomized clinical trial involving 68 participants with persistent RCRSP explored the feasibility of a larger trial comparing pragmatic physiotherapy with or without manual therapy, and provided preliminary insights into treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的随机对照试验提示，对于肩袖相关肩痛，手法治疗可能不劣于纯粹的运动疗法。这是为未来大型非劣效性研究铺路，值得你保持关注。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合物理疗法对肩袖相关肩痛的有效性：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入68名持续性肩袖相关肩痛患者的初步随机临床试验，旨在探讨比较结合手法治疗或不结合手法治疗的物理疗法的可行性，并初步探索了对患者报告结局的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that manual therapy may be non-inferior to exercise-only physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. This paves the way for future large non-inferiority trials and is worth your continued attention.
items.limitation: 本研究是针对未来大型RCT的可行性试点研究，样本量较小（68名参与者），治疗效果的初步探索性结果需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This study is a pilot feasibility trial for a future larger RCT, with a small sample size (68 participants), thus preliminary treatment effects should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: STAT Plus: Longevity, wellness physicians named to panel advising FDA on peptides
items.summary: Longevity and wellness physicians have been named to a panel advising the FDA on peptides, indicating potential future regulatory discussions.
items.curatedReason: FDA顾问小组任命了长寿和健康领域的医生，这可能预示着未来针对抗衰老和健康优化相关肽类药物的监管和报销政策会有新动向。你需要关注这一领域未来的监管趋势，以评估其对康复医学的影响。
items.titleZh: FDA肽类药物咨询小组任命长寿和健康领域医师
items.summaryZh: FDA肽类药物咨询小组任命了长寿和健康领域的医生，预示着未来可能出现新的监管讨论。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FDA's advisory panel appointing longevity and wellness physicians may signal new regulatory and reimbursement policies for anti-aging and wellness-related peptide drugs in the future. You should monitor future regulatory trends in this area to assess its impact on rehabilitation medicine.

items.title: Covista, Advocate establish nursing student pipeline to address worsening shortage
items.summary: Covista and Advocate have established a nursing student pipeline to address the worsening shortage of nursing professionals.
items.curatedReason: Covista 和 Advocate 建立的护理学生输送管线是应对护理人员短缺的行业动态。虽然不是直接的 PT 领域，但跨专业劳动力短缺会间接影响康复治疗服务的可及性和团队协作。
items.titleZh: Covista 与 Advocate 建立护理学生输送管线以应对日益恶化的短缺
items.summaryZh: Covista 和 Advocate 合作建立护理学生输送管线，旨在应对日益加剧的护理人员短缺问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: The nursing student pipeline established by Covista and Advocate is an industry development addressing the nursing shortage. While not directly in PT, interprofessional workforce shortages can indirectly impact the accessibility of rehabilitation services and team collaboration.

items.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of studies from inception to March 2025 found innovative technological interventions effectively improve gait-related outcomes in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析坐实了创新技术在不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）步态康复中的有效性。如果你在 iSCI 康复中应用技术辅助，这为你的决策提供了坚实的证据支持，特别是对改善步速和功能移动性。
items.titleZh: 不完全脊髓损伤步态康复中的创新技术：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.limitation: 纳入研究异质性可能较高，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity among included studies may affect the generalizability of results.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入自初始至 2025 年 3 月研究的系统综述与荟萃分析显示，创新技术干预可有效改善不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）成人患者的步态相关结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis isn't just promising—it backs up your use of tech-assisted gait training in iSCI. You have solid evidence to stop hesitating and push harder on gait speed and functional mobility with these tools.

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A prospective RCT (n=60) with 2-year follow-up found no significant differences in clinical outcomes, strength, or functional symmetry between conservative and accelerated rehabilitation protocols after proximal hamstring tendon repair.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 的 2 年随访结果显示，在腘绳肌近端撕脱伤修复术后，加速康复与保守康复在临床结果、力量恢复和功能对称性方面并无显著差异。这支持你可以在安全前提下，对高需求运动人群采用更积极的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 腘绳肌近端撕脱修复术后康复方案的两年结果：纵向与加速康复方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT with 2-year follow-up shows no significant differences in clinical outcomes, strength recovery, or functional symmetry between accelerated and conservative rehabilitation after proximal hamstring avulsion repair. This supports your ability to use more aggressive rehabilitation protocols for high-demand athletic populations, provided it is safe.
items.limitation: 虽然是 RCT，但样本量相对不大（n=60），部分结局可能仍需更大样本验证。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, the sample size is relatively small (n=60), and some outcomes may still require validation with larger samples.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性 RCT（n=60）的 2 年随访显示，腘绳肌近端肌腱修复术后，保守与加速康复方案在临床结果、肌力或功能对称性方面无显著差异。

items.title: Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine low-moderate quality studies (n=490) found cardiac rehabilitation improves aerobic capacity (28 m, 95% CI 16 m to 39 m, P=<0.00001) for people with TIA or stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项快速综述和荟萃分析发现，心脏康复能显著改善卒中或TIA患者的有氧能力（28米，95% CI 16米至39米，P<0.00001），并对收缩压和自我报告饮食有积极影响。这坐实了心脏康复在神经科患者中的潜在价值，提示你在卒中/TIA康复中考虑整合心脏康复元素。
items.titleZh: 心脏康复项目能否有效改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者的有氧能力？一项快速综述和荟萃分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This rapid review and meta-analysis found that cardiac rehabilitation significantly improves aerobic capacity (28 m, 95% CI 16 m to 39 m, P<0.00001) in stroke or TIA patients, with positive effects on systolic blood pressure and self-reported diet. This solidifies the potential value of cardiac rehabilitation in neurological patients, suggesting you consider integrating cardiac rehabilitation elements into stroke/TIA recovery.
items.limitation: 纳入研究质量较低（低-中等），且包含非 RCT 研究，可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Included studies are of low-moderate quality and include non-RCTs, which may introduce bias.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 9 项低-中等质量研究（n=490）的快速综述与荟萃分析发现，心脏康复将 TIA 或卒中患者有氧能力显著提高（28 米, 95% CI 16 米至 39 米, P<0.00001）。

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (n=54 analyzed) found that High-Intensity Laser Therapy significantly improved pain (NPRS, P=0.006), function (LEFS, P=0.043), and lateral femoral cutaneous nerve sensory conduction velocity (P=0.027) in Meralgia Paresthetica patients at week 12 compared to sham.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机、双盲、假对照试验显示，高强度激光治疗（HILT）在减轻股外侧皮神经卡压（MP）疼痛、改善功能和神经传导速度方面优于假治疗。这意味着你可以将 HILT 纳入 MP 患者的临床干预方案。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial shows that High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) is superior to sham treatment in reducing pain, improving function, and nerve conduction velocity in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP). This means you can incorporate HILT into clinical intervention protocols for MP patients.
items.limitation: 研究随访期仅 12 周，长期疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: The study's follow-up period is only 12 weeks, so long-term efficacy remains unclear.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（n=54）发现，与假治疗相比，高强度激光在 12 周时可显著改善感觉异常性股痛（MP）患者的疼痛（NPRS, P=0.006）、功能（LEFS, P=0.043）及股外侧皮神经感觉传导速度（P=0.027）。

items.title: Perspectives on an advanced practice physiotherapy-led model for musculoskeletal care in Canada: A qualitative study of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perspectives of multidisciplinary clinicians and patients on an Advanced Practice Physiotherapy-led musculoskeletal model in Canada to inform sustainable implementation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 加拿大骨骼肌肉护理中高级执业物理治疗（APP）模式的定性研究，揭示了患者和多学科临床医生的观点。这有助于你理解在不同国家推行 APP 模式的障碍和促进因素，为执业扩展提供借鉴。
items.titleZh: 加拿大骨骼肌肉护理中高级执业物理治疗主导模式的视角：患者和多学科临床医生的定性研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study on an Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP)-led musculoskeletal care model in Canada reveals perspectives from patients and multidisciplinary clinicians. This helps you understand barriers and facilitators for APP models across different countries, offering insights for practice expansion.
items.limitation: 定性研究，结果可能不具普适性。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study, results may not be generalizable.
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了多学科临床医生和患者对加拿大高级执业物理治疗（APP）主导的肌骨护理模式的看法，为推动可持续实施策略提供信息。

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: This commentary outlines appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based manual therapy treatment mechanisms, aiming to explain 'why' and 'how' treatments work.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评为你展示了如何设计研究来确定手法治疗（force-based manual therapy）的因果治疗机制。若你从事或关注手法治疗研究，这能指导你提升研究设计和结果解释的严谨性。
items.titleZh: 确定基于力的（手法治疗）治疗因果机制的适当转化设计
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary shows you how to design studies to determine causal treatment mechanisms for force-based manual therapies. If you are involved in or follow manual therapy research, this can guide you in enhancing the rigor of your study designs and result interpretations.
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评阐述了确定基于力的手法治疗因果机制的合理转化设计，旨在解释治疗“为何”及“如何”起效。

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: This review examines current literature on the evaluation and management of labral pathology with associated glenohumeral instability in athletes, focusing on rehabilitation and return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述总结了运动员盂唇撕裂伴盂肱关节不稳的评估和管理，并特别关注了康复和重返运动。你可以此作为快速了解当前诊疗进展的参考，但具体康复策略仍需结合患者情况。
items.titleZh: 运动员盂肱关节不稳伴盂唇撕裂的治疗
items.curatedReasonEn: This review summarizes the evaluation and management of labral tears with glenohumeral instability in athletes, with a specific focus on rehabilitation and return to sport. You can use this as a quick reference for current treatment advances, but specific rehabilitation strategies still need to be tailored to the patient's condition.
items.limitation: 综述文章，而非原创研究，结论基于现有文献。
items.limitationEn: Review article, not original research, conclusions are based on existing literature.
items.titleEn: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes
items.summaryZh: 本综述围绕运动员盂唇病变合并盂肱不稳的评估与管理，梳理了当前文献，重点关注康复路径与重返赛场策略。

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: This review describes the evidence-based physiotherapy management of Long-COVID, a heterogeneous and multisystemic condition following SARS-CoV-2 infection.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提供了一份基于证据的 Long-COVID 物理治疗管理指南。如果你正在或将要处理 Long-COVID 患者，这为你提供了一个全面的临床框架和最新的证据支持。
items.titleZh: Long-COVID 的物理治疗管理：一种基于证据的方法
items.curatedReasonEn: This review provides an evidence-based guide for the physiotherapy management of Long-COVID. If you are treating or will be treating Long-COVID patients, this offers a comprehensive clinical framework and up-to-date evidence support.
items.limitation: 综述文章，非原创研究，证据等级不高。
items.limitationEn: Review article, not original research, not a high level of evidence.
items.titleEn: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach
items.summaryZh: 本文系统描述了针对 Long-COVID（SARS-CoV-2 感染后多系统异质性疾病）的循证物理治疗管理方案。

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perceptions of chronic low back pain and physiotherapy among 20 participants in India, identifying socio-cultural factors influencing rehabilitation service utilization.
items.curatedReason: 这项印度定性研究揭示了当地慢腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知及其利用障碍。了解这些文化和认知因素，有助于你调整在多元文化背景下的沟通策略和干预方案。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性腰痛和物理治疗认知：一项定性研究
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from India reveals local chronic low back pain patients' perceptions of physiotherapy and barriers to its utilization. Understanding these cultural and cognitive factors can help you adapt communication strategies and intervention programs in diverse cultural settings.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小，结果不具普适性。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探索了印度20名慢性腰痛参与者对疼痛和物理治疗的认知，识别出影响康复服务利用的社会文化因素。

items.title: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 32 barriers and 30 facilitators in inpatient settings and 109 barriers and 73 facilitators in outpatient/community settings for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述识别了卒中康复期间和之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素及有前景的干预措施。这为你设计卒中患者的干预方案提供了行为改变技术（BCTs）的证据基础。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复期间和之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景的干预措施：一项范围综述
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies barriers, facilitators, and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation. This provides an evidence base of behavior change techniques (BCTs) for you to design intervention programs for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述，证据等级不高，主要基于观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: Scoping review, evidence level is not high, mainly based on observational studies.
items.titleEn: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review
items.summaryZh: 一篇范围综述识别了卒中康复住院期间减少久坐的32项障碍与30项促进因素，以及门诊/社区环境下109项障碍与73项促进因素，并提炼出有前景的干预措施。

items.title: Rehabilitation and Management in Lateral Medullary Stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome): A Scoping Review and Evidence Map.
items.summary: A scoping review and evidence map identified rehabilitation interventions and management strategies reported for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome).
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述和证据图谱系统地梳理了外侧延髓梗死（Wallenberg 综合征）的康复干预和管理策略。这为你了解和选择针对该特定类型卒中的康复方法提供了全面的信息。
items.titleZh: 外侧延髓梗死（Wallenberg 综合征）的康复与管理：一项范围综述和证据图谱
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review and evidence map systematically summarizes rehabilitation interventions and management strategies for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome). This provides comprehensive information for you to understand and select rehabilitation approaches for this specific type of stroke.
items.limitation: 范围综述，未进行元分析，证据等级不高。
items.limitationEn: Scoping review, no meta-analysis performed, not a high level of evidence.
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述与证据图谱系统梳理了文献中报道的针对延髓外侧梗死（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预和管理策略。

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (n=80) described early mobility metrics and participation barriers among children with TBI admitted to a pediatric ICU, finding high mobility occurred in 53% of OT and 56.3% of PT evaluations.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者早期活动（EM）的指标和障碍。它提示你，在儿科 ICU 中推动 TBI 患儿的早期活动仍有挑战，需要更多关注障碍因素并设计针对性干预。
items.titleZh: 儿童创伤性脑损伤早期活动中的障碍和趋势
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study describes early mobility (EM) metrics and barriers in children with traumatic brain injury (TBI). It suggests that promoting early mobility in pediatric ICU TBI patients remains challenging, requiring more attention to barriers and the design of targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 回顾性单中心研究，结果可能受限于特定机构和人群。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective single-center study, results may be limited to specific institutions and populations.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（n=80）描述了PICU内儿童TBI患者的早期活动指标与参与障碍，显示OT和PT评估中高活动水平的比例分别为53%和56.3%。

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: This process evaluation described the adaptation of "Live Long Walk Strong," an age-friendly physical therapy program, across four diverse clinical settings within the Veterans Health Administration (n=11 physical therapists and PTAs).
items.curatedReason: 这项实践性证据研究描述了“活得久，走得稳”（Live Long Walk Strong）物理治疗项目在不同老年康复场景下的适应性。如果你在老年人群中推行移动能力改善项目，这为你提供了在不同环境下（门诊、居家、远程）实施和调整的经验借鉴。
items.titleZh: 实施“活得久，走得稳”项目：在不同背景下调整物理治疗项目的实践证据
items.curatedReasonEn: This practice-based evidence study describes the adaptability of the "Live Long Walk Strong" physical therapy program across diverse geriatric rehabilitation contexts. If you implement mobility improvement programs for older adults, this offers insights into implementing and adjusting programs in various settings (outpatient, home, telehealth).
items.limitation: 过程评估研究，而非干预效果评价，无对照组。
items.limitationEn: Process evaluation study, not an intervention effectiveness evaluation, no control group.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation
items.titleEn: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估描述了适老化物理治疗项目“Live Long Walk Strong”在退伍军人健康管理局下4个不同临床环境（11名物理治疗师/助理参与）中的适应性调整。

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of various physical therapy methods and techniques in improving endometriosis symptoms, calculating mean differences and 95% confidence intervals.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了物理治疗技术和方法在管理子宫内膜异位症症状中的有效性。它提供了现有证据的总结，但鉴于异质性高，你需要仔细评估证据质量和适用范围。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in managing endometriosis symptoms. It provides a summary of existing evidence, but given the high heterogeneity, you need to carefully assess the quality and applicability of the evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究异质性高（I² 统计量），可能影响荟萃分析结果的可靠性。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity among included studies (I² statistic) may affect the reliability of meta-analysis results.
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述与荟萃分析评估了多种物理治疗技术对改善子宫内膜异位症症状的效果，并计算了均差与95%置信区间，但研究间异质性较高。

items.title: Why direct contracting is attracting health systems, employers
items.summary: This article discusses how direct contracting models are becoming attractive to health systems and employers, indicating a shift in healthcare payment and delivery structures.
items.curatedReason: 这份新闻报道探讨了直接签约模式如何吸引医疗系统和雇主。如果你关注医疗支付和管理模式的创新，这为你提供了一个了解美国医疗市场动态的视角。
items.titleZh: 为何直接签约模式吸引医疗系统和雇主
items.curatedReasonEn: This news report explores how direct contracting models are attracting health systems and employers. If you are interested in innovations in healthcare payment and management models, this offers a perspective on dynamics in the US healthcare market.
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了直接签约模式如何越来越受到医疗系统和雇主的青睐，标志着医疗支付与服务交付结构正在发生转变。

items.title: Post-surgical hospital-at-home: How to do it right
items.summary: This article explores strategies for effectively implementing post-surgical hospital-at-home programs, highlighting best practices for successful patient care in a home setting.
items.curatedReason: 这份新闻报道讨论了如何正确实施术后居家医院项目。如果你正在考虑或参与居家康复服务，这为你提供了关键的实施考量和最佳实践。
items.titleZh: 术后居家医院项目：如何正确实施
items.curatedReasonEn: This news report discusses how to properly implement post-surgical hospital-at-home programs. If you are considering or participating in home-based rehabilitation services, this provides you with key implementation considerations and best practices.
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了有效实施术后家庭医院项目的策略，重点介绍了在家庭环境中成功进行患者管理的关键实践。

items.title: Health Literacy During Inpatient Rehabilitation and Its Association with One-Year Health and Functional Outcomes in Individuals with Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury.
items.summary: A cohort study (N=3,943) found that limited health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation for traumatic spinal cord injury was associated with poorer one-year health and functional outcomes, including higher rates of UTIs, pressure injuries, and rehospitalizations.
items.curatedReason: 健康素养低下是脊髓损伤患者一年期功能预后不佳的独立风险因素。临床上应将健康素养评估整合到入院康复流程中，并针对性地提供易于理解的教育材料和沟通策略，以改善长期结局。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脊髓损伤患者住院康复期间的健康素养与一年期健康及功能结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项队列研究（N=3,943）发现，创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间的健康素养低下与一年期较差的健康和功能结局相关，包括更高的尿路感染、压疮和再住院率。
items.curatedReasonEn: Limited health literacy is an independent risk factor for poorer one-year functional outcomes in individuals with traumatic spinal cord injury. Clinically, integrate health literacy assessment into inpatient rehabilitation and provide targeted, accessible educational materials and communication strategies to improve long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，可能存在未调整的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort study, and unadjusted confounding factors may exist.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Health Literacy During Inpatient Rehabilitation and Its Association with One-Year Health and Functional Outcomes in Individuals with Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury

items.title: Education level amplifies the mediating pathway of rehabilitation motivation between metacognition and quality of life in stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=772) of stroke survivors found that education level amplifies the mediating pathway of rehabilitation motivation between maladaptive metacognitive beliefs and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 卒中幸存者的康复动机和元认知信念对生活质量有显著影响，而教育水平能放大这种影响。这提示你在制定康复计划时，除了关注功能障碍，也应考虑患者的教育背景和心理因素，以提升其生活质量。
items.titleZh: 教育水平放大康复动机在卒中幸存者元认知与生活质量间的中介作用。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 772 名卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，教育水平放大了康复动机在适应不良元认知信念与生活质量之间的中介途径。
items.curatedReasonEn: Rehabilitation motivation and metacognitive beliefs significantly impact quality of life for stroke survivors, with education level amplifying this effect. This suggests that when developing rehabilitation plans, you should consider patients' educational backgrounds and psychological factors, not just functional impairments, to improve their quality of life.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法确立因果关系；且数据主要来源于中国河南省三甲医院，结果的普适性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality, and data primarily from tertiary hospitals in Henan Province, China, may limit generalizability.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group of UK physiotherapists (n=55) explored the relevance of adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for pediatric musculoskeletal care, highlighting a need for a valid outcome measure for children aged 8-18 years.
items.curatedReason: 儿科肌肉骨骼康复领域缺少标准化的评估工具。这份调查和焦点小组研究揭示了临床医生对成人版 MSK-HQ 量表在儿科人群中使用的看法和需求，提示了未来量表本地化和验证的方向。
items.titleZh: 为儿科肌肉骨骼护理调整 MSK-HQ：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对英国物理治疗师（n=55）的全国调查和焦点小组研究，探讨了将肌肉骨骼健康问卷（MSK-HQ）调整用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理的必要性，强调了对 8-18 岁儿童有效结果测量工具的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pediatric MSK rehab lacks standardized outcome measures. This survey and focus group highlight clinicians' views and needs for adapting the adult MSK-HQ for pediatric use, indicating future directions for localization and validation.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性调查，仅反映了英国临床医生的观点，样本量较小，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study reflects the views of UK clinicians only, has a small sample size, and may be subject to selection bias.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on study methodologies across various clinical tasks, designs, comparators, outcome domains, and interaction conditions.
items.curatedReason: ChatGPT 等大型语言模型在物理治疗领域的应用尚处于早期阶段。这份范围综述能帮助你了解目前研究集中在哪些方面，以及未来的研究设计可以如何规划，但别指望它能立刻指导你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的应用：一项范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描绘了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的现有证据，侧重于在各种临床任务、研究设计、对照、结局领域和交互条件下对该技术的研究方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Large language models like ChatGPT are in early stages for physiotherapy. This scoping review helps you understand current research focus and design for future studies, but don't expect immediate clinical practice guidance.
items.limitation: 该综述未对纳入研究的证据质量进行批判性评估，且仅关注技术的研究方式而非临床有效性。
items.limitationEn: The review did not critically appraise the quality of evidence from included studies and focused on how the technology was studied rather than its clinical effectiveness.

items.title: Experiences and coping with kinesiophobia in patients with post-stroke limb dysfunction: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences, coping strategies, and support needs related to kinesiophobia in 15 stroke survivors with limb dysfunction, identifying themes like fear development and distorted body perception.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后运动恐惧（kinesiophobia）是康复的常见障碍，本定性研究深入描绘了患者的经历和应对方式。在临床中，除了关注身体功能，更要主动识别并解决患者的运动恐惧，提供心理支持和恰当的教育。
items.titleZh: 卒中后肢体功能障碍患者运动恐惧的经历与应对：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了 15 名卒中后肢体功能障碍患者运动恐惧的经历、应对策略和支持需求，识别出恐惧发展和身体感知扭曲等主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiophobia post-stroke is a common rehabilitation barrier. This qualitative study provides deep insights into patients' experiences and coping strategies. Clinically, beyond physical function, actively identify and address kinesiophobia, offering psychological support and appropriate education.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（15 名卒中幸存者），结果的普遍性有限，主要提供深入的个体经验而非统计学结论。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (15 stroke survivors), limiting generalizability; it primarily offers in-depth individual experiences rather than statistical conclusions.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: This study validated the Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, comparing its mobility metrics against video truth data and assessing usability.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 是一种用于住院患者的活动监测器。如果你正在寻找客观评估住院患者移动性的工具，可以关注这款设备的验证数据，评估其在临床实践中的适用性。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性期住院患者的活动监测器：患者/居民移动追踪器（PREEMPT）。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中验证了 PREEMPT 活动监测器，将其移动指标与视频真实数据进行比较并评估了可用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: PREEMPT is an activity monitor for hospitalized patients. If you are looking for tools to objectively assess mobility in this population, you can review its validation data and assess its applicability in your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且健康老年人与住院患者的比例可能影响结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size, and the proportion of healthy older adults to hospitalized patients may affect the generalizability of results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Comparison of ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection for calcific tendinitis: A prospective, randomized, double-blind trial
items.summary: This prospective, randomized, double-blind trial aimed to compare ultrasound-guided subacromial bursa injection and ultrasound-guided lavage for calcific tendinitis based on clinical and ultrasonographic findings.
items.curatedReason: 超声引导下抽吸灌洗（lavage）和肩峰下滑囊注射（SBI）在钙化性肌腱炎的治疗中均显示出积极效果。这项试验提供了两者在临床和超声表现上比较的证据，你可根据患者具体情况和自身技术选择更合适的方案。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的比较：一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验
items.curatedReasonEn: Both ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection (SBI) show positive effects in treating calcific tendinitis. This trial provides comparative evidence on their clinical and ultrasonographic outcomes, allowing you to choose the more suitable option based on patient specifics and your expertise.
items.limitation: 研究未提及具体样本量和随访时间，可能影响结果的可靠性和长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not mention the specific sample size or follow-up period, which may affect the reliability and long-term effectiveness of the results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验比较了超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的临床和超声表现。

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study.
items.summary: A multicenter, prospective, cross-sectional study of 975 MS patients found moderate-to-severe neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) in 6.8% and identified associations between NBD and bladder dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症（MS）患者神经源性肠功能障碍（NBD）的患病率和相关因素。要关注 NBD 与膀胱功能障碍的关联，在评估和管理 MS 患者时，需整合对肠道和膀胱功能的全面评估。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症的神经源性肠功能障碍：一项多中心研究的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对 975 名多发性硬化症（MS）患者进行的多中心前瞻性横断面研究发现，6.8% 的患者存在中度至重度神经源性肠功能障碍（NBD），并揭示了 NBD 与膀胱功能障碍之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study clarifies the prevalence and associated factors of neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) in MS patients. Pay attention to the link between NBD and bladder dysfunction; integrate comprehensive bowel and bladder function assessments when evaluating and managing MS patients.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系，且受试者来自三级转诊中心，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality, and potential selection bias from tertiary referral centers.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study

items.title: Immersive virtual reality for upper limb rehabilitation in people with MS: a randomised, controlled feasibility study.
items.summary: An eight-week immersive virtual reality (VR) intervention using co-produced games for upper limb rehabilitation in 19 people with MS showed good feasibility and adherence (87%).
items.curatedReason: 沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）游戏用于多发性硬化症（MS）患者上肢康复的可行性研究，招募和依从性均良好。未来大规模 RCT 有望明确其疗效，可在临床考虑作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式虚拟现实上肢康复在多发性硬化症患者中的随机对照可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期八周的沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）上肢康复干预在 19 名多发性硬化症患者中显示出良好的可行性（依从性达 87%）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study on immersive VR games for upper limb rehabilitation in MS patients showed good recruitment and adherence. Future large-scale RCTs could confirm efficacy; consider it as an adjunctive tool in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 小样本的可行性研究，非旨在评估疗效，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Small-sample feasibility study, not designed for efficacy, with limited generalizability.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified mindset, effort, and support as foundational factors determining their decision to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 定性分析揭示了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决定因素，涵盖心态、努力和支持。在康复过程中，除了生理恢复，还要关注患者的心理动机、治疗依从性以及医护人员和家属的支持，这有助于更全面地支持患者重返运动。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持：ACL 损伤患者重返运动决定的基础——NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是决定 ACL 损伤后患者重返运动的核心因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Qualitative analysis highlights mindset, effort, and support as key determinants for ACL injury patients returning to sport. In rehabilitation, beyond physical recovery, focus on patients' psychological motivation, treatment adherence, and support from clinicians and family to comprehensively support their return to sport.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量虽可观但结论主要为概念性理解，非量化证据。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study; while the sample size is decent, conclusions are conceptual, not quantitative.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Apraxia in Patients with Cognitive Impairment: Evidence from Familiar Tool Use
items.summary: This commentary explores apraxia in patients with cognitive impairment, focusing on evidence from familiar tool use as a key indicator of daily living ability decline.
items.curatedReason: 认知障碍患者的失用症，尤其是在熟悉工具使用方面的表现，是临床评估的重要关注点。这提示你在评估认知障碍患者的日常活动能力时，应细致观察和评估其工具使用的精确性和流畅性，以便进行针对性的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 认知障碍患者的失用症：来自熟悉工具使用的证据
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论探讨了认知障碍患者的失用症，重点关注其在熟悉工具使用方面的表现，以此作为日常活动能力下降的关键指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: Apraxia in patients with cognitive impairment, particularly in familiar tool use, is a key clinical concern. When assessing daily living activities in cognitively impaired patients, you should meticulously observe and evaluate the precision and fluidity of their tool use to guide targeted rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为评论性质，需参考其引用的原始研究设计细节。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary; refer to the original study designs for full details.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke and in older adults
items.summary: This study found that better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke patients (n=23) and age-matched older adults (n=21).
items.curatedReason: 慢性卒中患者和老年人在运动适应性学习中存在遗忘现象，且与即时陈述性记忆相关。你在设计运动康复方案时，应考虑如何优化学习策略，以减少遗忘，可能需要更多重复或不同形式的反馈来巩固运动记忆。
items.titleZh: 更好的即时陈述性记忆与慢性卒中和老年人步态适应性遗忘相关
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现，在慢性卒中患者 (n=23) 和同龄老年人 (n=21) 的运动适应过程中，更好的即时陈述性记忆与遗忘现象相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Chronic stroke patients and older adults experience forgetting in sensorimotor adaptation, which is associated with immediate declarative memory. When designing motor rehabilitation programs, you should consider optimizing learning strategies to reduce forgetting, potentially requiring more repetition or varied feedback to consolidate motor memory.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性设计，样本量相对较小（卒中组 n=23，对照组 n=21），且为单中心研究，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study with a relatively small sample size (n=23 for stroke, n=21 for controls) and is a single-center study, potentially affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Elevance pays CMS $342M in midst of Medicare Advantage probe
items.summary: Elevance Health paid CMS $342 million amid a Medicare Advantage probe, signaling increased scrutiny on overpayments and compliance in the MA program.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 在 Medicare Advantage 调查期间向 CMS 支付 3.42 亿美元，这表明 Medicare Advantage 的报销审查正在收紧。你需要关注这类合规动态，以避免潜在的报销风险。
items.titleZh: Elevance 在 Medicare Advantage 调查中向 CMS 支付 3.42 亿美元。
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 在 Medicare Advantage 调查期间向 CMS 支付了 3.42 亿美元，这预示着医疗保险优势计划（MA）在过度支付和合规性方面的审查日益严格。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's $342 million payment to CMS amidst a Medicare Advantage probe signals tightening reimbursement scrutiny for MA plans. You need to monitor such compliance trends to mitigate potential reimbursement risks.

items.title: Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA)
items.summary: The APTA provides an evidence-based clinical summary for Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA), offering guidance for patient care.
items.curatedReason: 这份来自 APTA 的全膝关节置换（TKA）临床总结，为临床医生提供了一个快速查阅的循证资源。你可以用它来核对当前的最佳实践，或作为新入职治疗师的参考。
items.titleZh: 全膝关节置换术 (TKA) 临床总结。
items.summaryZh: APTA 发布了一份关于全膝关节置换术 (TKA) 的循证临床总结，为患者护理提供指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA clinical summary on Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA) provides a quick-reference, evidence-based resource for clinicians. You can use it to verify current best practices or as a reference for new therapists.

items.title: Klomp named to key HHS post
items.summary: Chris Klomp has been named to a key position within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).
items.curatedReason: Chris Klomp 被任命为 HHS 关键职务，这一高层人事变动可能预示着未来美国医疗政策和监管方向的微调，值得关注。
items.titleZh: Klomp 获任 HHS 关键职位。
items.summaryZh: Chris Klomp 已被任命为美国卫生与公众服务部（HHS）的一个关键职位。
items.curatedReasonEn: Chris Klomp's appointment to a key HHS post may signal subtle shifts in future U.S. healthcare policy and regulatory directions, warranting attention.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review establishes weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury, addressing the high recurrence rate and lack of consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和方法学质量分析，旨在为腘绳肌损伤后的重返运动制定加权标准。了解这些标准能帮助你更科学地评估运动员的恢复状况，减少复发风险，并与教练和运动员进行更有效的沟通。
items.titleZh: 腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准：系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and methodological quality analysis aims to establish weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury. Understanding these criteria will help you more scientifically assess an athlete's recovery status, reduce recurrence risk, and communicate more effectively with coaches and athletes.
items.limitation: 未明确给出综述纳入研究的具体数量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The review does not explicitly state the number of included studies or their heterogeneity.
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述针对腘绳肌损伤高复发率和缺乏共识的现状，建立了重返赛场的加权标准。
items.titleEn: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1372) found shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) for knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入17项试验（1372名参与者）的系统综述和荟萃分析证实，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛（平均-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）和步行能力（平均-0.97；95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]）。如果你的KOA患者对其他干预反应不佳，或作为辅助治疗，SWD值得考虑。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (1372 participants) confirms that Shortwave Diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. If your KOA patients are not responding well to other interventions, or as an adjunctive treatment, SWD is worth considering.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告疼痛和步行能力改善的临床最小重要差异（MCID），影响临床实践的解读。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the Minimum Clinically Important Difference (MCID) for pain and walking ability improvements, which impacts clinical interpretation.
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入17项RCT（n=1372）的荟萃分析显示，短波透热疗法显著改善膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（均差 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）与步行能力（均差 -0.97；95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]）。

items.title: Cortical activation and functional connectivity during thumb-to-finger opposition in patients with stroke with varying functional levels: insights from fNIRS.
items.summary: A study with 52 stroke patients found varying cortical activation and functional connectivity during thumb-to-finger opposition, assessed by fNIRS, depending on hand function level and dominance.
items.curatedReason: 这项fNIRS研究揭示了卒中患者在拇指对指任务中，大脑皮层激活模式和功能连接随手功能水平和手优势侧的变化。这些神经生理学见解有助于你理解不同功能恢复阶段患者的皮层重组机制，并可能指导更精细化的神经康复策略。
items.titleZh: fNIRS 研究揭示卒中患者在拇指对指任务中，皮层激活和功能连接随功能水平变化
items.curatedReasonEn: This fNIRS study reveals changes in cortical activation patterns and functional connectivity during a thumb-to-finger opposition task in stroke patients, varying with hand function level and dominance. These neurophysiological insights can help you understand cortical reorganization mechanisms at different stages of functional recovery and potentially guide more refined neurorehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（52名患者），且仅限于右利手患者。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size (52 patients) and is limited to right-handed individuals.
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入52名脑卒中患者的fNIRS研究发现，在执行拇指对指任务时，大脑皮层的激活和功能连接模式因手功能水平和惯用侧而异。

items.title: Advanced practice provider students win reprieve from lower loan cap
items.summary: Advanced practice provider students have won a reprieve from a lower loan cap rule imposed by the U.S. Education Department, following a judge's decision.
items.curatedReason: 美国教育部门对高级执业提供者（APP）学生贷款上限规则的暂缓执行，对正在就读或计划就读物理治疗（DPT）项目的学生而言是利好消息。这可能影响到未来 PT 教育的可负担性，你需要关注后续政策动向。
items.titleZh: 高级执业提供者学生贷款上限获暂缓
items.summaryZh: 在一位法官做出裁决后，美国教育部门对高级执业提供者学生的较低贷款上限规定获暂缓执行。
items.curatedReasonEn: The reprieve from lower loan caps for Advanced Practice Provider (APP) students by the U.S. Education Department is good news for those enrolled in or planning to pursue Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT) programs. This may impact the affordability of future PT education, and you should monitor subsequent policy developments.

items.title: UnitedHealth’s Optum in talks to sell orthopedics, surgery services in New York
items.summary: UnitedHealth's Optum is reportedly in talks to sell its orthopedic and surgery services in New York, potentially indicating a strategic realignment within the healthcare market.
items.curatedReason: Optum 计划出售在纽约州的骨科和外科服务，这可能预示着大型医疗集团在特定地区进行业务重组。关注这类市场动态有助于你评估当地医疗服务供需变化和潜在的合作机会。
items.titleZh: UnitedHealth 旗下 Optum 洽谈出售纽约的骨科和外科服务。
items.summaryZh: 据报道，UnitedHealth 旗下的 Optum 正在洽谈出售其在纽约州的骨科和外科服务，这可能预示着医疗市场内部的战略调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: Optum's plan to sell its orthopedic and surgical services in New York may signal business restructuring by large healthcare groups in specific regions. Monitoring such market dynamics can help you assess changes in local healthcare supply and demand and potential collaboration opportunities.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Norwegian primary healthcare found that an AI-driven clinical decision support system influenced decision-making processes for both musculoskeletal disorder patients and physiotherapists, impacting shared decision-making and trust.
items.curatedReason: 挪威基层医疗的定性研究显示，AI 驱动的临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 对骨骼肌肉疾病患者和物理治疗师的决策过程有显著影响，提示 AI 工具整合需考量人机交互和信任。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌肉疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对挪威基层医疗中 11 名骨骼肌肉疾病患者和 10 名物理治疗师的定性研究显示，人工智能驱动的临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 显著影响了患者和治疗师的决策过程，凸显了在临床实践中整合此类工具时对人机交互和信任的考量。
items.curatedReasonEn: A qualitative study in Norwegian primary care indicates that AI-driven Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) significantly impact decision-making for musculoskeletal patients and physiotherapists, highlighting the need to consider human-AI interaction and trust during integration.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师），结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (11 patients and 10 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Where physician assistant shortages may deepen by 2038
items.summary: Modern Healthcare reports on areas where physician assistant shortages may worsen by 2038, indicating broader implications for healthcare staffing.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告预测了到 2038 年医师助理 (PA) 短缺可能加剧的区域。虽然直接针对 PA，但这种趋势也暗示了整个医疗人力资源，尤其是康复治疗师等辅助专业人员的潜在短缺，值得你关注。这意味着在这些短缺地区，PT/OT/SLP 的需求和执业机会可能增加。
items.titleZh: 到 2038 年医师助理短缺可能加剧的地区
items.summaryZh: Modern Healthcare 报道，到 2038 年，美国部分地区医师助理 (PA) 的短缺情况可能加剧，这反映了医疗人力资源面临的普遍挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report forecasts regions where physician assistant (PA) shortages may deepen by 2038. While directly addressing PAs, this trend also signals potential shortages across the entire healthcare workforce, including allied health professionals like rehabilitation therapists, which you should monitor. This means demand and practice opportunities for PT/OT/SLP might increase in these shortage areas.

items.title: How hospitals are outpacing rivals in outpatient push
items.summary: Modern Healthcare reports on how hospitals are expanding their outpatient services to outpace competitors, indicating a significant shift in healthcare delivery models.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告分析了医院如何在门诊服务扩展上超越竞争对手，这提示你作为物理治疗师，需要了解行业正在向门诊模式倾斜。这可能为独立的物理治疗诊所带来更多竞争，但也可能创造与大型医疗系统合作的新机遇。
items.titleZh: 医院如何在门诊服务拓展中超越竞争对手
items.summaryZh: Modern Healthcare 报道了医院如何通过拓展门诊服务来超越竞争对手，这反映了医疗服务模式正向门诊化显著转变，对独立诊所和大型医疗系统均构成挑战与机遇。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report analyzes how hospitals are outperforming rivals in outpatient service expansion, signaling to you as a physical therapist that the industry is shifting towards outpatient models. This could intensify competition for independent PT clinics but also create new collaboration opportunities with larger healthcare systems.

items.title: Cognitive strategies for improving activity-level outcomes post stroke: an integrative review.
items.summary: An integrative review identified 40 studies (half RCTs) on cognitive strategy interventions for post-stroke cognitive impairments, focusing on rehabilitation engagement and activity-level outcomes, with interventions delivered from 6 days to 9.5 years post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后认知策略整合性综述，提供了大量证据。如果你管理卒中后认知障碍患者，这份综述系统梳理了现有干预措施，特别是活动水平的改善。请注意，仍有半数研究是非随机对照试验，提示未来需要更多高质量研究。
items.titleZh: 卒中后认知策略对改善活动水平结局的整合性综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项整合性综述发现40项关于卒中后认知障碍的认知策略干预研究（其中20项为RCT），旨在支持康复参与和活动水平结局，干预实施时间为卒中后6天至9.5年。
items.curatedReasonEn: This integrative review on cognitive strategies post-stroke offers substantial evidence. If you manage patients with post-stroke cognitive impairments, this review systematically synthesizes existing interventions, particularly for improving activity-level outcomes. Note that half of the studies were not RCTs, indicating a need for more high-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究中半数为非随机对照试验，证据强度仍有提升空间。
items.limitationEn: Half of the included studies were not randomized controlled trials, suggesting room for stronger evidence.

items.title: Employers' perceptions of supporting an employee's work reintegration following stroke.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored employers' perspectives on supporting employees returning to work after stroke, identifying themes like the role of the vocational rehabilitation team and the importance of knowledge.
items.curatedReason: 雇主对卒中幸存者重返工作岗位的支持，仍然集中在康复团队的协助和对疾病的理解上。你的康复团队如果在工作中能体现出专业性、提供清晰的指导，对患者重返工作会有积极影响。
items.titleZh: 雇主对卒中幸存员工重返工作岗位的支持认知。
items.summaryZh: 本定性研究探讨了雇主在支持卒中幸存员工重返工作岗位时的经验和视角，发现职业康复团队的作用和知识普及是关键主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Employers' support for stroke survivors returning to work still focuses on rehabilitation team assistance and understanding the condition. Your rehab team's professionalism and clear guidance during the process will positively impact patients' work reintegration.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（10位雇主），结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (10 employers), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Epidural versus Transcutaneous Spinal Cord Stimulation for Motor Recovery after Spinal Cord Injury: A Comparative Analysis
items.summary: This comparative analysis investigates epidural versus transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for motor recovery after spinal cord injury, a promising neurostimulation approach.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤后运动恢复，硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激的对比分析，为您提供了新的神经调节干预策略的线索。在考虑这类先进疗法时，要密切关注临床试验进展和安全性数据。
items.titleZh: 硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激在脊髓损伤后运动恢复中的比较分析。
items.summaryZh: 本比较分析探讨了硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激在脊髓损伤后运动功能恢复中的作用，这是一种有前景的神经刺激方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparative analysis of epidural versus transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for motor recovery post-SCI offers insights into novel neuromodulation strategies. Closely monitor clinical trial progress and safety data when considering these advanced therapies.
items.limitation: 这是一篇预印本论文，未经同行评审，结果应谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a preprint and has not undergone peer review; results should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule
items.summary: CMS has released the proposed rule for the Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System, outlining potential changes to reimbursement and policies.

items.titleZh: 阅读更多关于 2027 日历年 (CY) 终末期肾病 (ESRD) 预付款系统拟议规则
