items.curatedReasonEn: The CMS Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule will directly impact reimbursement for renal rehabilitation services. Review these proposals carefully to ensure your facility can adapt to future reimbursement changes and provide timely feedback.

items.title: APTA Combined Sections Meeting
items.summary: The APTA Combined Sections Meeting (CSM) is an annual conference bringing together physical therapy professionals from various specialties to share research, clinical insights, and advancements.
items.curatedReason: APTA CSM 是美国物理治疗领域最重要的年度会议之一，为你提供了了解最新研究、技术和临床实践进展的机会。如果你想跟进前沿信息，务必关注其日程和报告。
items.titleZh: APTA 联合分会年会 (CSM)
items.summaryZh: APTA 联合分会年会 (CSM) 是一项年度盛会，汇集了来自不同专业的物理治疗师，共同分享研究成果、临床见解和行业进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA CSM is one of the most important annual conferences in US physical therapy, offering you an opportunity to learn about the latest research, technologies, and clinical practice advancements. If you aim to stay current, monitor its schedule and reports.

items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [commentary].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper suggests that for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain outcomes beyond home exercise alone.
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，家庭锻炼的疗效不劣于附加的物理治疗或激励性短信。考虑将其作为经济有效的首选方案。
items.titleZh: 评价论文：退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，额外物理治疗或激励短信未超越单纯家庭锻炼的疼痛改善效果 [述评]
items.summaryZh: 这篇评价论文指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，额外增加物理治疗或激励性短信，在疼痛改善方面并未优于单纯的家庭锻炼。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain, home exercise alone is non-inferior to adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages. Consider it a cost-effective primary option.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD patients improves exercise capacity as much as center-based rehabilitation, and health status even more.
items.curatedReason: COPD 患者的移动端肺康复在运动能力方面与中心化康复相当，但在健康状况改善上更优。将移动端康复纳入常规路径，能有效提高依从性和可及性。
items.titleZh: 评价论文：移动端肺康复与中心化肺康复对 COPD 患者的疗效比较：运动能力相当，健康状况更优 [摘要]
items.summaryZh: 这篇评价论文表明，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者，移动端肺康复在运动能力方面的改善与中心化康复相当，且在健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD patients is comparable to center-based rehabilitation in exercise capacity, and superior in health status. Integrate mobile rehabilitation into standard pathways to improve adherence and accessibility.

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This article discusses strategies for promoting client-centered communication in rehabilitation, emphasizing its importance for managing difficult conversations and improving client-clinician relationships and outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 康复治疗中，掌握以客户为中心的沟通策略对于管理复杂对话和情境至关重要。这有助于你维护医患关系，并优化治疗结局。
items.titleZh: 在康复治疗中促进以客户为中心的沟通：管理困难对话的策略
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了在康复治疗中促进以客户为中心的沟通策略，强调其在管理困难对话、改善医患关系和治疗结局方面的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mastering client-centered communication strategies is crucial in rehabilitation for managing complex conversations and situations. This will help you maintain client-clinician relationships and optimize treatment outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The $10M gift that’s helping launch a hospital-at-home program
items.summary: A $10 million gift is helping to launch a hospital-at-home program at Dartmouth Health, signaling significant investment in alternative care models.
items.curatedReason: 一家医疗机构获得千万美元捐赠用于启动“居家医院”项目，这提示了院外康复和居家护理模式日益增长的认可度与资金投入，关注这类模式的拓展机会。
items.titleZh: 千万美元捐赠助力启动居家医院项目
items.summaryZh: 一笔 1000 万美元的捐赠正在帮助达特茅斯健康中心启动一项“居家医院”项目，这标志着对替代护理模式的重大投资。
items.curatedReasonEn: A healthcare organization received a $10M gift to launch a hospital-at-home program, indicating growing recognition and funding for out-of-hospital rehabilitation and home care models. Look for opportunities to expand into these models.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy may provide superior short-term effects on pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome compared to conventional physiotherapy alone.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩单独使用或与传统理疗结合，短期效果可能均优于单纯传统理疗，在疼痛缓解和功能改善上有积极作用。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合传统理疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期疗效：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，对于慢性斜方肌上部肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者，治疗性按摩单独使用或与传统理疗结合，在疼痛、压痛阈、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量方面，短期效果可能优于单纯传统理疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage, either alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, may offer superior short-term effects in pain relief and functional improvement compared to conventional physiotherapy alone.
items.limitation: 本研究的样本量为60人，研究设计为单中心RCT，可能存在局限性且随访期较短。
items.limitationEn: This study has a sample size of 60 participants and is a single-center RCT, which may limit generalizability and has a short follow-up period.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study explored the experiences of 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease (PwP), informing physiotherapy practice and service delivery.
items.curatedReason: 在线团体运动已显示出对帕金森病患者的可行性和益处。作为临床医生，你可以借鉴这篇定性研究中专业人士的经验，优化你的在线康复服务，以更好地满足帕金森病患者的需求。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性访谈研究探讨了10名康复和健身专业人员为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动的经验，为物理治疗实践和服务提供提供信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise has shown feasibility and benefits for people with Parkinson's disease. As a clinician, you can draw from the experiences of professionals in this qualitative study to optimize your online rehabilitation services and better meet the needs of PwP.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具有普遍性，受访者仅为10名专业人员。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its findings are not generalizable, and it only included 10 professionals.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This article highlights the growing prevalence of early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis in young adults and emphasizes the importance of early identification and intervention to potentially alter the disease trajectory.
items.curatedReason: 髋关节骨关节炎的早期识别和干预至关重要。你需要关注年轻患者的早期症状，及时进行评估和治疗，这可能有助于改变疾病进程，避免其发展为重症。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎：一个干预的窗口期。
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章强调了年轻成人早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎的日益流行，并指出早期识别和干预对于潜在改变疾病进程的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early identification and intervention for hip osteoarthritis are crucial. You need to pay attention to early symptoms in younger patients, and timely assessment and treatment may help alter the disease trajectory and prevent progression to severe stages.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点性文章，并非原创研究，主要基于现有文献进行论述。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece, not original research, and primarily discusses based on existing literature.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: July 1, 2026 How Smarter Workflows Strengthen the Entire Revenue Cycle
items.summary: WebPT published a blog post discussing how smarter workflows can strengthen the entire revenue cycle for physical therapy practices.
items.curatedReason: WebPT 的这篇博客讨论了如何通过更智能的工作流程来加强营收周期。在优化诊所运营和财务管理时，你可以从中获取一些启发，提升效率。
items.titleZh: 2026年7月1日：更智能的工作流程如何强化整个营收周期。
items.summaryZh: WebPT发布了一篇博文，讨论了更智能的工作流程如何加强物理治疗实践的整个营收周期。

items.title: Cigna’s CEO vows to put patients first. Wall Street is watching
items.summary: Cigna's CEO vows to prioritize patients, a move that is being closely watched by Wall Street.
items.curatedReason: Cigna 首席执行官的“患者优先”承诺值得关注，这可能预示着未来保险公司的报销政策或服务模式会有调整，康复服务提供者需要保持警惕。
items.titleZh: 信诺 CEO 誓言患者优先，华尔街密切关注
items.summaryZh: Cigna 首席执行官承诺将患者放在首位，这一举动正受到华尔街的密切关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: Cigna CEO's “patients first” vow is noteworthy, potentially signaling shifts in insurer reimbursement policies or service models that rehabilitation providers should monitor.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: A systematic review of 1,548 RCTs found that low-to-middle income countries utilized more generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation lower extremity trials compared to high-income countries, often relying on patient observation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了中低收入国家与高收入国家在卒中康复下肢运动试验中结局指标选择的显著差异。你在跨文化背景下评估研究或设计试验时，需要警惕这种测量偏倚，这会影响结果的可比性和普适性。
items.titleZh: 中低收入国家与高收入国家在卒中康复下肢试验中结局指标利用模式的比较。
items.summaryZh: 一项对1548项RCT的系统综述发现，中低收入国家在卒中康复下肢运动试验中，与高收入国家相比，更多地使用依赖患者观察的、更通用的功能障碍和日常生活活动结局指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals significant differences in outcome measure selection in stroke rehabilitation lower extremity trials between low-to-middle income and high-income countries. When evaluating research or designing trials in cross-cultural contexts, be aware of this measurement bias, which affects comparability and generalizability of results.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的局限性在于其依赖于已发表研究的数据，可能受限于原始研究报告的质量和完整性。
items.limitationEn: The limitation of this systematic review is its reliance on data from published studies, which may be constrained by the quality and completeness of original study reports.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined how six pediatric physiotherapists used focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth for clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, involving 12 client-physiotherapist dyads.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性观察研究首次直接评估了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中运用注意力焦点的情况。了解注意力焦点在远程治疗中的应用有助于你优化远程指导和反馈策略，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中运用注意力焦点进行指导和反馈：一项观察性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了六名儿科物理治疗师在通过远程医疗对神经发育障碍患者进行指导和反馈时如何使用注意力焦点，共涉及12对患者-治疗师。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory observational study is the first to directly assess pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention in telehealth. Understanding how focus of attention is applied in remote therapy can help you optimize telehealth instruction and feedback strategies, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本观察性设计，结果的外推性有限，且不能确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a small-sample observational design with limited generalizability and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Read more about CMS Proposes Updates to Strengthen Medicare Program Integrity, Combat Fraud, and Expand Access to Home Health Care

items.titleZh: CMS 提议更新以加强 Medicare 项目诚信、打击欺诈并扩大居家健康护理可及性

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year (CY) 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule Fact Sheet (CMS-1844-P)
items.summary: CMS has released a fact sheet for the Calendar Year 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule (CMS-1844-P) in the US.
items.curatedReason: CMS 2027 财年居家健康前瞻性支付系统（PPS）的拟议规则将直接影响美国居家物理治疗服务的支付方式和费率。这要求你密切关注这些潜在变化，评估其对诊所收入和运营策略的影响。
items.titleZh: 2027 日历年居家健康前瞻性支付系统拟议规则情况说明书 (CMS-1844-P)
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）发布了 2027 日历年居家健康前瞻性支付系统拟议规则 (CMS-1844-P) 的情况说明书。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS's proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Home Health Prospective Payment System (PPS) will directly impact payment methods and rates for home physical therapy services in the US. This requires you to closely monitor these potential changes and assess their impact on your clinic's revenue and operational strategies.

items.title: CMS proposes 2.4% Medicare pay increase for home health providers
items.summary: CMS proposes a 2.4% increase in Medicare payments for home health agencies in 2027.
items.curatedReason: 美国CMS提议的2.4%Medicare居家康复支付增加，将直接影响你的诊所运营和财务规划。你需要密切关注最终政策，并据此调整业务策略。
items.titleZh: 美国CMS提议2027年提高居家医疗服务提供者Medicare支付2.4%。
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）提议在2027年将居家健康机构的Medicare支付上调2.4%。
items.curatedReasonEn: The proposed 2.4% Medicare pay increase for home health providers by US CMS will directly impact your clinic's operations and financial planning. You need to closely monitor the final policy and adjust your business strategy accordingly.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review of 18 studies on neurological conditions (stroke, spinal cord injury, multiple sclerosis) identified and mapped behavior change theories and techniques in self-management interventions to improve functioning outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述揭示了神经疾病自我管理干预的理论和策略，为你的临床实践提供了现有证据的概览，但强调仍需更多高质量研究。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病中的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容及影响的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖18项研究（包括卒中、脊髓损伤、多发性硬化）的范围综述，识别并梳理了旨在改善神经系统疾病患者功能结果的自我管理干预中的行为改变理论和技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review reveals the theories and strategies behind self-management interventions for neurological disorders, offering an overview of current evidence for your clinical practice, but emphasizes the need for more high-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究数量有限（18项），且涵盖的神经系统疾病类型较为广泛，可能影响其特异性。
items.limitationEn: The limited number of included studies (18) and the broad range of neurological conditions covered may affect specificity.

items.title: Tax-exempt hospitals targeted in bill demanding more disclosure
items.curatedReason: 美国国会一项新法案旨在提高免税医院的透明度。如果获得通过，这将影响到依赖慈善地位来获取联邦资金的医院，并可能影响其服务提供和财务规划，间接波及你所在的执业环境。
items.titleZh: 美国新法案要求免税医院披露更多信息
items.summaryZh: 一项新法案旨在提高美国免税医院的透明度，要求其披露更多信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: A new US bill targets tax-exempt hospitals, demanding more disclosure. If passed, this will impact hospitals relying on charitable status for federal funding, potentially affecting their service provision and financial planning, and indirectly influencing your practice environment.

items.title: Relationship Between Sarcopenia and Intensity-Specific Physical Activity in Older Adults Living in a Rural Area: An Isotemporal Substitution Analysis from the NEIGE Study.
items.summary: This study found that in community-dwelling older adults (n=527), replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity was associated with a lower risk of sarcopenia, using an isotemporal substitution model.
items.curatedReason: 在农村老年人群中，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与更低的肌少症风险相关。建议鼓励老年患者进行强度更高的活动，作为肌少症预防策略的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 农村老年人肌少症与强度特异性身体活动的关系：NEIGE 研究的等时替代分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在社区老年人（n=527）中，使用等时替代模型分析显示，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与较低的肌少症风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity is associated with lower sarcopenia risk in rural older adults. Encourage higher-intensity physical activity in older patients as a key component of sarcopenia prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面观察研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish causality.

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法及需求，强调了这些心理因素在康复规划中的重要性。在制订康复方案时，请务必将其纳入考量，以促进患者的积极参与和依从性。
items.titleZh: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折的老年患者对健康顾虑、跌倒及跌倒恐惧对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling highlight the importance of these psychological factors in rehabilitation planning. Ensure to incorporate them into rehabilitation programs to foster patient engagement and adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients undergoing primary total knee arthroplasty found no significant association between preoperative physiotherapy and improved patient-reported outcomes or pain at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively.
items.curatedReason: 队列研究显示，术前物理治疗与全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局的改善没有显著关联。这提示术前干预的价值可能不如预期，在临床实践中应审慎评估其额外投入。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究发现，接受初次全膝关节置换术的患者中，术前物理治疗与术后 2 个月和 1 年的患者报告结局或疼痛改善无显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study indicates that preoperative physiotherapy is not significantly associated with improved 1-year patient-reported outcomes after total knee arthroplasty. This suggests the value of preoperative interventions may be less than anticipated, and its added cost should be carefully evaluated in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，无法完全排除混杂因素对结局的影响，且研究终点为患者报告结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort study, which cannot fully rule out confounding factors influencing the outcomes, and the primary endpoints are patient-reported outcomes.

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC) Proposed Rule (CMS-1850-P)
items.summary: The CMS has issued its proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC), which will dictate payment policies for these settings.
items.curatedReason: 这是 CMS 针对 2027 财年的门诊医院和门诊手术中心（ASC）支付系统提出的初步规则。密切关注最终规则，因为它将直接影响未来一年这些机构的物理治疗服务报销费率和政策。
items.titleZh: CMS 公布 2027 财年医院门诊支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）拟议规则
items.summaryZh: CMS 公布了 2027 财年医院门诊前瞻性支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）的拟议规则，将影响这些机构的支付政策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is CMS's proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC). Pay close attention to the final rule, as it will directly impact reimbursement rates and policies for physical therapy services in these settings for the coming year.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis, including 25 RCTs, evaluated repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) for Parkinson's disease motor function, finding short-term therapeutic effects but highlighting the need for more research on long-term outcomes and optimal parameters.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 25 项 RCT 的 meta 分析指出重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能有短期改善，但长期效果和最佳参数尚不明确。将其作为辅助手段时，应向患者说明其局限性。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能疗效及调节因素的 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 25 项随机对照试验的 Meta 分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能的影响，发现其有短期治疗效果，但强调需要更多研究来明确长期疗效和最佳参数。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis of 25 RCTs indicates that rTMS offers short-term motor function improvement in Parkinson's disease, but long-term efficacy and optimal parameters are unclear. When using it as an adjunct, inform patients about its limitations.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体效应量和异质性程度，且对长期疗效的证据不足。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific effect sizes or heterogeneity, and evidence for long-term efficacy is insufficient.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers are concurrently associated with physical activity levels, highlighting the complex interplay of these factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究提示，评估肥胖女性的功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍，有助于更全面理解其身体活动水平低的原因，并指导制定个性化干预方案。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与身体活动水平之间存在关联，提示这些因素之间复杂的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity suggests that assessing functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers helps to comprehensively understand reasons for low physical activity and guide personalized interventions.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面，无法确立因果关系；样本量较小（n=85）。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size is relatively small (n=85).
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study classified movement patterns of 23 individuals with stroke passing through narrow openings, identifying stroke-specific patterns distinct from age-matched controls, which involved difficulty rotating the trunk and adjusting the supporting foot.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分类了卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式，有助于临床医师更精细地评估患者的功能受限，并针对性地进行步态和平衡训练。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究对 23 名卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的运动模式进行了分类，识别出与年龄匹配对照组不同的卒中特定模式，主要表现为躯干旋转和支撑足调整困难。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study classified stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings, aiding clinicians in more precise functional assessment and targeted gait and balance training.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（23 名卒中患者），且研究设计为横断面。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is small (23 stroke individuals), and the study design is cross-sectional.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study of 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity in Mexico successfully cross-culturally adapted the PRISM scale into Mexican Spanish and demonstrated its internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应性和初步心理测量学评估表明其具有内部一致性。这将为评估该人群痉挛对生活的影响提供一个患者报告结局工具。
items.titleZh: 用于卒中后痉挛的 PRISM-MX：在墨西哥样本中的跨文化适应和初步心理测量学评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项对墨西哥 30 名卒中后痉挛成人进行的横断面试点研究，成功将 PRISM 量表进行了墨西哥西班牙语的跨文化适应，并证明了其内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary psychometric evaluation of the PRISM-MX scale in Mexican post-stroke spasticity patients show internal consistency, providing a patient-reported outcome measure for assessing the impact of spasticity in this population.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的横断面试点研究，样本量小（n=30），且限于墨西哥卒中人群。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limited to a Mexican stroke population.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional mixed retrospective and prospective study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence, with socioeconomic and cultural factors influencing these rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。在发展中国家执业的 PT 可以参考这些社会经济和文化因素，设计更具可达性的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童物理治疗的早期可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究。
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆一项回顾性与前瞻性混合的横断面研究发现，94 名脑瘫儿童中仅有 38.3% 早期（5 个月前）接受物理治疗并表现出良好依从性，社会经济和文化因素影响了这些比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy in Cameroon. PTs practicing in developing countries can consider these socioeconomic and cultural factors to design more accessible interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为医院回顾性数据和 caregiver 访谈的混合设计，可能存在回忆偏倚；研究结果的外推性受地理和文化背景限制。
items.limitationEn: The study's mixed retrospective design and caregiver interviews may introduce recall bias; generalizability is limited by geographical and cultural context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This commentary highlights loneliness as a significant public health problem, exacerbated by debilitating injuries like spinal cord injury, which can limit social interactions and heighten feelings of isolation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。作为临床 PT，需要关注患者的社会心理健康，在康复方案中考虑如何促进社会参与，减轻孤独感。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章强调孤独感是一个重大的公共卫生问题，脊髓损伤等致残性损伤会加剧孤独感，限制社交互动，加剧隔离感。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores correlates of loneliness in individuals with spinal cord injury. As a clinical PT, you need to address patients' psychosocial well-being and consider how to foster social engagement to mitigate loneliness in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，无法评估因果关系或潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, preventing assessment of causality or potential biases.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Understanding Adult Hip Dysplasia: Clinical Presentation, Assessment Techniques, and Exercise-Driven Management Strategies
items.summary: This paper offers an understanding of adult hip dysplasia, covering clinical presentation, assessment techniques, and exercise-driven management strategies.
items.curatedReason: 成人髋关节发育不良的识别和运动驱动管理是 PT 的重要能力。此文提供了全面的临床表现、评估技术和锻炼策略，有助于你优化诊疗方案。
items.titleZh: 理解成人髋关节发育不良：临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略
items.summaryZh: 本文介绍了成人髋关节发育不良的理解，涵盖其临床表现、评估技术和以运动为主导的管理策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Recognizing and managing adult hip dysplasia with exercise is a crucial PT skill. This article provides comprehensive clinical presentations, assessment techniques, and exercise strategies, helping you optimize your treatment plans.
items.limitation: 本篇为综述性质，其结论基于现有文献的总结，而非新的临床试验数据。
items.limitationEn: As a review, its conclusions are based on a synthesis of existing literature rather than new clinical trial data.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes
items.summary: This article discusses approaches for clinicians to assess and manage perplexing pubic-related groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛的评估和管理是一项挑战。这份综述能帮助你系统性梳理思路，提升鉴别诊断能力。
items.titleZh: 困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了临床医生如何评估和管理运动员中令人困惑的耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes is challenging. This review helps you systematically organize your thoughts and improve differential diagnosis.
items.limitation: 本篇为综述性质，主要基于现有文献进行总结和展望，不涉及原始数据或干预效果的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: As a review, this paper primarily summarizes existing literature and offers perspectives, without presenting original data or quantitative evaluation of intervention effects.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity
items.summary: This article highlights early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis as a critical window of opportunity for intervention.
items.curatedReason: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎是一个治疗机会窗口，早期干预能最大化患者收益。这份文章能帮助你更早识别并启动针对性干预。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状的髋骨关节炎：一个治疗机会窗口
items.summaryZh: 本文强调了早期有症状的髋骨关节炎是一个重要的治疗机会窗口。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis presents a window of opportunity for intervention to maximize patient benefits. This article can help you identify and initiate targeted interventions sooner.
items.limitation: 本篇为综述性质，主要基于现有文献进行总结和展望，不涉及原始数据或干预效果的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: As a review, this paper primarily summarizes existing literature and offers perspectives, without presenting original data or quantitative evaluation of intervention effects.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

related.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting
items.summary: This scoping review examines the content and reporting of exercise in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围性综述系统梳理了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容。它可以帮助你优化康复方案，确保运动处方的全面性和有效性。
items.titleZh: 运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容和报告的范围性综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围性综述探讨了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中运动内容和报告情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically outlines exercise content in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. It can help you optimize rehabilitation programs and ensure comprehensive and effective exercise prescriptions.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围性综述，主要关注文献内容的概括，而非对干预效果的深入分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, primarily focused on summarizing literature content rather than in-depth analysis of intervention efficacy.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Evaluating a 3-Month Physical Impairment and Functional Performance-Based Rehabilitation Program After Hip Arthroscopy for Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome
items.summary: This study evaluated a 3-month physical impairment and functional performance-based rehabilitation program following hip arthroscopy for Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 此研究评估了髋关节镜术后 FAI 综合征的 3 个月康复方案，结果对于术后 PT 方案设计有直接参考价值。你需要了解其关注的功能性表现指标。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）的 3 个月物理损伤和功能表现康复方案评估
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者为期 3 个月的基于物理损伤和功能表现的康复方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study evaluated a 3-month rehabilitation program post-hip arthroscopy for FAI syndrome, offering direct reference for postoperative PT program design. You should pay attention to its functional performance indicators.
items.limitation: 本研究可能缺乏对照组，无法直接评估康复方案的独立有效性，且随访期较短。
items.limitationEn: This study may lack a control group, making it impossible to directly assess the independent effectiveness of the rehabilitation program, and the follow-up period is relatively short.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Lived Experiences and Health Care Perspectives of People With Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome: A Systematic Review of Qualitative Studies
items.summary: This systematic review of qualitative studies explores the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 了解股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的真实生活体验和医疗保健视角，有助于你更好地与患者沟通，制定更具人性化的治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活经历和医疗保健视角：定性研究的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项对定性研究的系统综述探讨了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活经历和医疗保健视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome can help you better communicate with patients and develop more patient-centered treatment plans.
items.limitation: 本系统综述整合的是定性研究，其结论更多是解释性和理解性的，而非量化效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review integrates qualitative studies, making its conclusions more interpretative and descriptive rather than quantitatively assessing effects.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Prevalence of Symphyseal Radiographic Findings and Skeletal Maturity and Their Relationship With Groin Symptoms in PROfessional FEmale Football Players: A Multicenter Cohort Study
items.summary: This multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity, and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现与骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系，能帮助你更精准地评估高风险运动员。
items.titleZh: 职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现和骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现和骨骼成熟度，以及它们与腹股沟症状之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players can help you more accurately assess high-risk athletes.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且其发现可能不完全适用于其他运动项目或非职业运动员。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, it may be subject to confounding factors, and its findings may not be fully generalizable to other sports or non-professional athletes.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Hip Muscle Strength Is Associated With Symptom Severity in People With Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome, but Only in Those With Preexisting Hip Muscle Weakness: A Secondary Analysis of Baseline Data From a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A secondary analysis of an RCT baseline data found that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in FAI Syndrome patients, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
items.curatedReason: 对于 FAI 综合征患者，髋关节肌力与症状严重程度的关联仅在已存在髋肌无力的人群中更明显。这意味着在评估时应更关注基线肌力较弱的患者。
items.titleZh: 髋关节肌力与股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于髋肌无力者：一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析发现，髋关节肌力与股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者的症状严重程度相关，但这种关联仅存在于那些原有髋关节肌肉无力的人群中。
items.curatedReasonEn: For FAI syndrome patients, hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity primarily in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness. This means you should pay more attention to patients with weaker baseline muscle strength during assessment.
items.limitation: 作为随机对照试验的二次分析，其结果受限于原始研究的设计和数据，可能存在未报告的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: As a secondary analysis of an RCT, its results are limited by the original study's design and data, potentially harboring unreported confounding factors.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Amplifying the Work of Emerging Leaders in Hip/Groin Pain Research
items.summary: This editorial highlights and supports the work of emerging leaders in the field of hip/groin pain research.
items.curatedReason: 了解髋/腹股沟疼痛领域的新兴研究者及其工作，有助于发现潜在的合作机会或未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 推动髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领袖的工作
items.summaryZh: 本文旨在突出并支持髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领袖的工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding emerging leaders and their work in hip/groin pain research can help identify potential collaboration opportunities or future research directions.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Could Hip Dysplasia Be the Problem?
items.summary: This editorial asks whether hip dysplasia could be an underlying problem in certain patients.
items.curatedReason: 髋关节发育不良可能是一种被忽视的髋关节问题，你应在鉴别诊断中增加对其的考量。
items.titleZh: 髋关节发育不良会是问题所在吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了髋关节发育不良是否可能是某些患者的潜在问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Hip dysplasia might be an overlooked hip issue; you should consider it more in differential diagnoses.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Effects of electrical stimulation on lower limb function after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a systematic review and network meta-analysis | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A network meta-analysis found that various electrical stimulation modalities combined with rehabilitation exercises improve lower limb function following ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 对于 ACL 重建术后患者，电刺激结合康复训练能显著改善下肢功能。这份网络 Meta 分析为你提供了不同电刺激模式的比较，指导你优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 电刺激对ACL重建术后下肢功能影响的系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式联合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients post-ACL reconstruction, electrical stimulation combined with rehabilitation training significantly improves lower limb function. This network meta-analysis provides a comparison of different electrical stimulation modalities, guiding you to optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 网络 Meta 分析中的间接比较可能存在局限性，需注意异质性。
items.limitationEn: Indirect comparisons in network meta-analysis may have limitations, and heterogeneity needs to be considered.

items.title: Six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a retrospective cohort study - Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: A 6-session non-operative exercise program yielded sustained functional benefits for up to 18 months in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis awaiting total knee arthroplasty, based on a retrospective cohort study.
items.curatedReason: 针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，六次非手术运动方案可带来长达 18 个月的持续益处。这给你与患者和骨科医生讨论保守治疗提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 六次非手术运动方案为终末期膝骨关节炎带来长达18个月的持续益处：回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究表明，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案能提供长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: A six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients awaiting TKR. This provides strong evidence for you to discuss conservative treatment with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在潜在的选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, subject to potential selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Tale of quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL ...
items.summary: A systematic review with longitudinal and multivariable meta-analysis detailed changes in quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述深入分析了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。这为你提供了评估术后恢复和制定力量训练计划的关键证据。
items.titleZh: ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的叙述：一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述，详细探讨了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review with longitudinal and multivariate meta-analysis deeply analyzes changes in quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction. This provides you with critical evidence for evaluating postoperative recovery and developing strength training plans.
items.limitation: Meta分析的异质性可能影响结果的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may affect the general applicability of the results.

items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A German clinical practice guideline (update 3.0) was released for the management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in patients with neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的临床实践指南，重点关注管理和实施。如果你在服务神经科患者，尤其是来自德国或在类似监管环境下执业，这份指南是必备参考。
items.titleZh: 德国神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施临床实践指南更新3.0版
items.summaryZh: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿管理和实施的临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Germany has updated its clinical practice guideline for intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction, focusing on management and implementation. If you serve neurological patients, especially those from Germany or practicing in similar regulatory environments, this guideline is an essential reference.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: Fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation restored motor, sensory, and pelvic function after complete spinal cord transection in an animal model, as reported in PLOS One.
items.curatedReason: 国际团队在动物模型中通过融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。这预示着脊髓损伤的康复突破，虽然仍处于动物实验阶段，但值得密切关注。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法恢复了脊髓完全横断后的功能
items.summaryZh: 国际团队在动物模型中利用融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: An international team has successfully restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models, using fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation. This heralds a breakthrough in spinal cord injury rehabilitation; though still in animal trials, it warrants close attention.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物模型研究，结果能否转化到人体尚不确定。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal model study, and it is uncertain whether the results can be translated to humans.

items.title: Acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases: mechanisms and clinical evidence | European Spine Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A review examined the mechanisms and clinical evidence for acupuncture in postoperative rehabilitation of degenerative lumbar spinal diseases.
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性腰椎疾病术后康复，针灸的作用机制和临床证据正被系统性回顾。这提示你可以关注其作为辅助治疗的潜力，但尚需高水平证据支持。
items.titleZh: 针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制与临床证据
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的作用机制和临床证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acupuncture's mechanisms and clinical evidence for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases are being systematically reviewed. This suggests you can explore its potential as an adjunctive therapy, but higher-level evidence is still needed.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，而非原始研究，证据强度有局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, not an original study, so the evidence strength is limited.

items.title: Urogenital Hiatus Closure System: A Framework for Understanding how Muscle, Motor Control, and Fascial Connections Interact in Normal and Failed Closure
items.summary: A study proposed a Urogenital Hiatus Closure System framework to explain how muscle, motor control, and fascial connections interact in both normal and failed closure.
items.curatedReason: 这份关于泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统的框架性研究，有助于你更深入地理解盆底功能障碍的肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接的相互作用。在评估盆底功能时，应综合考虑这些因素。
items.titleZh: 泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统：理解肌肉、运动控制与筋膜连接在正常和失效闭合中相互作用的框架
items.summaryZh: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以帮助理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常及功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This framework study on the urogenital hiatus closure system helps you gain a deeper understanding of the interaction between muscles, motor control, and fascial connections in pelvic floor dysfunction. When assessing pelvic floor function, these factors should be considered comprehensively.
items.limitation: 这是一项框架性研究，并非干预性试验，没有具体治疗效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework study, not an interventional trial, so there is no specific treatment outcome data.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: A prospective pilot study (NCT05142618) found that functional status after ventral hernia repair, measured by TUG and 5xSTS tests, improved over time but showed limits to improvement.
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。这提示你在术后康复中，应现实地设定患者功能恢复目标，并关注长期功能维持。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态，发现TUG和5xSTS测试评分随时间改善，但存在改善局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limitations. This suggests you should set realistic functional recovery goals for patients during postoperative rehabilitation and focus on long-term functional maintenance.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，长期结果需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with limited sample size and follow-up duration; long-term results require further validation.

items.title: Remotely delivered resistance training program in adult sarcoma survivors: a pilot study | BMC Cancer | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A remotely delivered, supervised progressive resistance training program was feasible for improving physical function in adult sarcoma survivors, based on a single-arm prospective pilot study.
items.curatedReason: 远程监督阻力训练对成人肉瘤幸存者具有可行性，并有望改善其身体功能。这意味着你可以考虑将远程康复模式应用于这类特殊人群，提高治疗可及性。
items.titleZh: 远程递送阻力训练项目对成人肉瘤幸存者的试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂、前瞻性试点研究评估了远程监督阻力训练计划对成人肉瘤幸存者身体功能改善的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Remotely supervised resistance training is feasible for adult sarcoma survivors and shows promise in improving physical functioning. This means you can consider applying remote rehabilitation models to this special population to improve treatment accessibility.
items.limitation: 这是一项单臂、前瞻性研究，缺乏对照组，无法排除安慰剂效应。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm, pre-post study lacking a control group, thus unable to rule out placebo effects.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury: individual neurophysiological and clinical responses | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: Individual neurophysiological and clinical responses varied when pairing transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in patients with chronic stroke and spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 此研究结合了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练，提示了慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者个体化神经生理和临床反应的潜力。这为你在神经康复中整合先进技术提供了思路。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤中的个体神经生理和临床反应
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中引发的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, combining transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training, highlights the potential for individualized neurophysiological and clinical responses in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury patients. This provides insight into integrating advanced technologies into your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 研究关注个体化反应，可能样本量较小，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on individualized responses, potentially involving a small sample size, so the generalizability of the results should be considered cautiously.

items.title: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management: integrating network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: Integrating network analysis and in silico intervention identified subgroup-specific targets for personalizing post-stroke symptom management.
items.curatedReason: 利用网络分析和体内干预个性化卒中后症状管理，识别亚组特异性靶点。这意味着你可以根据患者的症状交互模式，更精准地制定个体化康复方案，提升疗效。
items.titleZh: 个性化卒中后症状管理：整合网络分析和体内干预以识别亚组特异性靶点
items.summaryZh: 一项研究结合网络分析与体内干预，旨在通过识别亚组特异性靶点来个性化卒中后症状管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management using network analysis and in silico interventions to identify subgroup-specific targets. This means you can tailor individualized rehabilitation plans more precisely based on patients' symptom interaction patterns, improving treatment effectiveness.
items.limitation: 这项研究是利用网络分析和体内干预的计算模型，尚未经过大规模临床验证。
items.limitationEn: This study uses computational models from network analysis and in silico interventions, which have not yet undergone large-scale clinical validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation technologies perceived positively by patients and facilitated intensive therapy within sessions
items.summary: Patients in an Australian inpatient rehabilitation setting perceived rehabilitation technologies positively, and the technologies helped facilitate intensive therapy within sessions, a multi-method study found.
items.curatedReason: 患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术能促进会话内的高强度治疗。这意味着你可以放心地将这些康复技术整合到日常实践中，以提高治疗效果和患者参与度。
items.titleZh: 患者积极看待康复技术，并有助于促进会话内高强度治疗
items.summaryZh: 一项研究显示，患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术有助于在治疗会话中促进高强度治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients generally have a positive attitude towards rehabilitation technologies, and these technologies can facilitate intensive therapy within sessions. This means you can confidently integrate these rehabilitation technologies into your daily practice to improve treatment outcomes and patient engagement.
items.limitation: 这是一项多方法研究，定性部分可能受访者偏倚影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a mixed-methods study, and the qualitative portion may be affected by respondent bias.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: A comparative Bayesian network analysis revealed directional symptom dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease.
items.curatedReason: 比较性贝叶斯网络分析揭示了多发性硬化症和帕金森病症状之间的方向性依赖关系。这为你理解两种疾病的症状复杂性提供了新视角，有助于更精准地设计个体化干预。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症和帕金森病的症状方向性依赖性：比较性贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析揭示了多发性硬化症与帕金森病症状间的方向性依赖关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: Comparative Bayesian network analysis reveals directional symptom dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease. This provides a new perspective for you to understand the symptom complexity of both diseases, aiding in more precise individualized intervention design.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络分析是统计模型，其因果推断可能受数据质量和模型假设限制。
items.limitationEn: Bayesian network analysis is a statistical model, and its causal inferences may be limited by data quality and model assumptions.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A scoping review examined exercise content and reporting in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复的范围审查提供了运动内容和报告的概览。这帮助你了解当前康复策略的广度和局限性，指导你为运动员制定更全面的治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复：运动内容与报告的范围审查
items.summaryZh: 一篇范围性综述审查了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复、运动内容和报告情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: A scoping review of rehabilitation for long-standing groin pain in athletes provides an overview of exercise content and reporting. This helps you understand the breadth and limitations of current rehabilitation strategies, guiding you in developing more comprehensive treatment plans for athletes.
items.limitation: 这是一篇范围性综述，主要侧重于文献的概览，不提供具体的治疗效果或推荐等级。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, primarily focusing on an overview of the literature, and does not provide specific treatment effects or recommendation grades.

items.title: Can the Effects of Exercise Therapy on Achilles Tendinopathy Be Enhanced by Adding Nutritional Advice-A Randomized Controlled Pilot Study
items.summary: An RCT pilot study investigated whether adding nutritional advice could enhance the effects of exercise therapy on Achilles tendinopathy.
items.curatedReason: 此试点研究提示营养建议可能与运动疗法对跟腱病有协同作用。但结果尚属初步，不要作为常规推荐，等待更大规模研究确认。
items.titleZh: 营养建议能否增强运动疗法对跟腱病疗效的随机对照试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试点研究正在探究营养建议能否提升运动疗法对跟腱病的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study suggests that nutritional advice might synergize with exercise therapy for Achilles tendinopathy. However, the results are preliminary; do not make it a routine recommendation. Await confirmation from larger-scale studies.
items.limitation: 这是一项随机对照的试点研究，样本量和外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled pilot study, so sample size and generalizability may be limited.

items.title: Effect of 12-week dynamic stretching of hamstrings on joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 12-week dynamic stretching program for the hamstrings improved joint flexibility and altered musculoskeletal properties compared to the non-stretched limb.
items.curatedReason: 12周的襻绳肌动态拉伸可改善关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性。这支持你将动态拉伸纳入襻绳肌柔韧性改善的训练计划中。
items.titleZh: 12周腘绳肌动态拉伸对关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究旨在评估12周腘绳肌动态拉伸计划对关节柔韧性、肌肉力量及肌肉骨骼特性的影响，并与未拉伸肢体进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week dynamic hamstring stretching program can improve joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties. This supports incorporating dynamic stretching into your hamstring flexibility training programs.
items.limitation: 该研究缺乏对照组，无法排除其他因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: This study lacks a control group, making it impossible to rule out the influence of other factors.

items.title: BMJ Rapid Recommendations
items.summary: BMJ and MAGIC have launched the Rapid Recommendations project to accelerate the translation of research evidence into clinical practice by providing trustworthy recommendations that answer important clinical questions quickly and transparently.
items.curatedReason: 《英国医学杂志》的快速推荐旨在加速研究证据转化为临床实践。这是一个有用的资源，为你提供了及时、值得信赖的最新临床指南。
items.titleZh: 《英国医学杂志》快速推荐：加速证据转化实践
items.summaryZh: 《英国医学杂志》与 MAGIC 合作推出“快速推荐”项目，旨在通过可信赖的推荐，加速研究证据向临床实践的转化。
items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ Rapid Recommendations aim to accelerate the translation of research evidence into clinical practice. This is a useful resource for timely, trustworthy, and up-to-date clinical guidelines.

items.title: Extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation: a conceptual review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A conceptual review found that the extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation is being increasingly recognized as an effective treatment for vertebrogenic chronic axial low back pain, based on analysis of anatomical, biomechanical, and safety considerations.
items.curatedReason: 椎基底神经射频消融术的椎弓根外入路是一种新兴的治疗 vertebrogenic 腰痛的方法。了解其解剖学和生物力学考虑，有助于你为患者提供更全面的咨询。
items.titleZh: 椎基底神经射频消融术的椎弓根外入路：概念性综述
items.summaryZh: 一篇概念性综述分析了椎基底神经射频消融术椎弓根外入路的解剖、生物力学和安全考量，该技术被认为是治疗椎体源性慢性轴性腰痛的有效方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The extrapedicular approach for basivertebral nerve radiofrequency ablation is an emerging treatment for vertebrogenic low back pain. Understanding its anatomical and biomechanical considerations will help you provide more comprehensive consultations to patients.
items.limitation: 这是一篇概念性综述，缺乏原创临床数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a conceptual review, lacking original clinical data.

items.title: Histological study to assess CO2 laser therapy for the treatment of vaginal atrophy - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A histological study found that vaginal CO2 laser therapy improved clinical symptoms of vaginal atrophy but did not produce significant histological changes.
items.curatedReason: CO2激光疗法在改善阴道萎缩症状方面表现出积极效果，但组织学上未见显著改变。这意味着症状改善可能不完全通过结构性变化，你需要将其告知患者，并评估结合物理治疗的可能性。
items.titleZh: 评估CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的组织学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项组织学研究评估CO2激光疗法治疗阴道萎缩的有效性，发现症状有所改善但组织学无显著变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: CO2 laser therapy shows positive effects in improving symptoms of vaginal atrophy, but without significant histological changes. This means symptom improvement may not be solely through structural changes; you need to inform patients and evaluate the possibility of combining it with physical therapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为组织学研究，未能提供功能性康复结局的全面评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a histological study and does not provide a comprehensive evaluation of functional rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A study proposed ChainBMD, a deep learning framework that uses kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis for stroke evaluation and guidance.
items.curatedReason: ChainBMD是一个基于深度学习的卒中评估和指导框架，利用运动链图和时间分析。这意味着你可以关注AI在辅助卒中康复评估和训练指导中的应用潜力，提高效率和客观性。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于运动链图和时间分析的卒中评估与指导深度学习框架
items.summaryZh: 一项研究提出了ChainBMD，一个利用运动链图和时间分析进行卒中评估与指导的深度学习框架。
items.curatedReasonEn: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis. This means you can focus on the potential of AI in assisting stroke rehabilitation assessment and training guidance, improving efficiency and objectivity.
items.limitation: 这是一项深度学习框架研究，可能需要更多的临床验证才能实际应用。
items.limitationEn: This is a deep learning framework study, which may require further clinical validation for practical application.

items.title: Stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD): technical insights and long-term outcomes | The Egyptian Journal of Neurology, Psychiatry and Neurosurgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study on stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson's disease reported on the technical insights and long-term outcomes, with the primary goal of improving motor symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 帕金森病患者的立体定向消融术在改善运动症状方面显示出技术可行性和长期疗效。虽然这是外科干预，但你可以从中了解患者术后的康复潜力，并为术后康复方案的制定提供参考。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者立体定向消融术：技术洞察与长期疗效
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了帕金森病患者立体定向消融术的技术细节和长期疗效，以改善运动症状为主要目标。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stereotactic ablation for Parkinson's disease patients shows technical feasibility and long-term efficacy in improving motor symptoms. While this is a surgical intervention, you can learn about the potential for postoperative rehabilitation and use it as a reference for developing postoperative rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究关注外科技术，非物理治疗干预，与物理治疗临床实践关联性较弱。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on surgical techniques, not physical therapy interventions, and has weaker relevance to physical therapy clinical practice.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A study found that branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis.
items.curatedReason: 支链氨基酸通过肠道丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴来减轻帕金森神经退行性变。这提示了营养干预在帕金森病管理中的潜在作用，你可以关注肠道-脑轴对康复的影响。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴减轻帕金森神经退行性变
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性恢复PI3K/Akt/mTORC1轴，可减轻帕金森神经退行性变。
items.curatedReasonEn: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration by microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis. This suggests a potential role for nutritional interventions in Parkinson's disease management; you can pay attention to the gut-brain axis's impact on rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，可能是在动物模型或细胞层面进行，临床转化尚需验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, likely conducted at the animal or cellular level, and clinical translation requires further validation.

items.title: [Relationship between the consistency of auxiliary provocation tests with the supine roll test and treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo]
items.summary: A study investigated the relationship between the consistency of auxiliary provocation tests with the supine roll test and treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal benign paroxysmal positional vertigo.
items.curatedReason: 辅助诱发试验与仰卧滚转试验的一致性可能与水平半规管BPPV的治疗效果相关。这意味着在诊断和治疗这类眩晕时，评估试验的一致性可能是指导治疗和预判疗效的重要指标。
items.titleZh: 辅助诱发试验与仰卧滚转试验一致性与水平半规管BPPV治疗结局的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了辅助诱发试验与仰卧滚转试验的一致性，与水平半规管BPPV治疗结局间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: The consistency between auxiliary provocation tests and the supine roll test may be related to the treatment outcomes for horizontal semicircular canal BPPV. This means that when diagnosing and treating this type of vertigo, assessing test consistency could be an important indicator for guiding treatment and predicting efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究标题未明确说明研究设计，无法判断证据等级。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not clearly stated in the title, so the level of evidence cannot be determined.

items.title: The IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with the electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke | Chinese Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study found that IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke.
items.curatedReason: IL-17A调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关。这进一步阐明了电针治疗卒中的神经免疫机制，你可以关注其在临床实践中的应用潜力。
items.titleZh: IL-17A调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，IL-17A调节的星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity is associated with electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke. This further elucidates the neuroimmune mechanisms of electroacupuncture in stroke treatment; you can focus on its potential application in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 该研究可能是动物实验，临床转化仍需验证。
items.limitationEn: This study may be an animal experiment, and clinical translation still needs to be verified.

items.title: Uterine exteriorization versus in-situ uterine repair during cesarean delivery: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials - ScienceDirect
items.summary: Uterine exteriorization during cesarean delivery shows comparable outcomes to in-situ repair, based on a systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析比较了剖宫产中子宫外置修复与原位修复的效果。虽然与物理治疗直接相关性较低，但对产后康复的整体理解有辅助作用。
items.titleZh: 剖宫产中子宫外置修复与原位修复的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的系统综述和 Meta 分析，比较了剖宫产中子宫外置修复与原位修复的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis compares uterine exteriorization versus in-situ repair during cesarean delivery. While less directly relevant to physical therapy, it aids a broader understanding of postpartum recovery.
items.limitation: 该系统综述关注外科技术，非物理治疗干预，与物理治疗临床实践关联性较弱。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review focuses on surgical techniques, not physical therapy interventions, and has weaker relevance to physical therapy clinical practice.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: The Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) demonstrates adequate psychometric properties for assessing trunk control after stroke, though evidence quality is limited, according to a systematic review using COSMIN methodology.
items.curatedReason: TIS 在卒中康复中是可靠且有效的躯干功能评估工具，但要注意其在特定人群或语境下的局限性。结合 COSMIN 方法学，这篇综述为你的临床选择提供了高级别证据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表的心理测量属性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项运用COSMIN方法学的系统综述，评估了躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 在卒中患者中的心理测量属性，为该工具在卒中康复中的应用提供了证据质量和确定性评级。
items.curatedReasonEn: TIS is a reliable and valid trunk function assessment tool in stroke rehabilitation, but be aware of its limitations in specific populations or contexts. This review, utilizing COSMIN methodology, provides high-level evidence for your clinical choice.
items.limitation: 尽管评估了证据质量，但综述本身并未报告合并效应量或具体心理测量属性的数值，因此需要查阅原始研究以获取详细数据。
items.limitationEn: While evidence quality was assessed, the review itself did not report pooled effect sizes or specific psychometric property values, requiring consultation of original studies for detailed data.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: Preoperative sarcopenia significantly increased the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration (ASD) within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF) in a retrospective cohort of 333 adult patients.
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症是3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这提示术前肌少症评估和干预可能有助于改善长期预后。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，在333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术的患者中，术前存在肌少症会显著增加术后3年内发生邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF). Preoperative sarcopenia assessment and intervention may improve long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且主要结局为影像学上的邻近节段退变，其临床意义需要进一步研究确认。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, potentially subject to confounding factors and selection bias, and its primary outcome is radiographic adjacent segment degeneration, whose clinical significance requires further confirmation.

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: The WHO global rehabilitation indicators represent a vital shift from counting disease to measuring functioning and lives lived with quality and dignity,1 and to ensuring rehabilitation is an essentia
items.curatedReason: WHO 呼吁在全球范围内将康复作为基本医疗服务，而非奢侈品，并且要投资于人而不是仅仅关注设备。这意味着，我们物理治疗师作为康复专业人士，在医疗系统中的重要性将持续提升，你应当积极关注政策动向。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 世界卫生组织（WHO）的全球康复指标标志着从关注疾病到衡量功能和生活质量的转变，并呼吁康复应成为医疗保健的必要组成部分，而非附加奢侈品，强调投资于康复专业人才而非仅是设备。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WHO advocates for rehabilitation as an essential healthcare service globally, not a luxury, emphasizing investment in people over devices. This means physical therapists, as rehabilitation professionals, will see their importance in healthcare systems grow; you should actively monitor policy developments.

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study
items.summary: Moderate-to-severe neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis (MS) is linked to specific clinical factors and is associated with bladder dysfunction, based on a multicenter study.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症（MS）患者的神经源性肠道功能障碍与膀胱功能障碍密切相关。这意味着在评估和管理MS患者时，你需要同时关注肠道和膀胱功能，并采取综合康复策略。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症的神经源性肠道功能障碍：多中心研究中的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联
items.summaryZh: 本多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症患者中神经源性肠道功能障碍的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis (MS) patients is closely linked to bladder dysfunction. This means you need to address both bowel and bladder function during assessment and management of MS patients, adopting comprehensive rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 摘要仅说明研究目的，未提供具体样本量、研究设计、结局指标或结果数据，因此无法评估其研究质量和潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: The abstract only states the study's aim without providing specific sample size, study design, outcome measures, or results, thus precluding an assessment of its quality and potential impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Health Literacy During Inpatient Rehabilitation and Its Association with One-Year Health and Functional Outcomes in Individuals with Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: Limited health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation is associated with poorer 1-year health and functional outcomes in individuals with traumatic spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 在创伤性脊髓损伤（SCI）住院康复期间，健康素养水平低的患者在一年后的健康和功能结局更差。评估患者的健康素养，并提供适当的教育支持，对于优化康复效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 住院康复期间健康素养与创伤性脊髓损伤患者一年后健康和功能结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间健康素养的普遍性及影响因素，并探讨其与一年后较差的健康和功能结局之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with low health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation for traumatic spinal cord injury (SCI) have poorer health and functional outcomes at one year. Assessing health literacy and providing appropriate educational support is crucial for optimizing rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项旨在评估关联性的研究，不能确立因果关系；且只关注了住院康复期间的健康素养，可能未能捕捉其动态变化或更广泛的社会决定因素。
items.limitationEn: This study aims to assess associations, not establish causality; it focuses solely on health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation, potentially missing dynamic changes or broader social determinants.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (N=72) found that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（如 Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对机构养老的老年肌少症患者在身体、心理和社会功能上均有益。你可以考虑将此类互动性游戏纳入老年康复方案，作为提升多领域结局的有效工具。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 72 名机构养老老年肌少症患者的准实验研究发现，为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（任天堂 Switch 健身环大冒险）显著改善了患者的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention (e.g., Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) benefits institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia across physical, psychological, and social outcomes. You can consider integrating such interactive games into geriatric rehabilitation programs as an effective tool for improving multi-domain outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，缺乏随机化，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental design lacking randomization, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: This RCT found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists (APP role) and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊场景中，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在骨科诊断、治疗及出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。这意味着在骨骼肌肉疾病的早期管理中，物理治疗师可以承担更重要的角色，减轻急诊压力。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌肉功能障碍诊断与治疗一线方案：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验发现，在急诊科处理非紧急骨骼肌肉疾病时，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: In the ED, advanced practice physiotherapists (APPs) showed high agreement with senior physicians on musculoskeletal diagnoses, treatments, and discharge decisions, mirroring resident physicians. This supports expanding the PT's role in early MSK management within emergency settings to alleviate ED burden.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social/environmental), to standardize assessment in practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）的开发，能帮助儿科物理治疗师在日常实践、研究和质量评估中更标准化地评估疗效。未来可期待其推广应用，提升儿科PT的循证实践水平。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了一套包含九个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs），分为三个领域（功能、整体健康和社会/环境），旨在标准化儿科物理治疗在实践、研究和质量评估中的疗效评估。
items.limitation: PROs 和 PROMs 的开发是一个复杂过程，其最终的临床实用性和心理测量学特性仍需在不同人群中进行广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The development of PROs and PROMs is a complex process, and their ultimate clinical utility and psychometric properties still require extensive validation across diverse populations.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT involving 30 chronic stroke patients found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function, offering a potential tool for long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 这款动态腕手牵伸器械在慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛管理上，显示出改善痉挛和手功能潜能，为需要居家长期管理又缺乏监督的患者提供了新工具。可以开始关注同类器械的临床验证与可及性。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸器械改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入30名慢性卒中患者的初步随机对照试验发现，一款新型动态腕手牵伸器械能改善屈肌痉挛并提升手功能，为长期管理提供了潜在工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows potential in managing flexor spasticity and improving hand function in chronic stroke patients, offering a new tool for those requiring long-term home management with minimal supervision. Start monitoring the clinical validation and availability of similar devices.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的初步随机对照试验，结果可能无法完全推广至更广泛的卒中人群，且长期效果有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a small sample size, so the results may not be fully generalizable to a broader stroke population, and long-term efficacy needs further validation.

items.title: Role of Platelet-Rich Plasma Injection in Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
items.summary: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials investigated the role of platelet-rich plasma injection in anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析评估了富血小板血浆（PRP）注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用。结果提示 PRP 可能并非 ACL 重建术后的常规辅助方案。你在康复计划中应优先考虑成熟的运动疗法，对 PRP 的推荐需持谨慎态度。
items.titleZh: 富血小板血浆注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用：一项随机对照试验的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的荟萃分析研究了富血小板血浆注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis evaluated the role of platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection in anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction. The results suggest that PRP may not be a routine adjunctive therapy after ACL reconstruction. You should prioritize established exercise therapies in your rehabilitation plans and be cautious when recommending PRP.
items.limitation: 未提及具体纳入 RCT 的数量和样本量，可能影响结论的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: The specific number and sample size of included RCTs were not mentioned, which may affect the robustness of the conclusions.

items.title: Personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women - European Journal of Applied Physiology
items.summary: This research found that personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improved multisystem function in overweight and obese older women.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，个性化血流限制（BFR）训练在不同血管阻力压力下能改善超重和肥胖老年女性的多系统功能。你可以将 BFR 视为老年患者，特别是衰弱或超重老年女性，力量和功能训练的有效辅助手段，但务必在专业指导下个性化设置阻力。
items.titleZh: 个性化血流限制训练在超重和肥胖老年女性中改善多系统功能
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，个性化血流限制训练在不同阻力压力下能够改善超重和肥胖老年女性的多系统功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that personalized blood flow restriction (BFR) training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women. You can consider BFR an effective adjunct for strength and functional training in elderly patients, especially frail or overweight older women, but ensure personalized resistance settings under professional guidance.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于超重和肥胖的老年女性，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to overweight and obese older women, and the results may not be applicable to other populations.

items.title: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain from a multispecialty international working group
items.summary: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain were developed by a multispecialty international working group.
items.curatedReason: 这份多专业国际工作组发布的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识指南，虽然发表于多年前，但其更新可能具有长期参考价值。你可以将此作为评估和管理慢性颈痛的权威参考，尤其是对那些复杂或难治性病例。
items.titleZh: 多专业国际工作组发布的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识实践指南
items.summaryZh: 一份由多专业国际工作组制定的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识实践指南已经发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus practice guideline on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain from a multispecialty international working group, though published several years ago, may still have long-term relevance. You can use this as an authoritative reference for assessing and managing chronic neck pain, especially for complex or refractory cases.
items.limitation: 虽然是共识指南，但具体证据等级未明确，需要审慎解读其推荐强度。
items.limitationEn: Although it is a consensus guideline, the specific evidence grades are not clearly stated, requiring careful interpretation of its recommendation strength.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: A systematic review evaluated the efficacy and outcomes of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis/avascular necrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome, and bone marrow edema syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）治疗骨病（如骨折、骨坏死、应力性骨损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征）的疗效。你可以将此作为冲击波干预这些骨病的证据参考，但要注意其在特定病理上的证据强度。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法在骨病管理中的应用：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病管理中的疗效和结局，包括骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力性损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征和骨髓水肿综合征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluated the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies (e.g., fractures, osteonecrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome). You can use this as evidence for shockwave interventions in these bone conditions, but be mindful of the evidence strength for specific pathologies.
items.limitation: 综述纳入了多种研究设计，可能导致证据异质性较高，无法对所有适应症给出统一的强度结论。
items.limitationEn: The review included various study designs, potentially leading to high heterogeneity of evidence and preventing uniform strong conclusions for all indications.

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A viewpoint article discussed how clinicians might approach assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇观点文章探讨了临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。你可以将文中提供的评估框架和管理思路作为你处理复杂耻骨疼痛患者的参考，尤其是对于鉴别诊断和多学科协作方面。
items.titleZh: 令人困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 一篇观点文章探讨了临床医生应如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This viewpoint article discusses how clinicians might approach assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes. You can use the assessment framework and management strategies provided in the article as a reference for handling complex pubic pain patients, especially regarding differential diagnosis and multidisciplinary collaboration.
items.limitation: 作为观点文章，其内容基于专家共识而非系统性证据，需要结合其他高质量研究进行临床决策。
items.limitationEn: As a viewpoint article, its content is based on expert consensus rather than systematic evidence, requiring integration with other high-quality research for clinical decision-making.

items.title: Sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents: A meta-analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A meta-analysis examined sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析揭示了儿童和青少年在坐位体前屈柔韧性方面的性别差异。你可以在评估儿童和青少年的柔韧性时，将这些性别差异纳入考虑，以提供更具个体化的运动表现和损伤预防建议。
items.titleZh: 儿童和青少年坐位体前屈柔韧性的性别差异：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃分析研究了儿童和青少年坐位体前屈柔韧性方面的性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reveals sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents. You can incorporate these sex differences when assessing flexibility in children and adolescents to provide more individualized recommendations for athletic performance and injury prevention.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的结果可能受纳入研究异质性的影响，需要审慎解读其普适性。
items.limitationEn: The results of the meta-analysis may be influenced by the heterogeneity of the included studies, requiring careful interpretation of their generalizability.

items.title: Associations between nutritional risk indices and fall history in older adults: a retrospective cross-sectional study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A retrospective cross-sectional study found associations between nutritional risk indices and fall history in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性横断面研究发现营养风险指数与老年人跌倒史之间存在关联。这意味着你在评估老年患者跌倒风险时，需要将营养状况纳入考量，并与营养师协作，提供更全面的预防策略。
items.titleZh: 营养风险指数与老年人跌倒史的关联：一项回顾性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性横断面研究发现，老年人的营养风险指数与跌倒史之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cross-sectional study found an association between nutritional risk indices and a history of falls in older adults.
