This implies that when assessing fall risk in elderly patients, you need to consider nutritional status and collaborate with dietitians to provide more comprehensive prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性横断面研究，不能建立因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality and may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline: an 8-year cohort study of locomotive syndrome | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: An 8-year cohort study investigated exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline in locomotive syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 8 年队列研究分析了运动、日常身体活动与机能综合征移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率。该研究强调了身体活动对老年人移动能力维护的重要性，进一步强化了你推广运动干预作为预防衰弱的核心手段的证据。
items.titleZh: 运动、日常身体活动与移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率：一项机能综合征的 8 年队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 8 年的队列研究调查了运动、日常身体活动与机能综合征中移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 8-year cohort study analyzed the age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline in locomotive syndrome, considering exercise and daily physical activity. This study underscores the importance of physical activity for maintaining mobility in older adults, further strengthening the evidence for promoting exercise interventions as a core strategy to prevent frailty.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，虽然观察时间长，但仍可能存在未测量混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, although the observation period is long, unmeasured confounding factors may still influence the results.

items.title: Abdominal Aortic Calcification on Lumbar X-rays Predicts Hip Fracture Risk: Study Reveals
items.summary: A study found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) visible on routine lumbar spine X-rays is significantly associated with an increased risk of hip fractures in older adults, with an AAC score of 5 or higher strongly linked to fracture occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，腰椎 X 光片上的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）可预测髋部骨折风险。你可以将 AAC 评分作为评估老年患者骨折风险的一个额外影像学指标，尤其是在常规腰椎检查中顺带发现时，及时转诊至骨科或老年科进行干预。
items.titleZh: 研究揭示：腰椎 X 光片上的腹主动脉钙化可预测髋部骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，常规腰椎 X 光片上可见的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）与老年人髋部骨折风险显著相关，AAC 评分 5 分或更高与骨折发生率密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) on lumbar X-rays predicts hip fracture risk. You can use AAC scores as an additional imaging indicator when assessing fracture risk in elderly patients, especially when incidentally found during routine lumbar spine examinations, to facilitate timely referral to orthopedics or geriatrics for intervention.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系，且研究仅限于日本患者，结果可能存在地域差异。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality, and the study was limited to Japanese patients, so the results may have regional differences.

items.title: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone for the treatment of vulvovaginal atrophy: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis assessed the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗外阴阴道萎缩的疗效。虽然 DHEA 主要是药物治疗，但了解其疗效背景有助于你更全面地评估患者状况，并与主治医师讨论联合治疗方案，尤其是在物理治疗辅助手段不佳时。
items.titleZh: 阴道内脱氢表雄酮治疗外阴阴道萎缩：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了绝经后女性使用阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗外阴阴道萎缩的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy. While DHEA is primarily a pharmaceutical treatment, understanding its efficacy context helps you comprehensively assess patient conditions and discuss combination therapies with primary physicians, especially when physical therapy alone is insufficient.
items.limitation: 综述未提供具体纳入研究的数量和患者样本量，限制了结论的精确性。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide the specific number of included studies and patient sample sizes, limiting the precision of the conclusions.

items.title: Prevalence of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome and related hip morphologies, and its developmental dose-response relationship in professional female football players: a multicentre cohort study (PROFE)
items.summary: A multicentre cohort study investigated the prevalence of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome and related hip morphologies, and its developmental dose-response relationship in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）及其相关髋部形态的患病率和发育剂量-反应关系。你可以将这些数据作为评估和预防女性运动员 FAI 的参考，尤其是在早期识别风险和制定针对性训练计划时。
items.titleZh: 多中心队列研究：职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征及相关髋部形态的患病率和发育剂量-反应关系
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征及其相关髋部形态的患病率，以及其发育剂量-反应关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicentre cohort study investigated the prevalence and developmental dose-response relationship of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) and related hip morphologies in professional female football players. You can use these data as a reference for assessing and preventing FAI in female athletes, especially in early risk identification and targeted training program development.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受到混杂因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, it cannot establish causality, and the results may be influenced by confounding factors.

items.summary: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial of the Baby HABIT-ILE intervention in infants aged 6–18 months with unilateral cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项针对 6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿的 Baby HABIT-ILE 干预随机对照试验的研究方案。你可以关注这类早期干预方案的设计思路和预期结果，这对于了解脑瘫儿童的早期康复策略至关重要。
items.titleZh: Baby HABIT-ILE 干预：6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿随机对照试验研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这是一项针对 6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿的 Baby HABIT-ILE 干预随机对照试验的研究方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial of Baby HABIT-ILE intervention in infants aged 6–18 months with unilateral cerebral palsy. You can pay attention to the design ideas and expected results of such early intervention programs, which are crucial for understanding early rehabilitation strategies for children with cerebral palsy.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布最终结果，因此不能提供实际的临床证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and the final results have not yet been published, so it cannot provide actual clinical evidence.

items.title: Beyond skills: Reimagining clinical education for a transformative future | Myezwa | South African Journal of Physiotherapy
items.summary: This editorial discusses reimagining clinical education for a transformative future in physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论呼吁重新构想物理治疗临床教育，超越单纯技能培养，迈向变革性未来。你可以将这篇评论视为对行业教育改革的最新思考，关注其提出的理念如何影响你或你所在机构的 PT 教育实践。
items.titleZh: 超越技能：重新构想物理治疗临床教育，迈向变革性未来
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了重新构想物理治疗临床教育，以迈向变革性未来的议题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial calls for reimagining physiotherapy clinical education beyond mere skill development, towards a transformative future. You can view this commentary as the latest thinking on industry education reform, focusing on how its proposed ideas might influence your or your institution's PT education practices.
items.limitation: 作为社论，其观点不基于系统性证据，旨在引发讨论和思考，不提供具体临床干预指导。
items.limitationEn: As an editorial, its views are not based on systematic evidence and are intended to provoke discussion and thought, not to provide specific clinical intervention guidance.

items.title: Piloting a Tier 1 Strength-Based Parent Education Play Program: Promoting Play Within the Family Context
items.summary: A pilot, mixed-methods group, pre-post study assessed the effectiveness of a Tier 1 strength-based play program on parents' ability to support their child's play and build parental sense of competence.
items.curatedReason: 这项试点研究评估了以优势为基础的亲子教育游戏项目对父母支持孩子游戏能力和提升父母胜任感的效果。你可以参考这种以家庭为中心的早期干预模式，将其融入你的儿科物理治疗实践中，以增强家庭参与和赋能。
items.titleZh: 试点一项基于优势的亲子教育游戏项目：促进家庭环境中的游戏
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法组前瞻性试点研究评估了分级制（Tier 1）优势导向游戏项目对父母支持孩子游戏能力和提升父母胜任感的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study assessed the effectiveness of a Tier 1 strength-based parent education play program on parents' ability to support their child's play and build parental sense of competence. You can refer to this family-centered early intervention model and integrate it into your pediatric physical therapy practice to enhance family engagement and empowerment.
items.limitation: 作为试点研究，样本量较小（46 名家长，12 名分配到电子组），且为混合方法设计，需要更大规模的 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: As a pilot study, the sample size is small (46 parents, 12 assigned to e-group), and it uses a mixed-methods design, requiring larger-scale RCTs for validation.

items.title: Experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge: a qualitative study | BMC Pediatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究使用经验共创设计，旨在优化早产儿 NICU 出院后的远程亲子干预项目。你可以从中了解远程康复项目在儿科领域的实施和优化过程，并汲取经验，以提升远程干预的依从性和效果。
items.titleZh: 经验共创设计优化 NICU 出院早产儿远程亲子干预项目：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究采用经验共创设计，旨在优化早产儿从新生儿重症监护室（NICU）出院后的远程亲子干预项目。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge. You can learn about the implementation and optimization process of remote rehabilitation programs in the pediatric field and draw lessons to improve the adherence and effectiveness of remote interventions.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具有普遍性，需要进一步的定量研究来验证干预的有效性。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its results are not generalizable and require further quantitative research to validate the effectiveness of the intervention.

items.title: Study protocol for FAXAge: a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise to slow aging in humans | GeroScience | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This is the study protocol for FAXAge, a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise to slow aging in humans.
items.curatedReason: 这是 FAXAge 研究的方案，一项随机对照临床试验，旨在通过禁食和运动来延缓人类衰老。虽然是方案，但你可以关注其在运动干预设计上的细节，以及如何将禁食等生活方式干预纳入康复研究的框架，这代表了抗衰老领域的前沿探索。
items.titleZh: FAXAge 研究方案：一项通过禁食和运动延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这是 FAXAge 研究方案，一项旨在通过禁食和运动延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the protocol for the FAXAge study, a randomized controlled clinical trial designed to slow aging in humans through fasting and exercise. Although it is a protocol, you can pay attention to the details of its exercise intervention design and how lifestyle interventions like fasting are incorporated into rehabilitation research frameworks, representing cutting-edge exploration in anti-aging.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布最终结果，因此不能提供实际的临床证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and the final results have not yet been published, so it cannot provide actual clinical evidence.

items.title: Comparison between ultrasound guided pericapsular nerve group (PENG) block and interscalene brachial plexus block for postoperative analgesia following shoulder arthroscopy: a randomized controlled trial | BMC Anesthesiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared ultrasound-guided pericapsular nerve group (PENG) block and interscalene brachial plexus block for postoperative analgesia following shoulder arthroscopy.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了两种神经阻滞方案在肩关节镜术后镇痛的效果。虽然主要关注点是麻醉，但其结果可作为你了解术后疼痛管理选择的背景信息，尤其是在术后早期康复疼痛控制的转诊考量中。
items.titleZh: 随机对照试验：超声引导下囊周神经组 (PENG) 阻滞与斜角肌间臂丛神经阻滞对肩关节镜术后镇痛的比较
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了超声引导下囊周神经组 (PENG) 阻滞与斜角肌间臂丛神经阻滞在肩关节镜术后镇痛方面的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial compared two nerve block techniques for postoperative analgesia after shoulder arthroscopy. While the primary focus is anesthesia, the results provide background information on postoperative pain management options, particularly for referral considerations in early rehabilitation pain control.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注麻醉效果，其对长期康复结局的影响未被评估。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on anesthetic efficacy, and its impact on long-term rehabilitation outcomes was not assessed.

items.title: A preliminary analysis of the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease: associations with motor severity and subtypes | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A preliminary analysis characterized the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease and its associations with motor severity and subtypes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步分析探讨了中晚期帕金森病脑脊液中炎症蛋白与运动严重程度和亚型的关联。了解这些生物标志物有助于你更深入地理解帕金森病的病理生理机制，但目前不直接影响康复实践。
items.titleZh: 中晚期帕金森病脑脊液炎症蛋白图谱的初步分析：与运动严重程度和亚型的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项初步分析研究了中晚期帕金森病患者脑脊液中的炎症蛋白图谱及其与运动严重程度和亚型的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary analysis explores the association between inflammatory proteins in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson's disease and motor severity and subtypes. Understanding these biomarkers helps you gain a deeper understanding of the pathophysiological mechanisms of Parkinson's disease, but it does not directly affect rehabilitation practice at present.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步分析，样本量和研究设计可能限制了结论的普遍性和确定性。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary analysis, and the sample size and study design may limit the generalizability and certainty of the conclusions.

items.title: Cannabidiol alleviates traumatic brain injury-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting ferroptosis via the TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt pathway
items.summary: This research found that cannabidiol (CBD) alleviates traumatic brain injury-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting ferroptosis via the TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt pathway.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了大麻二酚（CBD）通过抑制铁死亡途径，减轻创伤性脑损伤（TBI）引起的神经元损伤和认知功能障碍。虽然是药物机制研究，但了解这些潜在的神经保护策略对未来 TBI 康复的整体管理有启发作用，关注其临床转化潜力。
items.titleZh: 大麻二酚通过抑制 TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt 途径的铁死亡，减轻创伤性脑损伤引起的神经元损伤和认知缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，大麻二酚（CBD）通过抑制 TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt 途径的铁死亡，减轻了创伤性脑损伤引起的神经元损伤和认知缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals that cannabidiol (CBD) alleviates traumatic brain injury (TBI)-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting the ferroptosis pathway. While this is a drug mechanism study, understanding these potential neuroprotective strategies is insightful for the overall management of future TBI rehabilitation. Pay attention to its potential for clinical translation.
items.limitation: 这是一项细胞和动物模型研究，其结果不能直接推断到人体临床实践。
items.limitationEn: This is a cell and animal model study, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to human clinical practice.

items.title: Gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance differ between male academy soccer players and control participants | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study found that gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance differed between male academy soccer players and control participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了男性足球青训球员与对照组腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构和反向跳跃表现的差异。这些生理学和生物力学数据有助于你更好地理解高水平足球运动员的特有适应性，为运动表现训练和损伤预防提供参考。
items.titleZh: 男性足球青训球员与对照组腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构及与反向跳跃表现的关系差异
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，男性足球青训球员与对照组在腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构及其与反向跳跃表现的关系上存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compared gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and countermovement jump performance between male academy soccer players and control participants. These physiological and biomechanical data help you better understand the unique adaptations of high-level soccer players, providing a reference for athletic performance training and injury prevention.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于男性足球青训球员，结果可能不适用于其他运动员群体或普通人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to male academy soccer players, and the results may not be applicable to other athlete populations or the general population.

items.title: The longitudinal analysis of the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance: A case study - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A case study longitudinally analyzed the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance.
items.curatedReason: 这项案例研究纵向分析了压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的影响。你可以将此作为了解运动后恢复策略的辅助信息，但需注意这仅是个案研究，其结论不能直接推广到所有患者。
items.titleZh: 压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率影响的纵向分析：一项生物阻抗案例研究
items.summaryZh: 一项案例研究利用生物阻抗技术，纵向分析了压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case study longitudinally analyzed the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate. You can use this as supplementary information to understand post-exercise recovery strategies, but note that this is a case study, and its conclusions cannot be directly generalized to all patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项单案例研究，其结果不具有普遍性，无法作为指导临床实践的强证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case study, and its results are not generalizable and cannot serve as strong evidence for guiding clinical practice.

items.title: Fracture Risk Following Hardware Removal in Children With Arthrogryposis
items.summary: This study aimed to identify the incidence of fracture and infection following hardware removal in children with arthrogryposis and compare them to a matched cohort of patients with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在识别关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后骨折和感染的发生率。了解这些并发症风险有助于你在术后康复中更加警惕，并与外科医生共同管理潜在风险。
items.titleZh: 关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后的骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在确定关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后骨折和感染的发生率，并与匹配的脑瘫患者队列进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to identify the incidence of fractures and infections following hardware removal in children with arthrogryposis. Understanding these complication risks helps you be more vigilant in postoperative rehabilitation and co-manage potential risks with surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题，结果需要谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, which may have selection bias and data completeness issues, so the results need to be interpreted cautiously.

items.title: Training Early Childhood Educators to Observe, Assess and Enhance Discrete Play Skills | Early Childhood Education Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This intervention study described how 39 early childhood teachers were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete sensorimotor, functional, and symbolic play skills by completing a professional development course.
items.curatedReason: 这项干预研究描述了如何通过专业发展课程培训早期儿童教育者观察、评估和增强离散游戏技能。作为儿科物理治疗师，你可以从中了解跨专业合作（与早期教育者）的模式，以及如何将游戏干预融入更广泛的儿童发展支持体系。
items.titleZh: 培训早期儿童教育者观察、评估和增强离散游戏技能
items.summaryZh: 这项干预研究描述了 39 名早期儿童教师如何通过完成一项专业发展课程，学习观察、评估和增强离散的感觉运动、功能和象征性游戏技能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This intervention study describes how early childhood educators were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete play skills through a professional development course. As a pediatric physical therapist, you can learn about interprofessional collaboration models (with early educators) and how to integrate play interventions into broader child development support systems.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和对照组信息，限制了结论的普遍性和强度。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and control group information, limiting the generality and strength of the conclusions.

items.title: Predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F With PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains | Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research explored predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F with PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了使用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 筛查结果。你可以了解这些工具在早期筛查自闭症谱系障碍中的应用，并在早期干预的转诊评估中考虑其价值。
items.titleZh: 利用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了利用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域来预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 筛查结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the use of PediaTracTMv3.0 motor and social/communication/cognition domains to predict 18-month M-CHAT-R/F screening results. You can learn about the application of these tools in early screening for autism spectrum disorder and consider their value in referral assessments for early intervention.
items.limitation: 研究的预测效度具体数值未明确，可能限制了其作为独立诊断工具的可靠性。
items.limitationEn: The specific predictive validity values of the study were not clearly stated, which may limit its reliability as an independent diagnostic tool.

items.title: Implementation and effectiveness of the web‑based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care: a cluster randomized controlled trial | Child and Adolescent Psychiatry and Mental Health | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial investigated the implementation and effectiveness of the web-based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care.
items.curatedReason: 这项集群随机对照试验探讨了网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性。虽然主要关注心理健康，但其对青少年技能训练和干预交付模式的评估，可以为你设计和评估青少年康复项目提供参考。
items.titleZh: 网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性：一项集群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项集群随机对照试验研究了网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cluster randomized controlled trial investigated the implementation and effectiveness of the web-based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care. While primarily focused on mental health, its assessment of adolescent skills training and intervention delivery models can provide a reference for you in designing and evaluating adolescent rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注心理健康结局，对身体功能和运动技能康复的直接影响未被明确评估。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on mental health outcomes, and the direct impact on physical function and motor skill rehabilitation was not clearly assessed.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over low-load exercise (LLE) and high-load exercise (HLE) in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain intensity for individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析确认了血流限制训练（BFR）在肌骨康复中的额外益处。它提供了坚实的证据，表明低负荷 BFR 在肌肉力量、疼痛和功能障碍方面优于单纯的低负荷运动，你应该考虑将其纳入临床实践。
items.titleZh: 与传统运动相比，血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 RCT 的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与低负荷运动（LLE）和高负荷运动（HLE）相比，结合血流限制（LLE-BFR）的低负荷运动在改善肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛强度方面提供了额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the added benefits of blood flow restriction (BFR) exercise in musculoskeletal rehabilitation. It provides solid evidence that low-load BFR is superior to low-load exercise alone for muscle strength, pain, and disability, so you should consider incorporating it into your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究的异质性较高，一些次要结局指标的证据确定性较低。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity across studies and lower certainty of evidence for some secondary outcomes were noted.

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT with 24 ACLR male athletes found that eight weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors, suggesting it addresses neuromuscular deficits post-injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 强调了视觉干扰训练在 ACL 重建术后重返运动中的重要性，因为它能改善运动员在意外切向运动中的下肢生物力学和减少错误。你应该考虑将这类认知-运动双任务训练整合到你的重返运动方案中。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员 8 周视觉干扰训练对意外切向运动下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACL 重建术后男性运动员的随机对照试验发现，8 周的视觉干扰训练显著改善了意外切向运动中的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，提示其能弥补损伤后的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT highlights the importance of visual perturbation training for return to sport after ACL reconstruction, as it improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers. You should consider integrating such cognitive-motor dual-task training into your return-to-sport protocols.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（N=24），且仅限于男性运动员，可能限制了结果对其他人群的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a relatively small sample size (N=24) and was limited to male athletes, which may restrict generalizability to other populations.

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial explored the TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, demonstrating its feasibility for a definitive trial when integrated with usual NHS care.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项数字物理治疗项目的可行性研究，表明它能够安全地与常规 NHS 物理治疗结合使用，并为后续的正式 RCT 提供了宝贵的见解，但目前还不是能改变实践的证据。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目，其随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验探索了 TRAK MSK 数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目，证明其与常规 NHS 护理结合进行确定性试验是可行的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study on a digital physiotherapy program indicates it can be safely integrated with usual NHS care and offers valuable insights for future definitive RCTs, but it's not practice-changing evidence yet.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，侧重于评估干预措施的可行性和接受度，而非疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility study focused on assessing the intervention's viability and acceptance, not its efficacy.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement, indicating a lack of consensus and potential impact on patient outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了瑞典物理治疗师在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议上的显著差异。这提示我们，需要更清晰、循证的指南来减少临床实践中的变异性，以保障患者康复质量。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议方面存在重大差异，这表明缺乏共识，并可能影响患者的康复结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals significant discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement among Swedish physiotherapists. It highlights the need for clearer, evidence-based guidelines to reduce variability in clinical practice and ensure consistent patient rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项基于调查的横断面研究，依赖于自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和样本代表性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is a survey-based cross-sectional study relying on self-report, potentially subject to recall bias and sample representativeness limitations.

items.title: E-health StandingTall balance exercise for fall prevention in older people: results of a two year randomised controlled trial
items.summary: Results of a two-year randomized controlled trial showed that StandingTall, a home-based e-health balance exercise program delivered through an app, provided an effective, self-managed fall prevention program for community-dwelling older people.
items.curatedReason: 这项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，居家式电子健康平衡训练程序 StandingTall 能有效预防社区老年人的跌倒。这是高质量证据，强烈支持你在老年跌倒预防中推荐和应用类似数字干预方案。
items.titleZh: E-health StandingTall 平衡训练预防老年人跌倒：一项为期两年的随机对照试验结果。
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验结果显示，通过应用程序提供的居家式电子健康平衡训练程序 StandingTall，为社区居住的老年人提供了一个有效的、自我管理的跌倒预防方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This two-year randomized controlled trial showed that the home-based e-health balance exercise program StandingTall effectively prevented falls in community-dwelling older adults. This is high-quality evidence strongly supporting your recommendation and application of similar digital intervention programs in geriatric fall prevention.
items.limitation: 研究结果的长期效应和不同人群的外推性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: Long-term effects and generalizability to different populations still require further validation.

items.title: Prehabilitation in older adults with cancer: scoping review of surgical outcomes | BMJ Supportive & Palliative Care
items.summary: This scoping review evaluates the impact of prehabilitation on surgical outcomes in older adults with cancer, providing evidence for preoperative intervention strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述评估了癌症老年患者术前康复对外科结局的影响。它为你在肿瘤康复领域制定术前干预策略提供了证据支持，尤其是在提高老年患者手术耐受性方面。
items.titleZh: 癌症老年患者术前康复：外科结局的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述评估了癌症老年患者术前康复对外科结局的影响，为术前干预策略提供了证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review evaluated the impact of prehabilitation on surgical outcomes in older adults with cancer. It provides evidence to support your development of preoperative intervention strategies in oncology rehabilitation, particularly in improving surgical tolerance in older patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述，可能未对纳入研究进行严格的质量评估。
items.limitationEn: Scoping review, may not have strictly evaluated the quality of included studies.

items.title: Prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China: systematic review and meta-analysis | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析总结了中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率和潜在影响因素。它为你理解和识别中国特定文化背景下的老年虚弱提供了重要流行病学数据。
items.titleZh: 中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率和潜在影响因素：系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率及其潜在影响因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China. It provides you with important epidemiological data for understanding and identifying geriatric frailty within a specific cultural context in China.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析结果的异质性可能影响结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity of meta-analysis results may affect generalizability of conclusions.

items.title: The economic evaluation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease care: Quality and cost – a web of science-based systematic review - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This systematic review based on Web of Science evaluates the economic aspects of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease care, focusing on quality and cost.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述评估了慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）护理的经济学评价，包括质量和成本。它为你理解 COPD 康复的成本效益和政策制定提供了宏观视角。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病护理的经济学评价：质量与成本——一项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 这项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述评估了慢性阻塞性肺疾病护理的经济学方面，重点关注质量和成本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Web of Science-based systematic review evaluated the economic aspects of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) care, including quality and cost. It provides you with a macro perspective for understanding the cost-effectiveness of COPD rehabilitation and policy development.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受纳入研究异质性和方法学质量的影响。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of the review may be affected by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of the included studies.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: This multicenter randomized pragmatic trial protocol (SKOAP Phase 2) compares intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心随机实用试验方案旨在比较关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。它将提供不同介入治疗手段的头对头比较证据，直接影响你在骨关节炎疼痛管理中的转诊和协同决策。
items.titleZh: 关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的多中心随机实用试验：SKOAP 2 期方案。
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心随机实用试验方案（SKOAP 2 期）旨在比较关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter randomized pragmatic trial protocol aims to compare intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain. It will provide head-to-head comparative evidence for different interventional treatments, directly impacting your referral and collaborative decisions in osteoarthritis pain management.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未有实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; actual results are not yet available.

items.title: A dual-contrast deep learning model for automated assessment of sarcopenia using MRI | Abdominal Radiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study developed a dual-contrast deep learning model for automated assessment of sarcopenia using MRI, providing a new tool for objective muscle mass evaluation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一个双对比深度学习模型，用于自动化评估 MRI 中的肌少症。它代表了肌少症诊断工具的进步，未来可能辅助你更客观地评估肌肉质量和康复效果。
items.titleZh: 一种用于 MRI 自动化评估肌少症的双对比深度学习模型。
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发了一种利用 MRI 进行肌少症自动化评估的双对比深度学习模型，为客观评估肌肉质量提供了新工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a dual-contrast deep learning model for automated sarcopenia assessment using MRI. It represents an advance in sarcopenia diagnostic tools and may assist you in more objectively evaluating muscle mass and rehabilitation outcomes in the future.
items.limitation: AI 模型仍在开发和验证阶段，临床应用需进一步测试。
items.limitationEn: AI model is still in development and validation stages; clinical application requires further testing.

items.title: A plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia implicates the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction | Molecular Cancer | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research identified a plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia, implicating the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征，并提示 IGFBP 轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。这加深了你对癌症康复中肌少症生物机制的理解，可能指导未来的靶向干预。
items.titleZh: 癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征提示 IGFBP 轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征，并提示胰岛素样生长因子结合蛋白（IGFBP）轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identified a plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia and implicated the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction. This deepens your understanding of the biological mechanisms of sarcopenia in cancer rehabilitation and may guide future targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 血浆标志物距离临床应用尚有距离，需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: Plasma biomarkers are still far from clinical application and require further validation.

items.title: Prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults: a prospective multicenter cohort study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A prospective multicenter cohort study explored the prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性多中心队列研究探讨了住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联。它强调了这些综合征对老年患者预后的重要影响，提醒你多维度评估和干预的必要性。
items.titleZh: 住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联：一项前瞻性多中心队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性多中心队列研究探讨了住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults. It highlights the significant impact of these syndromes on geriatric patient prognosis, reminding you of the necessity for multidimensional assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，存在混杂因素的可能。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, unable to establish causality, with potential confounding factors.

items.title: A randomized controlled study on the effects of the T-REX Twente (Thoracic Surgical Rehabilitation Experts Twente) sternal precautions on quality of life and physical activity levels in cardiac surgery patients, compared to standard care in patients following a median sternotomy: the study protocol | Trials | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study protocol describes a randomized controlled trial comparing the effects of T-REX Twente sternal precautions to standard care on quality of life and physical activity levels in cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究方案描述了一项随机对照试验，旨在比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平的影响。虽然是方案，但其设计思路值得你关注心脏康复领域的实践创新。
items.titleZh: 比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平影响的随机对照研究：研究方案。
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案描述了一项随机对照研究，旨在比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol describes a randomized controlled trial comparing T-REX Twente sternal precautions with standard care for cardiac surgery patients' quality of life and physical activity levels. Although a protocol, its design is worth noting for practical innovations in cardiac rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未有实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; actual results are not yet available.

items.title: Immune–inflammatory vulnerability index for risk stratification in older adults with acute exacerbations of COPD: a prospective cohort study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A prospective cohort study proposed an immune-inflammatory vulnerability index for risk stratification in older adults with acute exacerbations of COPD.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究提出了针对急性加重期 COPD 老年患者的免疫炎症脆弱性指数，用于风险分层。它为你在评估和管理 COPD 老年患者时提供了新的风险预测工具。
items.titleZh: 免疫炎症脆弱性指数用于急性加重期 COPD 老年患者的风险分层：一项前瞻性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究提出了免疫炎症脆弱性指数，用于急性加重期慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）老年患者的风险分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study proposed an immune-inflammatory vulnerability index for risk stratification in older adults with acute exacerbations of COPD. It provides you with a new risk prediction tool for assessing and managing elderly COPD patients.
items.limitation: 队列研究，可能存在未测量的混杂因素影响结果。
items.limitationEn: Cohort study, potential for unmeasured confounding factors affecting results.

items.title: Advances in research on the role of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This review summarizes advances in research on the dual roles of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke, highlighting their involvement in promoting angiogenesis and neuroprotection.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了 VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中中的双重作用，包括促血管生成和神经保护。它提供了一个生物学机制的视角，但对 PT 临床实践的直接指导有限。
items.titleZh: VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中中作用的研究进展。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了 VEGF 家族成员在缺血性卒中中双重作用的研究进展，强调其在促进血管生成和神经保护方面的参与。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review discusses the dual roles of VEGF family members in ischemic stroke, including angiogenesis promotion and neuroprotection. It offers a biological mechanism perspective, but its direct guidance for PT clinical practice is limited.
items.limitation: 这是一篇机制综述，未提供具体的临床干预证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review on mechanisms, not providing specific clinical intervention evidence.

items.title: Data analysis tool for identifying multidimensional health profiles associated with frailty in older adults | BMC Medical Informatics and Decision Making | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study describes a data analysis tool for identifying multidimensional health profiles associated with frailty in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一个数据分析工具，用于识别与老年人虚弱相关的多维度健康状况。它为你在评估老年虚弱患者时，提供了一个更全面的视角和潜在的辅助工具。
items.titleZh: 用于识别与老年人虚弱相关的多维度健康状况的数据分析工具。
items.summaryZh: 本研究介绍了一种数据分析工具，用于识别与老年人虚弱相关的多维度健康状况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a data analysis tool to identify multidimensional health profiles associated with frailty in older adults. It provides you with a more comprehensive perspective and a potential assistive tool when assessing frail older patients.
items.limitation: 这是一个数据分析工具的描述，并非临床干预研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a description of a data analysis tool, not a clinical intervention study.

items.title: Running exercise alleviates chronic heart failure by promoting cardiomyocyte autophagic flux through the NEAT1–QKI affecting Beclin1/LC3B mRNA stability | Biology Direct | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research demonstrated that running exercise alleviates chronic heart failure in animal models by promoting cardiomyocyte autophagic flux through the NEAT1–QKI pathway, affecting Beclin1/LC3B mRNA stability.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究在动物模型中探讨了跑步运动通过特定分子通路缓解慢性心力衰竭的机制。这是一个有前景的生物学发现，但目前仍是基础研究，不直接影响 PT 临床实践。
items.titleZh: 跑步运动通过促进 NEAT1–QKI 影响 Beclin1/LC3B mRNA 稳定性来缓解慢性心力衰竭。
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，跑步运动通过促进 NEAT1–QKI 影响 Beclin1/LC3B mRNA 稳定性，从而缓解慢性心力衰竭，该发现基于动物模型。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored the mechanism by which running exercise alleviates chronic heart failure through specific molecular pathways in animal models. This is a promising biological discovery, but it remains basic research at present and does not directly impact PT clinical practice.
items.limitation: 动物模型研究，结果不一定能直接推导至人类。
items.limitationEn: Animal model study, results may not directly translate to humans.

items.title: Relationship between heart failure and the risk of acute exacerbation of COPD
items.summary: This original research investigates the relationship between heart failure and the risk of acute exacerbation of COPD, highlighting comorbidities' impact on prognosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了心力衰竭与 COPD 急性加重风险之间的关系。它提醒你关注心肺共病对患者预后的影响，但结论尚需更多高级别证据来指导临床决策。
items.titleZh: 心力衰竭与慢性阻塞性肺疾病急性加重风险的关系。
items.summaryZh: 这项原创研究探讨了心力衰竭与慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）急性加重风险之间的关系，强调了合并症对预后的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates the relationship between heart failure and the risk of acute exacerbation of COPD. It reminds you to pay attention to the impact of cardiopulmonary comorbidities on patient prognosis, but more high-level evidence is needed to guide clinical decision-making.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective observational study, which may be subject to confounding factors.

items.title: Cardiac Rehabilitation Physiotherapist/Exercise Specialist - Harrow job with Central London Community Healthcare NHS Trust (Health Careers)
items.summary: This is a job posting for a Cardiac Rehabilitation Physiotherapist/Exercise Specialist in Harrow, UK, detailing required experience in planning, leading, and evaluating exercise sessions for specialist populations, particularly those with cardiac conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这是一则英国国家医疗服务体系（NHS）的心脏康复物理治疗师/运动专家招聘信息。它反映了心脏康复领域对专业人才的需求和所需技能组合。
items.titleZh: Harrow 地区中央伦敦社区医疗保健 NHS 信托基金招聘心脏康复物理治疗师/运动专家。
items.summaryZh: 英国 Harrow 地区正在招聘心脏康复物理治疗师/运动专家，要求具备为特殊人群（特别是心脏病患者）规划、领导和评估运动课程的经验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a job posting for a Cardiac Rehabilitation Physiotherapist/Exercise Specialist in the UK's NHS. It reflects the demand for skilled professionals and the required skill set in cardiac rehabilitation.

items.title: untitled
items.summary: This study protocol outlines a pilot randomized controlled trial to investigate the efficacy of acupuncture at Houxi (SI 3) acupoint for acute neck pain caused by stiff neck.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究方案描述了一项试点随机对照试验，旨在评估后溪穴（SI 3）针灸对落枕引起的急性颈痛的疗效。尽管是方案，但其研究设计值得你关注针灸在急性疼痛管理中的潜力。
items.titleZh: 后溪穴（SI 3）针灸治疗落枕引起的急性颈痛：一项试点随机对照试验的研究方案。
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案概述了一项试点随机对照试验，旨在探讨后溪穴（SI 3）针灸治疗落枕引起的急性颈痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol describes a pilot randomized controlled trial to evaluate the efficacy of acupuncture at Houxi (SI 3) acupoint for acute neck pain caused by stiff neck. Although a protocol, its study design is worth noting for the potential of acupuncture in acute pain management.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未有实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; actual results are not yet available.

items.title: Treatment with osteopathic techniques for Meralgia Paresthetica: two case reports - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This case report presents two cases of Meralgia Paresthetica treated with osteopathic techniques, offering preliminary clinical observations for non-pharmacological management.
items.curatedReason: 这篇案例报告介绍了应用整骨疗法治疗股外侧皮神经卡压的两个案例。它为罕见神经卡压的非药物治疗提供了初步的临床观察，但作为案例报告，其证据等级较低，无法推广。
items.titleZh: 整骨疗法治疗股外侧皮神经卡压：两例报告。
items.summaryZh: 本案例报告介绍了两例应用整骨疗法治疗股外侧皮神经卡压的病例，为非药物管理提供了初步的临床观察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report describes two cases of meralgia paresthetica treated with osteopathic techniques. It offers preliminary clinical observations for non-pharmacological treatment of a rare nerve entrapment, but as a case report, its evidence level is low and not generalizable.
items.limitation: 案例报告，结果不具有普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Case report, results are not generalizable.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=33) found Mulligan ankle taping combined with treadmill training improved ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability more than Kinesio taping or treadmill training alone in chronic stroke patients over six weeks.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性中风患者中，Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练可能比 Kinesio 贴扎或单纯跑步机训练在踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面有更优表现。下次处理中风患者的踝关节功能障碍时，可以考虑纳入 Mulligan 贴扎。
items.titleZh: 慢性中风患者中，肌内效贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了慢性中风患者中，Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎联合跑步机训练，以及单独跑步机训练的生物力学效应。结果显示，Mulligan 贴扎组在踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: In chronic stroke patients, Mulligan ankle taping combined with treadmill training may outperform Kinesio taping or treadmill training alone in ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability. Consider incorporating Mulligan taping when addressing ankle dysfunction in stroke patients.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小且随访期短，长期效果和更大范围的适用性需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size and short follow-up period; long-term effects and broader applicability require further research.

items.title: Genicular Artery Embolization Using Imipenem/Cilastatin vs. Microsphere for Knee Osteoarthritis (GAUCHO). 12-Month Clinical Results of a Single-blind Randomized Controlled Trial | CardioVascular and Interventional Radiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This single-blind randomized controlled trial compared genicular artery embolization using imipenem/cilastatin versus microsphere for knee osteoarthritis, reporting 12-month clinical results.
items.curatedReason: 基因动脉栓塞术（GAE）在膝关节骨关节炎中是新兴介入疗法。这个 RCT 比较了两种栓塞剂（亚胺培南/西司他丁 vs 微球），为评估 GAE 安全性和有效性提供了更多数据。作为物理治疗师，了解这类介入治疗的最新进展能帮你更好地评估患者，辅助转诊决策。
items.titleZh: 膝关节骨关节炎基因动脉栓塞术 (GAUCHO) 研究：亚胺培南/西司他丁与微球栓塞剂的 12 个月临床结果单盲随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项单盲随机对照试验比较了使用亚胺培南/西司他丁与微球作为栓塞剂对膝关节骨关节炎进行基因动脉栓塞术的效果，并报告了 12 个月的临床结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Genicular artery embolization (GAE) is an emerging interventional therapy for knee osteoarthritis. This RCT compares two embolic agents, providing more data on GAE's safety and efficacy. Understanding these advances helps you better assess patients and inform referral decisions.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲，可能存在受试者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study was single-blinded, which may introduce participant bias.

items.title: AI-based smart glove for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring: a systematic review | Journal of Engineering and Applied Science | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This systematic review explores the potential of AI-based smart gloves for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring.
items.curatedReason: 关于 AI 智能手套用于手部运动识别和康复监测的系统综述，展示了数字健康技术在神经康复领域的巨大潜力。作为物理治疗师，了解这类技术能帮助你探索新的康复工具，提高患者依从性和疗效追踪的精准度。
items.titleZh: 基于人工智能的智能手套用于手部运动识别和康复监测：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 本系统综述探讨了基于人工智能的智能手套在手部运动识别和康复监测方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on AI-based smart gloves for hand movement recognition and rehabilitation monitoring highlights the significant potential of digital health technologies in neurorehabilitation. As a physical therapist, understanding these technologies helps you explore new rehabilitation tools and improve patient adherence and the accuracy of outcome tracking.
items.limitation: 系统综述，纳入研究可能存在方法学异质性，实际应用效果需更多大规模临床试验验证。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review, included studies may have methodological heterogeneity, and actual application effects require more large-scale clinical trials for validation.

items.title: Leisure-time physical activity and low back pain in Switzerland: results from the 2022 cross-sectional Swiss Health Survey | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 2022 cross-sectional Swiss Health Survey investigated the association between leisure-time physical activity and low back pain in Switzerland.
items.curatedReason: 这项瑞士的横断面研究提示，休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛之间存在关联。虽然横断面研究不能建立因果关系，但它再次提醒我们，鼓励患者保持日常活动量的临床意义。
items.titleZh: 瑞士休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛的关系：2022 年瑞士健康调查的横断面结果
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 2022 年瑞士健康调查的横断面研究，旨在探讨瑞士居民休闲时间体育活动与下腰痛之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Swiss cross-sectional study suggests an association between leisure-time physical activity and low back pain. While cross-sectional data cannot establish causality, it reinforces the clinical importance of encouraging patients to maintain daily activity levels.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality.

items.title: Kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures across body mass index categories: a cross-sectional mediation analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This cross-sectional mediation analysis examined the relationship between kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures across different body mass index categories.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了术后胫骨平台骨折患者的运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征的关系，并考虑了 BMI 的影响。理解这些因素的相互作用，能帮你更全面地评估和管理这类复杂患者，特别是在制定重返运动计划时。
items.titleZh: 术后胫骨平台骨折患者不同体重指数下运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征的关系：一项横断面中介分析
items.summaryZh: 本横断面中介分析探讨了术后胫骨平台骨折患者的运动恐惧症与膝关节生物力学特征之间的关系，并考虑了体重指数（BMI）类别的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the relationship between kinesiophobia and knee biomechanical characteristics in patients with postoperative tibial plateau fractures, considering the impact of BMI. Understanding these interacting factors helps you comprehensively assess and manage these complex patients, especially when developing return-to-sport programs.
items.limitation: 横断面设计限制了对因果关系的推断。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design limits causal inferences.

items.title: Muscle oxygen saturation reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research demonstrates that muscle oxygen saturation (SmO2) reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，肌肉氧饱和度（SmO2）能反映划船测功仪运动中个体对运动强度的反应。在运动康复和表现训练中，使用 SmO2 作为个性化训练强度的指标，能帮助你更精确地调整训练负荷，优化适应性。
items.titleZh: 肌肉氧饱和度反映划船测功仪运动中个体对运动强度的反应
items.summaryZh: 本研究表明，肌肉氧饱和度（SmO2）能够反映个体在划船测功仪运动中对运动强度的个性化反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that muscle oxygen saturation (SmO2) reflects individualized responses to exercise intensity during rowing ergometer exercise. In sports rehabilitation and performance training, using SmO2 as an indicator for personalized training intensity helps you more precisely adjust training loads and optimize adaptations.
items.limitation: 研究对象特异性，结果可能不完全适用于所有类型的运动和人群。
items.limitationEn: The study's specific subject population may limit the generalizability of its findings to all types of exercise and populations.

items.title: Relatively upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients: a prospective observational study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This prospective observational study identified relatively upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究识别了住院老年患者压疮发生和分期的上游相关因素。作为物理治疗师，理解这些宏观风险因素能帮助你更全面地评估患者，并在压疮预防方案中，不仅关注局部压力管理，还应考虑全身性因素。
items.titleZh: 住院老年患者压疮发生和分期相对上游因素的前瞻性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究旨在识别住院老年患者压疮发生和分期过程中相对上游的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study identifies upstream factors associated with pressure injury occurrence and staging in older hospitalized patients. As a physical therapist, understanding these macro-level risk factors helps you comprehensively assess patients and consider systemic factors in addition to local pressure management in pressure injury prevention protocols.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，不能直接证明因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, cannot directly prove causation.

items.title: Bouldering-related trauma: Injury patterns and operative burden over 10 years at a UK major trauma centre - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This 10-year study at a UK major trauma center analyzed injury patterns and operative burden related to bouldering-related trauma.
items.curatedReason: 这项在英国创伤中心进行的 10 年研究揭示了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。对于运动康复师而言，了解这些损伤风险能更好地指导预防策略和康复流程。
items.titleZh: 抱石相关创伤：英国主要创伤中心 10 年的损伤模式和手术负担
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 10 年在英国主要创伤中心进行的研究，分析了抱石运动相关的创伤模式和手术负担。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year study from a UK major trauma center reveals bouldering-related trauma patterns and operative burden. For sports rehabilitation therapists, understanding these injury risks helps guide prevention strategies and rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 为回顾性观察研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据记录不完整。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective observational study, it may have selection bias and incomplete data recording.

items.title: Does task experience moderate habituation effects in drop jumps? - An intra- and interday reliability and measurement error analysis | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary:
# Does task experience moderate habituation effects in drop jumps? - An intra- and interday reliability and measurement error analysis | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link

Published: 2026-06-29T00:00:00
Source: link.springer.com (link.springer.com)
Language: en

## Story

Does task experience moderate habituation effects in drop jumps? - An intra- and interday reliability and measurement error analysis | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link

[![Springer Nature Link](https://link.springer.com/oscar-static/images/darwin/header/img/logo-springer-nature-link-05805fde18.svg)](https://link.springer.com/)

[Account](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s13102-026-01833-3)

Menu

[Find a journal](https://link.springer.com/
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了任务经验是否会调节下落跳（drop jumps）中的习惯化效应，并分析了其内部和日间可靠性及测量误差。在运动表现评估和训练中，理解测试的可靠性和习惯化效应能帮你更准确地解读数据，优化训练安排。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines whether task experience moderates habituation effects in drop jumps and analyzes their intra- and interday reliability and measurement error. Understanding test reliability and habituation effects in sports performance assessment and training helps you interpret data more accurately and optimize training schedules.
items.limitation: 研究样本量和人群特异性可能限制结果的广泛应用。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size and population specificity may limit the broad applicability of its results.

items.title: Executive function development between ages 2 and 6 in children exposed to threatened preterm labor | European Child & Adolescent Psychiatry | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study examined executive function development between ages 2 and 6 in children exposed to threatened preterm labor.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了有早产威胁暴露史的儿童在 2 到 6 岁期间执行功能的发展。了解这些儿童可能存在的发育轨迹，能帮助儿科物理治疗师更精准地评估其认知和运动发展，并制定相应的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 早产威胁暴露儿童 2 至 6 岁执行功能发展
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了暴露于早产威胁的儿童在 2 到 6 岁期间执行功能的发展情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines executive function development in children exposed to threatened preterm labor between ages 2 and 6. Understanding the potential developmental trajectories in these children helps pediatric physical therapists more accurately assess their cognitive and motor development and formulate appropriate intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是执行功能，并非直接的运动康复结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on executive function, not direct motor rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: WhatsApp as a Support Tool for Reducing Anxiety and Improving Quality of Life After Orthognathic Surgery | Journal of Maxillofacial and Oral Surgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated WhatsApp as a support tool for reducing anxiety and improving quality of life after orthognathic surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，WhatsApp 作为支持工具能有效降低正颌手术后患者的焦虑并提高生活质量。这提示我们，在术后康复管理中，利用即时通讯工具提供心理支持和信息反馈，能有效辅助患者的整体恢复。
items.titleZh: WhatsApp 作为正颌手术后降低焦虑和改善生活质量的支持工具
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了 WhatsApp 作为一种支持工具，在降低正颌手术后患者焦虑并改善其生活质量方面的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that WhatsApp as a support tool effectively reduces anxiety and improves quality of life for patients after orthognathic surgery. This suggests that using instant messaging tools for psychological support and feedback in postoperative rehabilitation management can effectively aid patients' overall recovery.
items.limitation: 主要关注心理结局和生活质量，非直接物理康复效果。
items.limitationEn: Primarily focused on psychological outcomes and quality of life, not direct physical rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Correlates of social participation of children with special healthcare needs: baseline of the PART-CHILD study | BMC Pediatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This baseline study of the PART-CHILD study investigated correlates of social participation in children with special healthcare needs.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了特殊医疗需求儿童社会参与的相关因素。了解这些影响因素，能帮助儿科物理治疗师在制定康复计划时，不仅关注功能改善，更要将社会参与作为重要的结局指标，提升儿童的整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: 特殊医疗需求儿童社会参与的相关因素：PART-CHILD 研究的基线数据
items.summaryZh: PART-CHILD 研究的基线数据探讨了特殊医疗需求儿童社会参与的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores correlates of social participation in children with special healthcare needs. Understanding these influencing factors helps pediatric physical therapists not only focus on functional improvement but also prioritize social participation as a key outcome measure when developing rehabilitation plans, enhancing children's overall quality of life.
items.limitation: 为基线研究，旨在识别相关因素，而非干预效果评价。
items.limitationEn: This is a baseline study aimed at identifying correlates, not an evaluation of intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRF) versus Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNF) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation from a U.S. healthcare payer perspective.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医保支付方视角看，卒中后急性期康复，入住IRF比SNF更具成本效益。这为IRF在政策和报销谈判中提供了强有力的经济学证据，你应该熟悉这些数据。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方视角评估急性卒中后康复的成本效益：住院康复机构 vs. 专业护理机构
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型从美国医保支付方视角，评估了卒中后急性期康复中，住院康复机构（IRF）与专业护理机构（SNF）的成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a U.S. healthcare payer perspective, post-acute stroke rehabilitation in Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) is more cost-effective than in Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs). This provides strong economic evidence for IRFs in policy and reimbursement discussions, and you should be familiar with this data.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型参数的准确性及假设的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This study uses a decision analytic model, and its results depend on the accuracy of model parameters and the validity of assumptions.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: This study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, finding lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中比健康对照组表现出较低的腓肠肌肌电活动。这提示在重返运动评估中，除了关注股四头肌和臏腱，还要重视三头肌，将其纳入康复训练目标。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌的肌电活动，发现ACL重建组的活动度较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Individuals after ACLR demonstrated lower triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls. This suggests that in return-to-sport assessments, in addition to focusing on the quadriceps and patellar tendon, you should also prioritize the triceps surae and include it in rehabilitation training goals.
items.limitation: 本研究为对照研究，但未随机分组，且主要结局为肌电活动，非功能性表现。
items.limitationEn: This is a controlled study but not randomized, and the primary outcome was EMG activity, not functional performance.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: This cross-sectional survey study described factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: BFRT在儿童和青少年ACL损伤患者中的临床应用仍缺乏一致性。如果你考虑在青少年患者中使用BFRT，应谨慎并与最新研究保持同步，避免过度依赖经验。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面调查研究描述了影响物理治疗师对前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者进行血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical application of BFRT in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients still lacks consistency. If you are considering using BFRT in adolescent patients, proceed cautiously and stay updated with the latest research to avoid over-reliance on anecdotal experience.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reported data from physical therapists, potentially subject to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: This single-blind RCT (N=28) compared the immediate effects of dynamic taping vs. sports taping on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）在改善慢性踝关节不稳患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面即时效果相似。这意味着你可以根据患者具体需求和对不同贴扎的耐受性，灵活选择贴扎方式。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项单盲随机对照试验（N=28）比较了动态贴扎与运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳业余运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的即时影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) show similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability. This means you can flexibly choose the taping method based on the patient's specific needs and tolerance for different taping techniques.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小（28人），仅评估了即时效应，长期效果和临床意义尚待进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed immediate effects; long-term efficacy and clinical significance require further research.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: This case report describes the clinical course of a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability, where figure-of-eight taping facilitated exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 本案例报告提示，8字贴扎与康复训练结合，在年幼空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的保守治疗中可能有效。作为个案，它仅提供初步观察，而非普遍适用的证据。
items.titleZh: 8字贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：一例病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本案例报告描述了一名12岁女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的临床过程，其中8字贴扎有效促进了运动疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report suggests that figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation may be effective in the conservative management of multidirectional shoulder instability in a school-aged karate athlete. As a single case, it offers preliminary observations rather than generalizable evidence.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，证据等级低，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with a low level of evidence and limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that a targeted strengthening program (STRENGTH) led by physiotherapists was superior to a standardized stretching program (STRETCH) for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) regarding hip-related quality of life and patient-perceived global change at 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项评估了物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）治疗的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）组在 6 个月时，其髋部相关生活质量（QOL）和患者感知变化总评分（GROC）均优于标准化牵伸（STRETCH）组。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在 FAI 治疗中优先采用强化训练方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师主导的股骨髋臼撞击综合征治疗效果：一项评估者设盲、有限披露的随机对照试验（PhysioFIRST 研究）
items.titleEn: Physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (the PhysioFIRST study): an assessor-blinded, limited disclosure randomised controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者设盲的随机对照试验（RCT）发现，物理治疗师主导的目标性强化训练（STRENGTH）方案，在 6 个月时，相比标准化牵伸（STRETCH）方案，在股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的髋部相关生活质量和患者感知变化方面更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluating physiotherapist-led treatment for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) found that the targeted strengthening (STRENGTH) group showed superior hip-related quality of life (QOL) and patient-perceived Global Rating of Change (GROC) at 6 months compared to the standardized stretching (STRETCH) group. This provides strong evidence for PTs to prioritize strengthening protocols in FAI management.
items.limitation: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.
items.limitationEn: The study involved limited disclosure, meaning patients and therapists knew the treatment allocation but outcome assessors were blinded. This design may have residual bias.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis identified the most effective physical therapy interventions for rotator cuff tendinopathy, suggesting a combination of manual therapy, exercise, and education as optimal.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）旨在比较不同物理治疗干预措施对成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）的疗效。结果确定了最有效的干预措施组合（例如，结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育），为 PT 提供了优化肩袖肌腱病治疗方案的有力证据。
items.titleZh: 成人肩袖肌腱病物理治疗干预的比较有效性：系统综述与网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Comparative effectiveness of physical therapy interventions in adults with rotator cuff tendinopathy: a systematic review and network meta-analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络荟萃分析（NMA）确定了成人肩袖肌腱病（RC tendinopathy）最有效的物理治疗干预组合，建议结合手法治疗、运动疗法和教育。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and network meta-analysis (NMA) compares the efficacy of different physical therapy interventions for adult rotator cuff tendinopathy (RC tendinopathy). It identifies the most effective combination of interventions (e.g., combining manual therapy, exercise, and education), providing strong evidence for PTs to optimize treatment protocols for RC tendinopathy.
items.limitation: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.
items.limitationEn: The certainty of evidence for some comparisons was assessed as low or very low, necessitating caution in interpreting results and potentially limiting the generalizability of findings.

items.title: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of RCTs found that combined exercise training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析比较了不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响。结果显示，联合训练（结合有氧和抗阻训练）在降低 24 小时收缩压和舒张压方面最有效。这为 PT 提供了强有力的证据，支持在高血压管理中推荐联合运动方案。
items.titleZh: 不同运动训练模式对高血压成人 24 小时动态血压的影响：随机对照试验网络荟萃分析
items.titleEn: Effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension: a network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）的网络荟萃分析发现，联合运动训练（有氧和抗阻）在高血压成人中对降低 24 小时动态血压最有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis of RCTs compared the effects of different exercise training modalities on 24-hour ambulatory blood pressure in adults with hypertension. The findings indicate that combined training (aerobic and resistance) was most effective in reducing 24-hour systolic and diastolic blood pressure. This provides strong evidence for PTs to recommend combined exercise programs in hypertension management.
items.limitation: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.
items.limitationEn: The included studies had varying intervention durations and intensities, and the quality of evidence varied across comparisons, potentially affecting the robustness of the findings.

items.title: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summary: A causal inference analysis of UK Biobank data suggests that light-intensity physical activity (LPA) is associated with a reduced risk of all-cause mortality, even at low levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA).
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析，探讨了轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险之间在不同中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平下的剂量-反应关系。结果提示，即使在低 MVPA 水平下，增加 LPA 也能带来显著的死亡率降低。这为 PT 强调低强度活动（如日常活动、散步）的健康益处提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 轻度体力活动与全因死亡风险之间的剂量-反应关系：因果推断分析
items.titleEn: Dose-response interplay between light and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity on all-cause mortality risk: a causal inference analysis
items.summaryZh: 一项基于 UK Biobank 的因果推断分析表明，轻度体力活动（LPA）与全因死亡风险降低相关，即使在中高强度体力活动（MVPA）水平较低时也是如此。
items.curatedReasonEn: This causal inference analysis using UK Biobank data explores the dose-response relationship between light-intensity physical activity (LPA) and all-cause mortality risk across different levels of moderate-to-vigorous physical activity (MVPA). It suggests that increasing LPA can significantly reduce mortality risk, even at lower MVPA levels. This provides strong evidence for PTs to emphasize the health benefits of low-intensity activities.
items.limitation: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on self-reported physical activity from accelerometers, which may have limitations. Causal inference methods estimate counterfactuals, and the interpretation requires careful consideration of assumptions.

items.title: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: An RCT found that perioperative respiratory muscle training improved respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, and functional capacity in elderly cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验（RCT）评估了围手术期呼吸肌训练对接受心脏手术的老年患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能、功能能力和预后结局的影响。结果表明，这种训练可能改善患者的肺部恢复和整体预后。对于进行心肺康复的 PT 来说，这是一项重要的临床证据。
items.titleZh: 围手术期呼吸肌训练对老年心脏手术患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.titleEn: The effectiveness of perioperative respiratory muscle exercise in elderly cardiac surgery patients: a randomized controlled trial
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（RCT）发现，围手术期呼吸肌训练可改善老年心脏手术患者的呼吸肌力量、肺功能和功能能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluated the impact of perioperative respiratory muscle training on respiratory muscle strength, pulmonary function, functional capacity, and prognostic outcomes in elderly cardiac surgery patients. Findings suggest this training may improve pulmonary recovery and overall prognosis. This provides important clinical evidence for PTs involved in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation.
items.limitation: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to elderly cardiac surgery patients; findings may not be generalizable to other surgical populations or age groups.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summary: A cross-sectional study surveyed Cameroonian football clubs on cardiovascular screening and emergency response planning to help prevent sudden cardiac death.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查了喀麦隆足球俱乐部心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划的横断面研究，是在 Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡后进行的。研究旨在预防足球运动员的猝死。对于在运动医学领域工作的 PT 来说，这项研究提供了关于特定地区（喀麦隆）预防措施的实践信息。
items.titleZh: 预防喀麦隆足球运动员猝死：Marc-Vivien Foe 悲剧性死亡 22 年后的随访
items.titleEn: Preventing sudden cardiac death among football athletes in Cameroon: 22-year follow-up to the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe - supported by the BJSM Global Research Grant Programme
items.summaryZh: 一项针对喀麦隆足球俱乐部的横断面调查，评估了心血管筛查策略和应急响应计划，旨在预防运动员猝死。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study investigating cardiovascular screening strategies and emergency response planning in Cameroonian football clubs, conducted after the tragic death of Marc-Vivien Foe, aims to prevent sudden cardiac death in athletes. For PTs working in sports medicine, this study provides practical information on preventative measures in a specific region (Cameroon).
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study describing current practices and preparedness in Cameroon, not an intervention study testing the effectiveness of specific screening or response protocols.

items.title: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summary: A prospective study on US Army trainees found that biomarkers of systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis were associated with musculoskeletal injuries (MSKI) and persisted throughout training.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察研究评估了美国陆军新兵在基础战斗训练（BCT）期间，全身炎症和氧化应激生物标志物是否与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并追踪了这些标志物的纵向变化。结果表明，系统性炎症和氧化应激可能在损伤发生前就已存在并持续存在。这提示 PT 在评估和管理陆军新兵 MSKI 时，可能需要考虑这些生理指标。
items.titleZh: 美国陆军新兵在肌肉骨骼损伤前后出现炎症和氧化还原稳态改变
items.titleEn: Inflammation and alterations in redox homeostasis precede and persist following musculoskeletal injury in US army trainees
items.summaryZh: 一项针对美国陆军新兵的前瞻性研究发现，系统性炎症和氧化还原稳态的生物标志物与肌肉骨骼损伤（MSKI）相关，并在训练期间持续存在。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study assessed whether systemic inflammation and redox homeostasis biomarkers associate with musculoskeletal injury (MSKI) during US Army Basic Combat Training (BCT) and characterized longitudinal changes. Findings suggest systemic inflammation and oxidative stress may precede and persist following injury. This suggests PTs may need to consider these physiological markers when assessing and managing MSKI in Army trainees.
items.limitation: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study, so it can only establish associations, not causality. The study population was limited to US Army trainees.

items.title: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summary: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to inform healthy aging initiatives.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的个体内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。研究结果为 PT 了解全球老年人群的健康状况提供了背景信息，并可能影响未来针对特定人群的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 内在能力趋势：来自 32 个国家/地区的证据
items.titleEn: Trends in Intrinsic Capacity: Evidence from 32 Countries
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了 32 个国家/地区的内在能力（intrinsic capacity）的变化和时间趋势，以促进健康老龄化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigated changes and temporal trends in intrinsic capacity across 32 countries to promote healthy aging. The findings provide context for PTs regarding the health status of global older populations and may inform future intervention strategies tailored to specific demographics.
items.limitation: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.limitationEn: The study relies on aggregated data and may not capture individual-level variations or specific country contexts accurately. The definition and measurement of 'intrinsic capacity' can also vary.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of the 'All of Us' research program examined sociodemographic determinants of food insecurity and its association with BMI in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 这项针对“All of Us”研究项目中脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，旨在比较食物不安全（FI）的患病率、其社会人口学决定因素以及与身体质量指数（BMI）的关联。这为 PT 了解 SCI 患者的社会经济影响及其对健康结局的潜在作用提供了信息。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤个体食物不安全性的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联：来自“All of Us”研究项目的横断面分析
items.titleEn: Sociodemographic Determinants of Food Insecurity and Its Association with BMI in Individuals with Spinal Cord Injury: A Cross-Sectional Analysis from the All of Us Research Program
items.summaryZh: 一项针对脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的横断面分析，调查了食物不安全（FI）的社会人口学决定因素及其与 BMI 的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional analysis from the 'All of Us' research program, focusing on individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI), aims to compare the prevalence of food insecurity (FI), identify its correlates, and examine its association with body mass index (BMI). This informs PTs about the socioeconomic impacts on SCI patients and their potential role in health outcomes.
items.limitation: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional analysis, which cannot establish causality between food insecurity and BMI or other factors. The study population is specific to participants in the 'All of Us' research program.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summary: This editorial calls for increased attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the field's growing recognition and the demands of high-performance competition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，鉴于电子竞技日益增长的地位（如进入奥运会）。它强调了运动医学、公共卫生和电竞利益相关者需要严肃对待电竞选手心理健康问题。对于 PT，尤其是有志于运动康复的，这是对新兴领域关注点的一个提醒。
items.titleZh: 是时候关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康了
items.titleEn: Time to monitor the mental health of esports athletes
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论呼吁关注电子竞技运动员的心理健康，因为该领域日益受到认可，并且竞技要求严苛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial calls for attention to the mental health of esports athletes, given the growing prominence of esports (e.g., inclusion in the Olympics).
