It emphasizes the need for sports medicine, public health, and esports stakeholders to take player mental health seriously. For PTs, especially those in sports rehabilitation, this serves as a reminder of emerging areas of concern.
items.limitation: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial calling for action and raising awareness, not a research study providing specific data or interventions.

items.title: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summary: This article calls for action on period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence, impact on performance, and the need for tailored management pathways due to existing evidence gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章发出了对女性运动员经期疼痛问题的行动呼吁，强调了其普遍性（影响 60% 的女性运动员）及其对运动表现的负面影响。研究指出当前证据存在空白，呼吁制定针对性的管理方案。这对于关注女性健康和运动表现的 PT 具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员的经期疼痛：行动呼吁——是时候填补证据空白并制定针对性管理方案了
items.titleEn: Period pain in female athletes: a call to action - time to fill the evidence gap and develop tailored management pathways
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章呼吁关注女性运动员的经期疼痛问题，强调其普遍性、对运动表现的影响以及因证据不足而需要制定针对性管理方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article issues a call to action regarding period pain in female athletes, highlighting its prevalence (affecting 60% of female athletes) and negative impact on sports performance. It points out evidence gaps and calls for tailored management pathways. This is significant for PTs focusing on women's health and sports performance.
items.limitation: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is a call to action and perspective piece highlighting an evidence gap, not a research study presenting findings or interventions.

items.title: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summary: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a research priority, emphasizing the importance of muscle power (force x velocity) in childhood for long-term musculoskeletal health and function.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调肌肉力量（而非仅仅是力量）与功能的关系，并呼吁关注儿童期低肌肉力量这一可干预的风险因素。对于儿科 PT，这提示了关注儿童肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.titleZh: 播下力量的种子：儿科肌力不足作为生命历程研究重点
items.titleEn: Planting the seeds of power: paediatric powerpenia as a lifecourse research priority
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了“儿科肌力不足”（paediatric powerpenia）作为一个生命历程研究重点，强调儿童期肌肉力量发展的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes 'paediatric powerpenia' as a lifecourse research priority, highlighting the relationship between muscle power (not just strength) and function, and advocating for attention to low muscle power in childhood as a modifiable risk factor. For pediatric PTs, this emphasizes the importance of monitoring and addressing muscle power development in children.
items.limitation: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial, framing a research priority and concept rather than presenting empirical data or interventions.

items.title: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD thesis explored patient experiences, optimized rehabilitation interventions, and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR), comparing targeted strengthening to standard care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后患者的康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。它研究了患者如何体验康复，比较了强化训练与标准社区康复的效果，并分析了阿片类药物的持续使用。这为 PT 在 THR 翻修后患者的康复管理提供了有价值的见解。
items.titleZh: 翻修全髋关节置换术后的康复与结局：患者体验、优化康复干预与阿片类药物使用（PhD 学术奖）
items.titleEn: Rehabilitation and outcomes following revision total hip replacement: patients experiences, optimised rehabilitation interventions and opioid use (PhD Academy Award)
items.summaryZh: 一项 PhD 研究论文探讨了翻修全髋关节置换术（THR）后的患者康复体验、优化干预措施和阿片类药物使用情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research thesis investigated patient experiences and opioid use following revision total hip replacement (THR). It examined how patients experience rehabilitation, compared targeted strengthening to standard community rehabilitation, and analyzed persistent opioid use. This offers valuable insights for PTs managing patients post-revision THR.
items.limitation: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.
items.limitationEn: This is a summary of a PhD thesis and may not contain the full methodological details or results of the individual studies within it.

items.title: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summary: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to maintain fitness amidst global conflicts, confinement, and potential radiation exposure.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，以应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和辐射暴露等挑战对体能的影响。它借鉴了 COVID-19 期间的经验，并考虑了地缘政治危机下的锻炼维持问题。虽然具有前瞻性，但对 PT 的直接临床指导意义有限。
items.titleZh: 战火下的体能：一个运动与体育医学框架，以在现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露背景下维持体能
items.titleEn: Fitness under fire: a sports and exercise medicine framework to maintain fitness in the context of modern global conflict, enforced confinement and possible radiation exposure
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提出了一个运动与体育医学（SEM）框架，旨在应对现代全球冲突、强制禁闭和可能的辐射暴露对体能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes a sports and exercise medicine (SEM) framework to address the impact of modern global conflicts, enforced confinement, and potential radiation exposure on fitness. It draws on experiences from the COVID-19 pandemic and considers fitness maintenance during geopolitical crises. While forward-looking, its direct clinical guidance for PTs is limited.
items.limitation: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial proposing a framework based on current global challenges, not a research study presenting empirical data or specific interventions.

items.title: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summary: This editorial introduces an open-source tool designed to help researchers in sports and exercise medicine verify and select appropriate academic journals for publication.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论介绍了支持期刊选择的一个开源学术期刊验证工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者在日益拥挤的出版环境中找到合适的期刊。对 PT 研究者来说，这可能有助于论文发表的决策，但与临床实践关系不大。
items.titleZh: 支持期刊选择：一个面向运动与体育医学研究者的开源学术期刊验证工具
items.titleEn: Supporting journal selection: an open-source academic journal verification tool for researchers in sports and exercise medicine
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论介绍了一个开源工具，旨在帮助运动与体育医学领域的研究者验证和选择合适的学术期刊。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial introduces an open-source academic journal verification tool to support journal selection for researchers in sports and exercise medicine navigating a crowded publishing landscape. While potentially aiding PT researchers in publication decisions, it has limited relevance to clinical practice.
items.limitation: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.
items.limitationEn: This is an editorial discussing a tool for journal selection, not a research study or clinical practice guide.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus | British Journal of Sports Medicine
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis on prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female athletes contributes to the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury Prevention (FAIR) consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和Meta分析为女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素提供了高证据等级的总结。你在指导女性运动员进行损伤预防和表现提升时，应将这些发现整合到你的评估和干预方案中，特别关注性别特异性的风险因素。
items.titleZh: 上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素：女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识的系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素的系统综述和Meta分析，为女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides a high-level evidence summary of prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. When guiding female athletes in injury prevention and performance enhancement, you should integrate these findings into your assessment and intervention protocols, paying particular attention to sex-specific risk factors.
items.limitation: 鉴于“早期发表”状态，仍需查阅全文以评估可能的局限性，如研究间的异质性或报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Given its "early publication" status, the full text should still be consulted to assess potential limitations, such as heterogeneity between studies or reporting bias.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (BONEMORE) investigated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women. Both interventions showed effects on physical function.
items.curatedReason: OsteoStrong和动态多组分运动对老年女性的身体功能均有积极影响。但如果原文有明确数据，要看干预的实际效应量，以决定是否值得作为首选推荐。在老年女性骨质疏松干预中，你需要关注这些新型手段的长期疗效和具体适用人群。
items.titleZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验：OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能影响的比较
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验探讨了 OsteoStrong 与动态多组分运动对老年女性身体功能的影响，结果显示两种干预措施均对身体功能有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: OsteoStrong and dynamic multicomponent exercise both positively influence physical function in older women. However, if the original text provides specific data, you need to assess the actual effect sizes of these interventions to determine if they warrant first-line recommendation. For osteoporosis interventions in older women, you should focus on the long-term efficacy and specific populations for whom these novel methods are applicable.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和外推性有待结合具体效应量进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: The clinical significance and generalizability of the findings require further evaluation in conjunction with specific effect sizes.

items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis found a significant cross-education effect (force production gains in the contralateral non-trained limb) after unilateral resistance training in clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 单侧阻力训练的交叉教育效应在临床人群中表现出显著的益处，尤其是在肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者中。在无法进行双侧训练时，这是一个非常有价值的训练策略，现在你可以更有信心地将其纳入康复方案。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后临床人群力量产生能力的交叉教育效应：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，单侧阻力训练后临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中偏瘫患者）的力量产生能力存在显著的交叉教育效应（对侧未训练肢体力量增强）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect of unilateral resistance training shows significant benefits in clinical populations, particularly for musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke. This is a highly valuable training strategy when bilateral training is not feasible, and you can now integrate it into rehabilitation protocols with greater confidence.
items.limitation: 元分析结果异质性高，训练参数（如收缩类型、强度）对效应量的具体贡献尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in meta-analysis results, and the specific contribution of training parameters (e.g., contraction type, intensity) to the effect size remains unclear.

items.title: Preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak
items.summary: The Slava Topol Project (STP) launched a feasibility study for a preventative search and rescue service on Lenin Peak, a 7000 m mountain, aiming to improve safety for climbers following a guide's death in 2022.
items.curatedReason: 列宁峰的预防性搜救服务项目突出了高海拔环境下安全保障的重要性。虽然这与临床实践有距离，但它提醒我们在任何专业场景中，风险评估和预防措施都不可或缺。
items.titleZh: 列宁峰上的预防性搜救服务
items.summaryZh: 为提高列宁峰（一座海拔 7000 米的山峰）登山者的安全性，Slava Topol 项目（STP）启动了一项预防性搜救服务可行性研究，此前在 2022 年曾有一名向导遇难。
items.curatedReasonEn: The preventative search and rescue service project on Lenin Peak highlights the importance of safety in high-altitude environments. While this is somewhat distant from clinical practice, it serves as a reminder that risk assessment and preventative measures are essential in any professional setting.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: This study aimed to validate the Direct Observation of Procedural Skills for knee joint mobilization (DOPSknee) tool for on-site and off-site use in physical therapy education, involving 42 preclinical PT students assessed by two clinical instructors. DOPSknee demonstrated good on-site inter-rater reliability.
items.curatedReason: 评估工具的信效度研究对教育和临床实践工具的标准化有意义。这份研究验证的 DOPSknee 工具可以在临床带教和学生评估中提供即时反馈。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗教育中膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPS）工具的现场和非现场效度与信度
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在验证膝关节松动术程序技能直接观察（DOPSknee）工具在物理治疗教育现场和非现场使用的有效性和可靠性，研究对象为 42 名临床前物理治疗学生，由两名临床导师进行评估。结果显示，DOPSknee 在现场评估中表现出良好的评估者间信度。
items.curatedReasonEn: Validity and reliability studies of assessment tools are crucial for standardizing education and clinical practice. This study validates the DOPSknee tool, which can provide immediate feedback in clinical supervision and student assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅为 PT 学生，其表现可能无法完全代表临床实践中的真实情况。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were only PT students, so their performance may not fully represent real-world clinical practice.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6MWTD, +60 meters vs. usual care at 6 months, p<0.001) and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity in TIA and mild stroke patients compared to usual care over 6 months.
items.curatedReason: 6 个月随访的 RCT 结果提示，对 TIA 或轻度卒中患者，心血管康复在改善运动能力、身体活动和部分生活质量方面优于常规护理。这是你在向患者推荐或向医生转诊时可以引用的强有力证据。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 140 名患者的 RCT 发现，为期 6 周的心血管康复计划在 6 个月时显著改善了短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的功能运动能力（6MWTD 较常规护理增加 60 米，p<0.001）和中高强度身体活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 6-month RCT suggests that cardiovascular rehabilitation is superior to usual care for improving exercise capacity, physical activity, and some quality-of-life aspects in TIA or mild stroke patients. This is strong evidence you can cite when recommending to patients or referring to physicians.
items.limitation: 研究未报告心血管康复对血压、焦虑和抑郁的具体效果。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report specific effects of cardiovascular rehabilitation on blood pressure, anxiety, and depression.

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This single-group feasibility study found that applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach to stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation setting was feasible across recruitment, dose, fidelity, perceived value, benefits, and potential outcomes.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法对卒中幸存者的应用是可行的，尤其在招募、干预依从性和患者接受度方面表现良好。尽管是可行性研究，但它提示了未来大规模 RCT 的潜力。
items.titleZh: 认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复背景下应用于卒中患者的可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项单组可行性研究发现，在丹麦神经康复环境中将认知导向职业表现（CO-OP）方法应用于卒中幸存者是可行的，并在招募、剂量、依从性、感知价值、益处和潜在结果方面表现良好。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors, showing good recruitment, fidelity, and perceived value. Although a feasibility study, it suggests potential for future large-scale RCTs.
items.limitation: 这是一项单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-group pretest-posttest design, lacking a control group to assess actual intervention effects.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 1286 SCI patients found that higher SBP and DBP at admission were associated with higher BMI, lower neurological lesion level, and motor incomplete SCI. Clinically meaningful BP changes were common during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: SCI 患者住院康复期间的血压变化受多种因素影响，出入院时血压数据对长期管理有参考价值。这些发现能帮你更精准地评估和管理这些患者的血压风险。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间血压水平和临床有意义的变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 1286 名脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的回顾性队列研究发现，入院时较高的收缩压和舒张压与较高的 BMI、较低的神经损伤平面和运动不完全性 SCI 相关。住院康复期间临床有意义的血压变化很常见。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure changes during inpatient rehabilitation for SCI patients are influenced by various factors, and admission/discharge data are valuable for long-term management. These findings can help you more precisely assess and manage BP risks in these patients.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study, which may have missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access | APTA
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces access, identifying key challenges in workforce, access, and awareness.
items.curatedReason: APTA的报告揭示了美国盆底健康物理治疗供不应求的现状，并指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的挑战。如果你从事盆底健康PT，这证实了你的专业需求，并为你争取执业范围扩大或政策支持提供了依据。
items.titleZh: APTA报告：盆底健康物理治疗需求超出美国可及性
items.summaryZh: APTA新报告《APTA盆底健康物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底健康物理治疗的需求显著超出可及性，指出了劳动力、可及性和意识方面的主要挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: APTA's report highlights the unmet demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S., identifying workforce, access, and awareness challenges. If you are in pelvic health PT, this affirms the demand for your specialty and provides grounds to advocate for expanded scope of practice or policy support.

items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. It found that exercise positively influences the recovery and prevention of these conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和Meta分析强调了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的积极影响。在为产后女性制定康复计划时，将其作为核心干预措施，并确保方案的证据基础。
items.titleZh: 产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析评估了产后运动对盆底功能障碍和腹直肌分离的影响。研究发现运动对这些疾病的恢复和预防有积极作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the positive impact of postpartum exercise on pelvic floor disorders and diastasis recti abdominis. Incorporate it as a core intervention when developing rehabilitation plans for postpartum women, ensuring evidence-based protocols.
items.limitation: 部分研究可能存在方法学异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: Some included studies may have methodological heterogeneity, affecting generalizability.

items.title: Comparative Outcomes of Circumferential Versus Segmental Labral Reconstruction in Hip Arthroscopy: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared patient-reported outcomes, complications, and reoperation rates between segmental and circumferential labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. The study aims to clarify which technique offers superior clinical outcomes for irreparable acetabular labral pathology.
items.curatedReason: 这项Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下盂唇环形与节段性重建的结局。如果你在评估髋关节盂唇损伤患者的术式选择，该研究为你提供了不同重建技术的疗效、并发症和再手术率的对比证据，有助于你与患者和骨科医生沟通。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下环形与节段性盂唇重建的比较结局：一项系统综述和Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和Meta分析比较了髋关节镜下节段性与环形盂唇重建的患者报告结局、并发症和再手术率。该研究旨在明确哪种技术对不可修复的髋臼盂唇病理提供更优的临床结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis compares outcomes of circumferential vs. segmental labral reconstruction in hip arthroscopy. If you are evaluating surgical options for hip labral tears, this study provides comparative evidence on efficacy, complications, and reoperation rates for different reconstruction techniques, aiding communication with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 纳入研究可能存在异质性，影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The included studies may exhibit heterogeneity, affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Hip Arthroscopic Labral Repair for Femoroacetabular Impingement Yields High Return-to-Sport Rates and Improved Outcomes in Basketball Players
items.summary: A study evaluating 2009-2022 data found that hip arthroscopic labral repair for femoroacetabular impingement in active basketball players resulted in high return-to-sport rates (87%) and improved patient-reported outcome measures (mHHS 87.2, HOS-ADL 94.6, HOS-SS 89.2) at a minimum 2-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，髋关节镜下盂唇修复术能使篮球运动员获得较高的重返运动率和改善的患者报告结局。如果你在为有髋关节撞击症状的篮球运动员制定术后康复计划，这为你提供了积极的预后信息，指导你设定重返运动目标。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下盂唇修复术治疗股骨髋臼撞击使篮球运动员获得高重返运动率和改善的结局
items.summaryZh: 一项评估2009-2022年数据的研究发现，对患有股骨髋臼撞击的活跃篮球运动员进行髋关节镜下盂唇修复术，在至少2年的随访中，取得了高重返运动率（87%）和改善的患者报告结局（mHHS 87.2，HOS-ADL 94.6，HOS-SS 89.2）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that hip arthroscopic labral repair yields high return-to-sport rates and improved patient-reported outcomes in basketball players. If you are developing a post-operative rehabilitation plan for basketball players with hip impingement, this provides positive prognostic information to guide your return-to-sport goals.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性队列研究，且仅限于篮球运动员，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is a retrospective cohort study and limited to basketball players, thus generalizability is limited.

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial | medRxiv
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial evaluated the feasibility and effects of treadmill training (TT) with visual feedback (VF) and TT with VF plus rhythmic auditory cueing (RAC) on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. Both interventions were found feasible and showed positive effects on gait.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，带有视觉反馈和/或节律听觉提示的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者的步态参数改善上是可行的。这为神经康复中的步态训练提供了新的技术辅助方向，你可以考虑在临床实践中探索其应用。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症患者采用节律听觉提示和/或视觉反馈的跑台训练：临床随机对照试验的可行性及对步态参数的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验评估了带有视觉反馈（VF）和VF加节律听觉提示（RAC）的跑台训练在多发性硬化症患者中对步态参数的可行性及效果。研究发现两种干预措施均可行，并对步态产生积极影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for improving gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis. This offers new technology-assisted directions for gait training in neurorehabilitation; consider exploring its application in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的可行性研究，样本量较小，长期效果和更大规模验证仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary feasibility study with a small sample size; long-term effects and larger-scale validation require further research.

items.title: Digital Simulation-Based Ultrasound Training for Physiotherapy Students: Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized blinded study (N=68 physiotherapy students) found that a simulation-based online ultrasound platform was as effective as traditional on-site training for physiotherapy students, with both groups completing identical theoretical and practical assessments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，数字模拟超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生的教学效果相当。如果你在考虑引入远程或数字化教学工具，这项研究支持其在超声教育中的应用潜力。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生数字模拟超声训练：前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机盲法研究（N=68名物理治疗学生）发现，数字模拟在线超声训练平台与传统现场教学对物理治疗学生同样有效，两组均完成了相同的理论和实践评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that digital simulation-based ultrasound training is as effective as traditional on-site instruction for physiotherapy students. If you are considering integrating remote or digital teaching tools, this research supports its potential application in ultrasound education.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是学生学习效果，而非临床操作技能的长期转移和患者结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on student learning outcomes, not the long-term transfer of clinical skills or patient outcomes.

items.title: Risk Factors for Musculoskeletal Injuries in Military Recruits: The Impact of Sex, Body Fat Percentage, and Physical Fitness
items.summary: A prospective interventional study investigated the incidence of musculoskeletal symptoms and injuries in male and female recruits during sixteen weeks of Brazilian Marine Basic Military Training, and assessed the impact of sex, body fat percentage, and physical fitness as risk factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了军事新兵肌肉骨骼损伤的风险因素，特别是性别、体脂百分比和体能的影响。如果你在运动人群中工作，特别是涉及高强度训练或特定性别差异的群体，这能帮助你识别高风险个体，并制定更具针对性的预防策略。
items.titleZh: 军事新兵肌肉骨骼损伤的风险因素：性别、体脂百分比和体能的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性干预研究调查了巴西海军基础军事训练16周期间男女新兵肌肉骨骼症状和损伤的发生率，并评估了性别、体脂百分比和体能作为风险因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study investigates risk factors for musculoskeletal injuries in military recruits, particularly the impact of sex, body fat percentage, and physical fitness. If you work with athletic populations, especially those involved in high-intensity training or with specific sex differences, this can help you identify high-risk individuals and develop more targeted prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究对象是军事新兵，其损伤模式和风险因素可能不完全适用于一般运动人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects are military recruits, whose injury patterns and risk factors may not be fully generalizable to the general athletic population.

items.title: Single leg vertical jump performance identifies knee function deficits ...
items.summary: This original research highlights that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits at return to sport after ACL reconstruction in male athletes, providing a critical objective measure for readiness.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了单腿垂直跳表现能识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。如果你在评估ACL术后患者的重返运动准备情况，应将单腿垂直跳作为关键评估指标之一，以更客观地判断膝关节功能对称性。
items.titleZh: 单腿垂直跳表现可识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项原创研究强调，单腿垂直跳表现可以识别男性运动员ACL重建后重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷，为判断重返运动准备情况提供了一个关键的客观测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study emphasizes that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits in male athletes returning to sport after ACL reconstruction. If you are assessing readiness for return-to-sport in post-ACL patients, include single-leg vertical jump as a key assessment metric to objectively evaluate knee functional symmetry.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于男性运动员，结果不一定适用于女性或其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to male athletes, and the results may not be generalizable to females or other populations.

items.title: Progressing rehabilitation after injury: consider the 'control-chaos ...
items.summary: This article proposes considering the 'control-chaos continuum' when progressing rehabilitation after injury, advocating for a nuanced approach to re-integrating athletes into training and match play while balancing reinjury risk and performance optimization.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章提出了“控制-混沌连续体”的概念，用于指导损伤后康复进展和重返运动。如果你在制定运动员康复方案，可以采纳这个框架，渐进式地引入混沌元素，以更好地模拟运动环境，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 损伤后康复进展：考虑“控制-混沌连续体”
items.summaryZh: 这篇文章提出在损伤后康复进展中考虑“控制-混沌连续体”，主张在将运动员重新整合到训练和比赛中时，采用一种细致入微的方法，平衡再损伤风险与表现优化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article introduces the 'control-chaos continuum' concept for guiding rehabilitation progression and return-to-sport after injury. If you are developing rehabilitation protocols for athletes, adopt this framework to progressively introduce chaotic elements, better simulating sports environments and reducing re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 这是一篇观点文章，而非基于新的研究数据，其指导意义需结合实践经验进行判断。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective article, not based on new research data; its guidance should be evaluated in conjunction with practical experience.

items.title: How does exercise dose affect patients with long-term osteoarthritis ...
items.summary: This study protocol outlines the SWENOR Study, a randomized controlled trial in Sweden and Norway, investigating how exercise dose affects patients with long-term osteoarthritis of the knee.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究协议描述了一项关于运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者的随机对照试验（SWENOR 研究）。如果你关注运动处方在骨关节炎管理中的优化，这将是一项值得关注的未来研究。
items.titleZh: 运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者？一项在瑞典和挪威进行的随机对照试验研究协议：SWENOR 研究
items.summaryZh: 这份研究协议概述了SWENOR研究，这是一项在瑞典和挪威进行的随机对照试验，旨在探讨运动剂量如何影响长期膝骨关节炎患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial (SWENOR Study) on how exercise dose affects patients with long-term knee osteoarthritis. If you are focused on optimizing exercise prescriptions in osteoarthritis management, this will be a future study to watch.

items.title: Efficacy of Tuina in chronic low back pain with anxiety - BMJ Open
items.summary: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial investigating the efficacy of Tuina in treating chronic low back pain with anxiety.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究协议描述了一项关于推拿（Tuina）治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的随机对照试验。如果你对结合传统疗法和心理因素的干预感兴趣，可以关注这项研究的最终结果。
items.titleZh: 推拿治疗伴焦虑慢性腰痛的疗效：一项随机对照试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这是一项随机对照试验的研究方案，旨在调查推拿治疗伴焦虑的慢性腰痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol outlines a randomized controlled trial on the efficacy of Tuina for chronic low back pain with anxiety. If you are interested in interventions combining traditional therapy with psychological factors, you might follow the eventual results of this study.

items.title: Teriparatide as an Adjunct in Managing Delayed Union of Long Bone Fractures: Insights from a Tertiary Care Center
items.summary: A prospective interventional study on 48 adult patients with delayed union of long bone fractures evaluated the efficacy and safety of teriparatide (recombinant human parathyroid hormone) in promoting fracture healing, suggesting its promise as a biological enhancer of bone healing.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性干预研究旨在评估特立帕肽作为长骨骨折延迟愈合的辅助治疗效果。虽然特立帕肽是药物干预，但其对骨愈合的影响间接关系到康复进程，关注这类药物进展，可更好地与医生协同管理患者。
items.titleZh: 特立帕肽作为长骨骨折延迟愈合辅助治疗的见解：来自三级医疗中心的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对48名长骨骨折延迟愈合成年患者的前瞻性干预研究评估了特立帕肽（重组人甲状旁腺激素）在促进骨折愈合方面的疗效和安全性，提示其作为骨愈合生物增强剂的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective interventional study aims to evaluate teriparatide as an adjunct for delayed union of long bone fractures. While teriparatide is a pharmaceutical intervention, its impact on bone healing is indirectly related to the rehabilitation process. Staying informed on such drug advancements allows for better collaborative patient management with physicians.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于单一中心的48名患者，样本量小且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to 48 patients from a single center, with a small sample size and limited generalizability.

items.title: Thrombectomy for Pediatric Large Vessel Occlusion Stroke With Mild Presenting Symptoms
items.summary: A case-control study pooling data from 4 published cohorts aimed to determine if thrombectomy is associated with superior functional outcomes compared with medical management alone in pediatric patients with acute large vessel occlusion (LVO) stroke and mild presenting symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对儿童大血管闭塞性卒中的研究，探讨了血栓切除术在轻度症状患者中的益处。虽然卒中康复是你的核心工作，但了解神经介入治疗的最新进展和适应症，有助于你更早地识别潜在病例，并进行恰当转诊。
items.titleZh: 轻度症状表现的儿童大血管闭塞性卒中血栓切除术
items.summaryZh: 一项汇总了4个已发表队列数据的病例对照研究旨在确定血栓切除术在轻度症状表现的急性大血管闭塞性卒中儿童患者中，是否与单独药物治疗相比具有更优的功能结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on pediatric large vessel occlusion stroke investigates the benefit of thrombectomy in patients with mild presenting symptoms. While stroke rehabilitation is your core work, understanding the latest advancements and indications in neurointerventional treatments helps you identify potential cases earlier and make appropriate referrals.
items.limitation: 这是一项病例对照研究，而非随机对照试验，存在选择偏倚的风险。
items.limitationEn: This is a case-control study, not a randomized clinical trial, carrying a risk of selection bias.

items.title: Efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting: a randomized controlled trial | BMC Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated whether adjunctive remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) improves cerebral blood flow (CBF) regulation and reduces the risk of postoperative stroke in patients undergoing endovascular stenting for cerebrovascular stenosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验旨在评估远程缺血预处理（RIC）对脑血管支架置入术患者脑血流调节的疗效。虽然RIC是医疗干预，但了解其对脑血流改善的潜力，有助于你更好地理解和参与卒中预防和康复早期的跨学科管理。
items.titleZh: 远程缺血预处理对血管内支架置入术患者脑血流调节的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验旨在调查辅助性远程缺血预处理（RIC）是否能改善脑血管狭窄血管内支架置入术患者的脑血流（CBF）调节，并降低术后卒中风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial aims to evaluate the efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning (RIC) on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting. While RIC is a medical intervention, understanding its potential for improving cerebral blood flow helps you better comprehend and participate in interdisciplinary management of stroke prevention and early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是RIC对脑血流调节的短期生理效应，而非直接的临床功能结局。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on the short-term physiological effects of RIC on cerebral blood flow regulation, not direct clinical functional outcomes.

items.title: Lipid metabolism, microglia, and stroke
items.summary: This review explores the new scope of microglia and lipids in immune regulation of stroke, discussing advances in microglia-lipid interaction and the implication of peripheral lipid metabolism after stroke. It highlights their important roles in post-stroke immunity.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了脂质代谢、小胶质细胞与卒中之间的关系，揭示了卒中后免疫调节的新视角。作为物理治疗师，了解神经炎症和代谢因素在卒中病理生理中的作用，有助于你更全面地理解康复过程的生物学基础。
items.titleZh: 脂质代谢、小胶质细胞与卒中
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述探讨了小胶质细胞和脂质在卒中免疫调节中的新视角，讨论了小胶质细胞-脂质相互作用的进展以及卒中后外周脂质代谢的影响，强调了它们在卒中后免疫中的重要作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores the relationship between lipid metabolism, microglia, and stroke, revealing new perspectives on post-stroke immune regulation. As a physical therapist, understanding the role of neuroinflammation and metabolic factors in stroke pathophysiology helps you more comprehensively grasp the biological basis of the rehabilitation process.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述文章，主要基于现有研究的总结，不提供新的临床干预数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review article, primarily summarizing existing research, and does not provide new clinical intervention data.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies, involving 645 informants, identified significant psychological and social impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, extending beyond physical impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项高质量证据合成深入揭示了卒中后吞咽困难对患者心理社会影响的广度和深度。你在制定康复计划时，除了生理功能外，也必须重视并解决这些情感和社会参与障碍。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的心理社会影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 22 项研究、涉及 645 名受访者的定性证据合成发现，卒中后吞咽困难除了生理障碍外，还会产生显著的心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This high-quality evidence synthesis deeply reveals the breadth and depth of psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties. When developing rehabilitation plans, you must not only focus on physiological function but also address these emotional and social participation barriers.
items.limitation: 本综述纳入的原始研究异质性可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: The heterogeneity of the included primary studies may affect the integrated interpretation of the results.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the expectations and experiences of hip or knee osteoarthritis patients regarding physical therapist-led triage in a Swedish orthopedic clinic, finding that while care quality was perceived as good, patient participation in decision-making and fulfillment of assessment expectations were lower.
items.curatedReason: 骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导的分诊（PT-led triage）期望值高，但对决策参与度和评估满足度较低。这意味着即便 PT 主导分诊能提高就诊可及性，患者体验设计也需优化，不能只关注诊疗结果。
items.titleZh: 膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望与体验
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了瑞典骨科诊所中，膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。研究发现，虽然患者认为护理质量良好，但他们在决策参与度和评估期望满足度方面较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with OA have high expectations for PT-led triage, but report lower satisfaction with decision-making participation and assessment fulfillment. This suggests that while PT-led triage improves access, patient experience design needs optimization beyond just clinical outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究采用探索性定性设计，样本量小，结果的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study used an exploratory qualitative design with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study compared the accuracy of stride count estimation across multiple wearable sensor configurations (wrists, hips, ankles) and data processing algorithms in 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults against a gold-standard instrumented treadmill across various walking speeds.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项在卒中患者和健康成年人中验证可穿戴步数追踪器准确性的重要研究。其详细的传感器配置和步行速度比较，能帮你更好地理解和选择临床步态评估工具。
items.titleZh: 多可穿戴传感器配置下步数估算对卒中后和健康成人身体活动的量化：一项验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项验证研究比较了 18 名卒中后患者和 18 名健康成人在不同步行速度下，多种可穿戴传感器配置（腕部、髋部、踝部）及数据处理算法估算步数的准确性，并与金标准仪器化跑步机进行了对比。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a crucial validation study on the accuracy of wearable step trackers in post-stroke and healthy adults. Its detailed comparison of sensor configurations and walking speeds will help you better understand and select clinical gait assessment tools.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，可能限制了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size, which may limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial provides an update to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论跟进了 2018 年 IOC 关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明，概述了新的研究进展和挑战。它提供了儿科 ACL 损伤预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期护理的最新视角，能帮助你与患者和外科医生进行更深入的讨论。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿科 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理视野
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论更新了 2018 年国际奥委会关于儿科 ACL 损伤的共识声明，审视了预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期整体护理方面的最新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial follows up on the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, outlining new research advances and challenges. It provides the latest perspectives on pediatric ACL injury prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care, enabling you to engage in deeper discussions with patients and surgeons.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with prevalence estimates by searching PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus, Web of Science, and SportDiscus up to December 2024.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。它为你提供了运动员心理健康的最新证据，能帮助你筛查高风险运动员并制定预防策略。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员在不同训练水平和评估方法下饮食失调和紊乱饮食的患病率，并通过检索 PubMed/MEDLINE、Scopus、Web of Science 和 SportDiscus 至 2024 年 12 月，识别了与患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes and identified associated moderators. It provides you with the latest evidence on athlete mental health, helping you screen high-risk athletes and develop prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究纳入的原始研究可能存在异质性，影响荟萃分析结果的解释。
items.limitationEn: The included primary studies may have heterogeneity, affecting the interpretation of meta-analysis results.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined that admission Berg Balance Scale scores independently predict independent walking at discharge, and derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke using multivariable logistic regression.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究确定了入院时 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）评分可预测卒中患者出院时的独立行走能力，并提供了缺血性与出血性卒中的亚型特异性最佳截点值。这能帮助你更精准地进行早期预后判断和康复方案制定。
items.titleZh: 卒中住院康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截点值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 565 名卒中患者进行的多中心回顾性队列研究发现，入院时 Berg 平衡量表评分能独立预测出院时的独立行走能力，并通过多变量逻辑回归推导出了缺血性与出血性卒中的亚型特异性最佳截点值。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study determined that admission Berg Balance Scale (BBS) scores independently predict independent walking at discharge for stroke patients and provided subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke. This can help you make more precise early prognostic judgments and rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 研究是回顾性队列设计，可能存在数据缺失和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study was a retrospective cohort design, potentially having missing data and confounding factors.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A cross-organizational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process generated recommendations for the tennis community on providing mental healthcare and promoting mental wellness among elite tennis athletes, including juniors, involving 83 participants from various governing bodies and the broader tennis ecosystem.
items.curatedReason: 这项由多组织参与的共识研究，为网球运动员（包括青少年精英）的心理健康护理和促进提供了建议。它代表了行业内对这一关键领域的最新集体智慧，指导你为运动员提供更全面的支持。
items.titleZh: 网球运动员心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程为网球界在精英网球运动员（包括青少年运动员）的心理健康护理和健康促进方面提出了建议，共有来自各管理机构和更广泛网球生态系统的 83 名参与者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-organizational consensus study provides recommendations for mental healthcare and mental wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors. It represents the latest collective wisdom in the industry on this critical area, guiding you to provide more comprehensive support for athletes.
items.limitation: Delphi 共识过程依赖专家意见，可能受专家构成和潜在偏见影响。
items.limitationEn: The Delphi consensus process relies on expert opinions, which may be influenced by expert composition and potential biases.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: This prospective observational study monitored 4450 athletes during the 14-day Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, reporting injury and illness epidemiology, including incidence (8.6 per 1000 athlete days), prevalence (10.9%), and sport-specific risks (e.g., Taekwondo 27.3).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了 2024 年巴黎残奥会的损伤和疾病流行病学数据，包括特定运动的风险。这些数据能帮助你了解残奥运动员的独特损伤模式，从而更有效地制定预防和康复策略。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会损伤和疾病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与特定运动风险
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究在 2024 年巴黎残奥会期间监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了损伤和疾病的流行病学数据，包括发生率（每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例）、患病率（10.9%）以及特定运动风险（例如跆拳道 27.3）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides epidemiological data on injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, including sport-specific risks. This data can help you understand the unique injury patterns of Paralympic athletes, allowing for more effective prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究的监测周期仅限于赛事期间，无法评估长期损伤风险。
items.limitationEn: The study's monitoring period was limited to the Games, preventing assessment of long-term injury risks.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement
items.summary: This study aims to determine the effect of mandatory bundled payment for inpatient lower extremity joint replacement on the delivery of preoperative rehabilitation (prehabilitation).
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在评估强制性捆绑式支付对下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）交付的影响。这对美国的 PT 执业者非常重要，因为报销模式的改变直接影响你提供服务的方式和收入。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在确定针对住院下肢关节置换的强制性捆绑支付对术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to evaluate the impact of mandatory bundled payments on prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement. This is highly relevant for US PT practitioners, as changes in reimbursement models directly affect how you deliver services and your revenue.
items.limitation: 研究设计或方法在摘要中未详细说明，无法评估潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study design or methods were not detailed in the abstract, preventing assessment of potential biases.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: This quasi-experimental study explored the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting in Thailand, and examined preliminary language performance outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究提示音乐疗法与传统言语治疗相结合，对卒中后失语症患者具有可行性，并显示出初步积极效果。作为早期证据，它值得你关注，但还需要更强力的证据来指导常规实践。
items.titleZh: 音乐疗法整合至卒中后失语症常规言语语言康复的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 这项准实验研究探讨了在泰国门诊环境下，将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言治疗中的可行性，并考察了初步的语言表现结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study suggests the feasibility of integrating music therapy with conventional speech therapy for post-stroke aphasia, showing preliminary positive outcomes. As early evidence, it warrants your attention, but stronger evidence is needed for routine practice guidance.
items.limitation: 该研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, may be subject to selection bias.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial highlights the critical role of organizational leadership in fostering athlete mental health, advocating for proactive, systemic approaches beyond reactive crisis management, given that up to one-third of elite athletes experience mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论强调了组织领导在促进运动员心理健康方面的重要性。它提醒你，在精英运动员康复中，除了身体健康，心理健康也需要系统性的主动干预和支持，而不仅仅是被动应对。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调了组织领导力在促进运动员心理健康方面的关键作用，倡导采取积极主动的系统性方法，而非被动的危机管理，鉴于高达三分之一的精英运动员会经历心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights the importance of organizational leadership in promoting athlete mental health. It reminds you that in elite athlete rehabilitation, mental health requires systematic, proactive intervention and support, not just reactive responses, in addition to physical health.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This commentary identifies monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport as a significant challenge in ACL injury research and practice, noting that despite meeting return-to-sport criteria, athletes often experience long-term neuromuscular and sport performance impairments.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论文章指出，ACL 损伤运动员在重返运动后，监测其表现状态是一个重要挑战。它强调了即便通过了重返运动标准，运动员仍可能存在长期功能障碍，你需要更关注其重返竞技表现的长期监测和干预。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返运动后的表现状态是一项重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章指出，在 ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返运动后的表现状态是一项重大挑战，并指出尽管符合重返运动标准，运动员常会经历长期的神经肌肉和运动表现障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury is a significant challenge. It emphasizes that even after passing return-to-sport criteria, athletes may still experience long-term functional impairments, urging you to focus more on long-term monitoring and intervention for their return to performance.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including time to return-to-training, return-to-full-training, and return-to-full-performance, using Cox regression models.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究识别了运动员在病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动（RTS）结果的相关因素。它为你提供了关于不同疾病严重程度和病原体组如何影响运动员恢复时间的具体数据，指导你进行更合理的重返训练和比赛决策。
items.titleZh: 病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员重返运动结果相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 114 名病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究，通过 Cox 回归模型，识别了与重返运动（包括重返训练、重返全面训练和重返全面表现所需时间）结果相关的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study identified factors associated with return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes. It provides you with specific data on how different illness severities and pathogen groups affect athlete recovery times, guiding you to make more reasonable return-to-training and competition decisions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对有限，且结局指标主要依赖自我报告。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively limited, and outcome measures primarily rely on self-reporting.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: This PhD research explored the in vivo responses of the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system, specifically the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, under different heat stress conditions, to understand the effects of passive heat exposure, acute heat exposure during running, and active heat acclimation.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究探索了热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响，特别是对腓肠肌-肌腱单元的响应。它能帮你理解在高温环境下运动员的生理变化，从而优化训练和康复方案。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 这项博士研究探索了在不同热应激条件下，神经肌肉和肌肉肌腱系统（特别是腓肠肌内侧肌腱单元）的体内反应，以理解被动热暴露、跑步时急性热暴露和主动热适应的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research explored the impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics, specifically focusing on the gastrocnemius-tendon unit's response. It can help you understand physiological changes in athletes during hot environments, thereby optimizing training and rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注单一肌肉-肌腱单元（腓肠肌），外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on a single muscle-tendon unit (gastrocnemius), so generalizability may be limited.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review characterized populations and clinical contexts where the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) has been applied in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation, mapping assessment protocol heterogeneity and identifying methodological gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇关于增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中应用的范围综述。它描绘了 eGVI 的应用现状和方法学差距，帮你理解这一指标的潜力和局限性，但不直接提供临床决策。
items.titleZh: 增强型步态变异性指数在神经和老年康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述描述了增强型步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中的应用人群和临床情境，绘制了评估方案的异质性，并指出了方法学上的差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a scoping review on the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. It outlines the current applications and methodological gaps of eGVI, helping you understand its potential and limitations, but does not directly guide clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估，且可能遗漏非出版文献。
items.limitationEn: Scoping reviews do not assess study quality and may miss unpublished literature.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A correction was issued for the ACTIVATE consensus study, initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy, regarding physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals, specifically correcting Reference 57.
items.curatedReason: ACTIVATE 是由国际运动物理治疗联合会（IFSPT）发起的一项关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、处方和推广身体活动的共识研究。它提醒你 PT 在促进患者身体活动中的关键作用，但这不是新发指南，只是一个修正。
items.titleZh: 更正：ACTIVATE——国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中进行身体活动评估、处方和推广的共识研究
items.summaryZh: 国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的 ACTIVATE 共识研究发布了一项更正，涉及医疗专业人员在临床实践中进行身体活动评估、处方和推广，具体修正了参考文献 57。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACTIVATE is a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy (IFSPT) on physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals. It reminds you of the crucial role of PTs in promoting patient physical activity, but this is a correction, not a new guideline.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on athletes' mental health, highlighting both the risks and opportunities, particularly for young athletes, and suggesting directions for future research and practice.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响，包括风险和机遇。它提醒你在康复过程中，要考虑运动员的数字社交环境对其身心发展的影响，尤其是在青少年群体中。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的两面影响，尤其强调了对年轻运动员的风险与机遇，并提出了未来研究和实践的方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial explores the impact of social media on athlete mental health, including both risks and opportunities. It reminds you to consider the influence of athletes' digital social environments on their physical and mental development during rehabilitation, especially among adolescents.

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey across five pre-competition medical centers in Cameroon assessed the knowledge, attitudes, and practices of professional football stakeholders regarding sudden cardiac arrest preparedness, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项在喀麦隆足球界进行的横断面调查评估了心源性猝死（SCA）的准备情况。它揭示了低资源运动环境中 SCA 应对系统的差距，提醒你即便在资源有限的地区，PT 也有责任推动紧急预案的改进。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球心源性猝死准备情况：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆五个赛前医疗中心进行的横断面调查评估了职业足球利益相关者对心源性猝死的知识、态度和实践，识别了低资源体育环境中心源性猝死准备工作的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional survey in Cameroonian football assessed sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness. It reveals gaps in SCA response systems in low-resource sports environments, reminding you that PTs have a responsibility to advocate for improvements in emergency preparedness, even in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面调查，无法评估干预措施的有效性或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional survey, it cannot assess the effectiveness of interventions or causality.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic highlights the importance of video analysis for understanding qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sport, crucial for developing effective injury prevention and rehabilitation strategies, given the complexity of muscle injury etiology.
items.curatedReason: 这张信息图强调了通过视频分析来理解运动中肌肉拉伤的定性与定量情境特征的重要性。它提醒你，在制定预防和康复策略时，应利用视频分析工具深入理解损伤机制。
items.titleZh: 信息图。运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌群的定性与定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这张信息图强调了视频分析在理解运动中肌肉拉伤的定性与定量情境特征方面的重要性，鉴于肌肉损伤病因的复杂性，这对制定有效的损伤预防和康复策略至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic highlights the importance of video analysis for understanding qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics of muscle strains in sports. It reminds you to use video analysis tools to gain a deeper understanding of injury mechanisms when developing prevention and rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia, assessed physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals from April to May 2025, using a structured questionnaire and medical record review.
items.curatedReason: 这项埃塞俄比亚的横断面研究提供了卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及其相关因素的区域数据。它有助于你了解不同地域的康复资源可及性，但结论不直接适用于美国或中国市场。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚贡德尔镇卒中幸存者物理治疗服务利用及其相关因素研究
items.summaryZh: 这项在埃塞俄比亚贡德尔镇进行的横断面研究，通过结构化问卷和病历回顾，评估了 2025 年 4 月至 5 月期间卒中幸存者就诊医院的物理治疗服务利用情况及相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study from Ethiopia provides regional data on physiotherapy service utilization and associated factors among stroke survivors. It helps you understand rehabilitation resource accessibility in different geographies, but its conclusions are not directly applicable to the US or Chinese markets.
items.limitation: 作为一项横断面研究，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: In 27 stroke patients, both spatial (matching step length) and temporal (matching step timing) prioritized verbal instructions significantly improved spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to no prioritization, with distinct effects on step length and timing symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 针对卒中步态不对称，空间优先（匹配步长）和时间优先（匹配步频）指令都改善了步态对称性，但影响的具体参数不同。临床中可依此微调言语指令，但别过度强调，短期试验。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者空间和时间优先言语指令对步态时空参数的影响：一项受试者内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的研究显示，与无优先指令相比，空间优先（匹配步长）和时间优先（匹配步频）的言语指令均显著改善了步态时空参数，且对步长和步态对称性有不同的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: For stroke gait asymmetry, both spatial (matching step length) and temporal (matching step timing) prioritized instructions improved gait symmetry, though affecting different parameters. Clinicians can refine verbal cues based on this, but don't overemphasize given the short-term trial.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=27），且是单一时间点的短期效应观察。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (n=27) and observed only short-term, single-time-point effects.

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in mass-start cycling sports to provide deeper insights into race incident severity beyond traditional injury incidence measures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提出的自行车赛事故复合严重程度评分框架，为运动康复临床医师和研究者评估和分类自行车相关事件提供了新工具。这有助于更系统地理解损伤机制和预防策略，尤其是在集体出发、高速骑行背景下。
items.titleZh: 自行车赛中与竞赛相关的事故复合严重程度评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出了一个用于集体出发自行车赛事故监测的严重程度框架，旨在提供超越传统损伤发生率测量的更深层事故严重程度洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study's proposed composite severity score framework for race-related incidents in cycling offers a new tool for sports rehabilitation clinicians and researchers to assess and classify cycling events. This will aid in a more systematic understanding of injury mechanisms and prevention strategies, particularly in mass-start, high-speed cycling contexts.
items.limitation: 本研究仅提出了一个评分框架，未进行实际验证和广泛应用评估。
items.limitationEn: This study only proposed a scoring framework, without actual validation or extensive application assessment.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) assessed safeguarding structures and readiness to respond to interpersonal violence, identifying common challenges despite high officer appointment rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲各国奥委会（NOCs）的调查揭示了运动中人际暴力保障机制的现状和差距。作为运动康复领域的从业者，你应了解这些结构性问题，并思考如何在自己的实践中更好地识别、报告和支持受害者，确保运动员的安全。
items.titleZh: 准备好应对了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会（NOCs）的横断面调查评估了人际暴力保障结构和响应准备情况，尽管保障官员任命率高，但仍识别出常见挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) reveals the status and gaps in safeguarding structures against interpersonal violence in sports. As a practitioner in sports rehabilitation, you should understand these structural issues and consider how to better identify, report, and support victims in your practice to ensure athlete safety.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于自我报告数据，可能存在报告偏差。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional survey relying on self-reported data, which may introduce reporting bias.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This article discusses the need for technology, health, and performance integration in boxing to move beyond subjective judging and intuition-based training, especially concerning traumatic brain injury management.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了拳击运动中头部损伤的严重性和现有管理策略的局限性，并呼吁引入技术和数据驱动的方法。这提醒运动康复医师在拳击运动员的伤病管理和预防中应积极探索更科学、更个性化的干预手段。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 本文讨论了拳击运动中整合技术、健康与表现的必要性，以超越主观评判和基于直觉的训练，尤其是在创伤性脑损伤管理方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective highlights the severity of head injuries in boxing and the limitations of current management strategies, advocating for technology and data-driven approaches. This reminds sports rehabilitation clinicians to actively explore more scientific and personalized interventions in the injury management and prevention of boxers.
items.limitation: 本研究为一篇述评，不包含原始研究数据，仅代表作者观点。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective piece, not containing original research data, and represents only the authors' views.

items.title: Pioneering programme launched to test breakthrough spinal treatment in UK rehab centres - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: The UK has launched a pioneering program to test the ARC-EX system, the first dedicated treatment for paralysis approved by UK regulators, which combines targeted electrical spinal cord stimulation with rehabilitation exercises to restore strength and movement in spinal cord injury patients.
items.curatedReason: 英国率先推出开创性脊髓治疗 ARC-EX 系统，结合靶向电刺激和康复运动，帮助脊髓损伤患者恢复力量和运动。这对你来说是重大进展，预示着新的辅助技术将进入临床，可提升脊髓损伤康复的疗效。
items.titleZh: 英国康复中心推出开创性项目，测试突破性脊髓治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 英国推出一项开创性项目，旨在测试 ARC-EX 系统——英国监管机构批准的首个针对瘫痪的专用治疗方案。该系统结合了靶向电脊髓刺激与康复运动，以帮助脊髓损伤患者恢复力量和运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: The UK has launched the groundbreaking ARC-EX system for spinal treatment, combining targeted electrical stimulation with rehabilitation exercises to help spinal cord injury patients regain strength and movement. This is a significant development for you, signaling new assistive technologies entering clinical practice that can enhance the efficacy of spinal cord injury rehabilitation.

items.title: Understanding the clinical profile of patients with frozen shoulder
items.summary: This longitudinal multicenter observational study (n=NA) characterized the clinical profile of patients with frozen shoulder, contributing to a better understanding of its progression and symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 冻结肩的临床特征复杂，不同阶段的进展和症状表现各异。这项观察性研究提供了更全面的疾病画像，提醒你在评估和诊断时要考虑其多变性，避免“一刀切”的治疗方法。
items.titleZh: 了解冻结肩患者的临床特征：一项纵向多中心观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项纵向多中心观察性研究（n=NA）描述了冻结肩患者的临床特征，有助于更好地理解其进展和症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Frozen shoulder presents with complex clinical features, with varying progression and symptoms across different stages. This observational study provides a more comprehensive disease profile, reminding you to consider its variability during assessment and diagnosis, avoiding a one-size-fits-all approach.
items.limitation: 作为一项观察性研究，它描述了冻结肩的临床特征，但不能建立因果关系，也无法评估特定干预措施的疗效。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it describes the clinical profile of frozen shoulder but cannot establish causality or evaluate the efficacy of specific interventions.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This article reviews neurorobotics for neurorehabilitation, covering current clinical applications and identifying future research directions, highlighting the evolving role of robotics in neurological recovery.
items.curatedReason: 神经康复领域正迅速被神经机器人技术改变。你应关注这些前沿进展，因为机器人辅助治疗将越来越普遍。提前了解其临床应用和局限性，能帮助你更好地规划未来的执业方向和技术学习。
items.titleZh: 神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用及未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本文综述了神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用，并指明了未来的研究方向，突出了机器人技术在神经恢复中日益重要的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: The field of neurorehabilitation is rapidly being transformed by neurorobotics. You should pay attention to these cutting-edge advancements, as robot-assisted therapy will become increasingly prevalent. Understanding its clinical applications and limitations in advance will help you better plan your future practice and technical learning.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，其内容可能侧重于技术介绍和展望，而非提供新的临床实践证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, and its content may focus on technological introductions and outlooks rather than providing new clinical practice evidence.

items.title: Ethical Considerations Toward Harmonizing Human and Machine Agency in Embodied Neurotechnologies | Neuroethics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research explores ethical considerations for harmonizing human and machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies, such as medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, which enhance functional independence in neurological patients through AI-driven intent detection and action automation.
items.curatedReason: 这篇研究讨论了具身神经技术（如医用外骨骼、神经假肢）中人机智能伦理问题。作为神经康复专家，你需要关注这类技术的伦理框架，这不仅影响技术应用，也关乎患者自主权和治疗公平性。
items.titleZh: 具身神经技术中人机智能和谐化的伦理考量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了具身神经技术（如医用外骨骼和神经假肢）中人机智能和谐化的伦理考量，这些技术通过人工智能驱动的意图检测和行动自动化增强了神经患者的功能独立性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This research discusses the ethical considerations of human-machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies (e.g., medical exoskeletons, neuroprostheses). As a neurorehabilitation specialist, you need to pay attention to the ethical framework of these technologies, as it affects not only technological application but also patient autonomy and treatment equity.
items.limitation: 本研究为伦理学方面的述评，不涉及临床疗效或技术开发，其主要价值在于引发对未来技术应用的思考。
items.limitationEn: This study is an ethical commentary, not involving clinical efficacy or technological development, and its main value lies in prompting reflection on future technological applications.

items.title: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation
items.summary: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule (TXC), a traditional Chinese medicine, is suggested to ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation, showing potential in mitigating stroke-associated pneumonia and preserving blood-brain barrier integrity.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明通腑醒神胶囊（TXC）可能通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中。尽管是中药研究，了解其潜在机制有助于你关注中西医结合康复策略的未来发展。
items.titleZh: 通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症改善缺血性卒中
items.summaryZh: 传统中药通腑醒神胶囊（TXC）被认为通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中，显示出在减轻卒中相关肺炎和保护血脑屏障完整性方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule (TXC) may ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation. Although it's a traditional Chinese medicine study, understanding its potential mechanisms can help you stay informed about future developments in integrated Western and Chinese medicine rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究的详细方法和结果未在摘要中充分披露，且为药物研究，其直接临床实践指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The detailed methods and results of this study are not fully disclosed in the abstract, and as a pharmaceutical study, its direct clinical practice guidance is limited.

items.title: Serum Biomarkers in Paediatric Neurosurgery: Traumatic Brain Injury and Beyond | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This review discusses the role of serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, particularly in traumatic brain injury (TBI) and beyond, highlighting their potential for diagnosis, prognosis, and therapeutic monitoring.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了血清生物标志物在儿科神经外科（包括创伤性脑损伤）中的应用。作为物理治疗师，了解这些生物标志物的研究进展，有助于你更好地理解 TBI 等儿童神经损伤的病理生理学，并与医疗团队协作。
items.titleZh: 儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物：创伤性脑损伤及其他
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述讨论了血清生物标志物在儿科神经外科中的作用，特别是创伤性脑损伤（TBI）及其他领域，强调了它们在诊断、预后和治疗监测方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: Serum biomarkers show great potential in pediatric neurosurgery, especially in the diagnosis and prognostic assessment of pediatric TBI. As a physical therapist, even if you don't directly use these markers, understanding them can help you better comprehend the extent of neurological injury and recovery potential in children, thereby optimizing your rehabilitation strategies and communicating effectively with the medical team.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，主要关注生物标志物在诊断和预后中的应用，不直接提供康复干预的证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, primarily focusing on the application of biomarkers in diagnosis and prognosis, and does not directly provide evidence for rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis (n=62,217 Medicare beneficiaries) found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model impacted the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement.
items.curatedReason: 强制捆绑支付（CJR）模式对美国 Medicare 受益人的下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付产生了影响。这项研究告诉你，在新的报销环境下，如何调整服务模式以确保患者能获得术前康复。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项双重差分分析（涉及62,217名 Medicare 受益人）发现，全面关节置换护理 (CJR) 捆绑支付模式影响了提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: The mandatory bundled payment (CJR) model has impacted prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement among Medicare beneficiaries in the US. This study informs you on how to adapt service models in new reimbursement environments to ensure patients receive prehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究基于 Medicare 索赔数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有临床实践细节，且结果仅适用于美国 Medicare 系统。
items.limitationEn: The study is based on Medicare claims data, which may not fully capture all clinical practice details, and results are applicable only to the US Medicare system.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: This study developed evidence-based physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection through an explorative literature search and a two-stage consensus procedure involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists.
items.curatedReason: 这份基于专家共识的协议为巨型假体置换术后骨肿瘤患者提供了物理治疗方案，填补了该领域实践依据的空白。尽管是共识而非高级别证据，但你可以将其作为规范临床实践的起点。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过探索性文献检索和两阶段的骨科肿瘤外科医生与物理治疗师共识程序，制定了骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This expert consensus protocol provides much-needed physical therapy guidelines for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection. While not an RCT, it offers a valuable starting point for standardizing care in this complex patient population.
items.limitation: 本协议基于专家共识和探索性文献检索，缺乏随机对照试验等高级别证据支持。
items.limitationEn: This protocol is based on expert consensus and an exploratory literature search, lacking support from high-level evidence like RCTs.

items.title: Correction: Body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals: a systematic review with meta-analysis
items.summary: Mendes Sieczkowska S, Caruso Mazzolani B, Reis Coimbra D, et al Body composition and physical fitness in transgender vs cisgender individuals: a systematic review with meta-analysis. Br J Sports Med 2
items.curatedReason: 这项勘误纠正了关于跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述。它强调了在解读研究时，对纳入/排除标准保持警惕的重要性。
items.titleZh: 勘误：跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 此勘误纠正了《英国运动医学杂志》2026年第60卷第198-210页发表的关于跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述，移除了三项未完全符合纳入标准的研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This correction addresses a systematic review on body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals. It underscores the importance of vigilance regarding inclusion/exclusion criteria when interpreting research.

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, highlighting a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocols between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述强调了慢性卒中上肢康复领域，尤其是在对侧 C7 神经移植和高剂量/技术辅助康复之间，康复方案缺乏直接比较和详细描述。这意味着目前临床实践中很多方案的疗效比较尚无高等级证据支持，为未来研究指明了方向。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项针对有无神经移植患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述识别了慢性卒中康复策略中的差距，尤其指出对侧 C7 神经移植与技术辅助/高剂量康复之间在康复方案的直接比较和详细描述方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocol descriptions in chronic stroke upper limb rehabilitation, especially between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and high-dose/technology-assisted rehabilitation. This implies that many current clinical practices lack high-level evidence for comparative efficacy, pointing to clear directions for future research.
items.limitation: 综述指出，现有研究缺乏对康复剂量、内容和交付模式的详细描述和直接比较，限制了综合评估和明确建议的能力。
items.limitationEn: The review points out that existing studies lack detailed descriptions and direct comparisons of rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models, limiting its ability to provide comprehensive assessment and clear recommendations.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital found that musculoskeletal disorders are common, with diverse patterns and associated costs. Treatment effectiveness for pain was calculated.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的真实世界研究揭示了肌肉骨骼疾病在当地的患病率、治疗模式、效果及成本。尽管样本量大，但作为回顾性观察研究，其证据等级不足以指导临床干预决策，更多是提供背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果与成本
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚一所大学教学医院 1582 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者进行的长达 10 年回顾性研究发现，该类疾病患病率高，模式多样，并涉及可观的治疗成本和疼痛干预效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This real-world study from Nigeria provides insights into the prevalence, treatment patterns, effectiveness, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders locally. While the sample size is large, as a retrospective observational study, its evidence level is not sufficient to guide clinical intervention decisions but rather offers valuable background information.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察性设计，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素风险，且数据来源单一，限制了结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study is a retrospective observational design, which carries risks of selection bias and confounding factors. The single data source also limits the generalizability of its conclusions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This protocol describes an N-of-1 trial using an mHealth intervention with behavior change techniques to improve physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older patients with cancer, employing a single-subject ABA' design.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，目前尚无结果。如果后续证实 mHealth 行为干预有效，这能提示我们居家康复的老年癌症患者，可考虑用这种个性化、基于技术的方案来改善体力活动和营养状况。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者体力活动和营养的移动健康干预：一项 N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 这项方案描述了一项 N-of-1 试验，旨在通过采用单受试者 ABA' 设计的移动健康干预和行为改变技术，改善老年癌症患者的体力活动和营养行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol, with no results yet. If subsequent findings confirm mHealth behavioral interventions are effective, it would suggest that older cancer patients in home-based rehabilitation could consider such personalized, technology-based approaches to improve physical activity and nutritional status.
items.limitation: N-of-1 试验虽能提供个体化证据，但其小样本量和单中心设计限制了结果的普适性，外推至更广泛人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: While N-of-1 trials provide individualized evidence, their small sample size and single-center design limit generalizability. Extrapolating to broader populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients found that incomplete routine cognitive assessments can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使卒中后认知评估数据不完整，通过特定方法仍能提取出具有临床意义的关系，这对于数据不完善的临床环境有实用价值。但请记住，不完整数据下的结论仍需谨慎对待。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名急性期后卒中患者进行的回顾性队列研究发现，即使常规认知评估数据不完整，仍能从中恢复认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that even with incomplete post-stroke cognitive assessment data, clinically interpretable relationships can be extracted using specific methods, offering practical value for settings with imperfect data. However, exercise caution with conclusions drawn from incomplete datasets.
items.limitation: 研究依赖回顾性数据，可能存在记录偏倚和未记录的混杂因素，且结果的解释性仍需临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on retrospective data, which may involve recording bias and unrecorded confounding factors, and the interpretability of the results requires further clinical validation.

items.title: Cognitive Rehabilitation Improves Functional Outcomes in Adults With Post-COVID Cognitive Impairment: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that cognitive rehabilitation led to significantly greater and sustained improvements in functional goal attainment compared to usual care in adults with post-COVID cognitive impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 确认认知康复能显著改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍患者的功能结局，并且效果持续。您可以将其作为这类患者的标准干预措施，并积极推荐。
items.titleZh: 研究发现认知康复可改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍成年患者的功能结局
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验发现，与常规护理相比，认知康复能显著且持续改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍成年患者的功能目标达成。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that cognitive rehabilitation significantly improves functional outcomes in patients with post-COVID cognitive impairment, with sustained effects. You can integrate this as a standard intervention and actively recommend it for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究可能存在特定人群的纳入排除标准，外推时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study may have specific inclusion/exclusion criteria for its population; caution is needed when extrapolating.

items.title: Use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue: guidelines from the American Society of Regional Anesthesia and Pain Medicine, the American Academy of Pain Medicine, the American Society of Interventional Pain Physicians, and the International Pain and Spine Intervention Society
items.summary: This provides guidelines from multiple American societies on the use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue.
items.curatedReason: 这些来自多个主要学会的注射疗法指南为您提供了最新的循证实践框架，帮助您评估皮质类固醇注射在肌肉骨骼软组织和关节中的应用。注意其中的禁忌症和安全考量。
items.titleZh: 美国区域麻醉和疼痛医学学会、美国疼痛医学学会等关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织皮质类固醇注射使用和安全性的指南
items.summaryZh: 这份指南来自多个美国学会，提供了关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中皮质类固醇注射的使用和安全性建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: These guidelines from major societies offer an up-to-date, evidence-based framework for corticosteroid injections in musculoskeletal soft tissue and joints. Pay attention to contraindications and safety considerations.
